subject: Re: The most vulnerable Democrat

body:
Democrats are emailing supporters that the Senate seat in Georgia is the “most vulnerable Senate seat up for reelection.” |
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=cc0e6033ed604e8ab36489e2270659b4&_e=L4Ggg81rrPUkhjCopEFS6GuNyqgH4nuMtIGbJpWT34LZ31ucXOTF5BmSJVR6vNpNIW47Wk44hBsyLxOcX6fT3oCSrPC1G-ZQPN6_RbiLZt7YsKCazkjGwN7I-xvtNIxGqpU3WC2k2wPXPpbrDRd9djP4kPJU1ifVlSK8ABpQ95HMoOLKFz9NjAOFIzLrfcLTb3EQl-oDqkFWsl-GS-7gsm707Yukm0SJrb880yQUF-WfQ_2SQ0eB9fAYos-1-zx04Sy6QOQr1JGj53ZLRhAsafPZUb0G_EiLiA_B-4cde1w_Im6jlnkPke4hLfqXjhrDcYyni9flTMYfsS6DwfIC2JvAsCx4k2xDPP4Mhvnv8i96Gmg2xuz3-fRc4ULr8vOKrRieNuULKqCTgZa1aXY4VR6iXBxJB2uihUID02YA0qeZUG70p3UaTkyWdZc1bIRXsjYUEn6VuY0sjyjJ7HRTPw%3D%3D)

Fellow American,

Democrats recently sent an email to their supporters that you should know about.

**_First_** , they site a report by CNN that Georgia is the _**"most vulnerable Senate Democrat seat up for reelection."**_ That's probably true because they won the seat in a runoff election by the narrowest of margins **when the entire national Democrat machine was focused on pushing their candidate over the finish line.**

If the Georgia Senate seat is as vulnerable as CNN and the Democrats claim, then we must be prepared for the desperate attacks that are sure to be hurled at our campaign in the coming months.

**_Second_** , Democrats point out that a recent poll shows them "neck and neck" in Georgia. It's far too early for any polling to predict the outcome of the race, but we know for sure that it's going to be one heck of a race - and an expensive one.

**[Will you chip in $5, $10, or even $34 right now to help us start building our media fund so we're ready to respond when the attacks intensify?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=cc0e6033ed604e8ab36489e2270659b4&_e=L4Ggg81rrPUkhjCopEFS6GuNyqgH4nuMtIGbJpWT34LZ31ucXOTF5BmSJVR6vNpNIW47Wk44hBsyLxOcX6fT3oCSrPC1G-ZQPN6_RbiLZt7YsKCazkjGwN7I-xvtNIxGqpU3WC2k2wPXPpbrDRd9djP4kPJU1ifVlSK8ABpQ95HMoOLKFz9NjAOFIzLrfcLTb3EQl-oDqkFWsl-GS-7gsm707Yukm0SJrb880yQUF-WfQ_2SQ0eB9fAYos-1-zx06g_RsaCGCIapZ3qbUKA5maw0B5pqeNQbkVOOltzOrOj1oS6n1QCvSHvztpueTp90Oi07rzw-AZm2WHYXQQLprgsxyGjEmWUF6X5vPrEyJmSz2A7lZqo2vu71A3whqqCEUBnrFzDC1PXzALVEDEfwDTOzxr61YP3aZG0U35j9NDRmALPtUidi7phJoRFmiIu1zh2otHB7k8eHJS7UHkiIOQ%3D%3D)** We're trying to raise $40,000 in the next 24 hours to kickstart our media fund so we can flip Georgia's Senate seat RED, so please help us hit this important goal.

I appreciate your consideration!

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=cc0e6033ed604e8ab36489e2270659b4&_e=L4Ggg81rrPUkhjCopEFS6GuNyqgH4nuMtIGbJpWT34LZ31ucXOTF5BmSJVR6vNpNIW47Wk44hBsyLxOcX6fT3oCSrPC1G-ZQPN6_RbiLZt7YsKCazkjGwN7I-xvtNIxGqpU3WC2k2wPXPpbrDRd9djP4kPJU1ifVlSK8ABpQ95HMoOLKFz9NjAOFIzLrfcLTb3EQl-oDqkFWsl-GS-7gsm707Yukm0SJrb880yQUF-WfQ_2SQ0eB9fAYos-1-zx0wsAkj4U62QWKjVTPTPq1cZKgVACUpo-vQ2YMvlmKCjcY5KlCyD_XK974FeqjaFyB-nE33iMnCEROIgeOXnQSLDswZFnOg2k3eMPYwAyxo9UpU0Oae2K8zlZK0jSe-mrov2-trafVJYGszqrBXPQ-xSqt-WIYQW3KVSYtFOXJoWb_ehYcy3eeKVvkSdr0KUuGv_Kw-wgQzAiHPV2UNV1dDw%3D%3D)

We need to turn out strong Democrats who believe in saving Democracy, but if we don’t hit our mid-month goal, **_we won’t have the resources it’ll take._**

name: Glenn Grothman
subject: It's the biggest problem...
body:
Join us to fight back [](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ctdwkl-yddjllujiu-r/) _**Ask any Wisconsin employer - they're struggling to find workers.**_It's the single biggest problem I hear when I talk to Wisconsin small businesses.The jobs are there. The work is there. But finding trusted, capable people is harder than ever.**Joe Biden's vaccine mandate is an ADDED BURDEN at the worst possible time for our community. We need to stand tall and STOP this D.C. mandate. [Are you with me?](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ctdwkl-yddjllujiu-j/)** [CLICK HERE >> Add Your Name!](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ctdwkl-yddjllujiu-t/) I'm working in Congress to fight for businesses AND workers. I know as well as you do that Wisconsin's 6th Congressional District is one of the most manufacturing-heavy parts of our country. And, it isn't just manufacturing, it's our entire local economy--restaurants, grocery and retail stores and nearly every other business is desperate for workers. We need to END this job-killing vaccine mandate, and get people back to work. [Click here if you agree with me!](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ctdwkl-yddjllujiu-i/) -Glenn Grothman [NO to Biden's Vaccine Mandate >>](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ctdwkl-yddjllujiu-d/) [](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ctdwkl-yddjllujiu-h/) [](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ctdwkl-yddjllujiu-k/) | Glenn Grothman for Congress
P.O. Box 1215

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Complicit in America’s Decline
body:
Joe’s gone and done it again...
Joe's gone and done it again... No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-trjymty-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trjymty-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trjymty-kujkulhluu-y/)
### ["Complicit in America's Decline"](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trjymty-kujkulhluu-j/)
In last week's blog, I discussed something really stupid that Joe Biden said. Now he's said something even stupider. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trjymty-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trjymty-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Political Whoppers](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trjymty-kujkulhluu-d/)
Politicians say a lot of stupid things. Something very stupid was said last week. Read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trjymty-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trjymty-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [China Under President Xi has Become a Menace to the Free World](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trjymty-kujkulhluu-u/)
There's a lot to talk about on the China front. I do so in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trjymty-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trjymty-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [A Tale of Two Bombings](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trjymty-kujkulhluu-n/)
During the hasty pullout from Afghanistan, a car containing innocent Afghan civilians, seven of them children, was mistakenly targeted with an American hellfire missile. Biden received very little criticism. But several years back, when Donald Trump took out a top Iranian thug, Qasem Soleimani, it was another story. Read about it in this week's blog. Peter,

Democrats recently sent an email to their supporters that you should know about.

**_First_** , they site a report by CNN that Georgia is the _**"most vulnerable Senate Democrat seat up for reelection."**_ That's probably true because they won the seat in a runoff election by the narrowest of margins **when the entire national Democrat machine was focused on pushing their candidate over the finish line.**

If the Georgia Senate seat is as vulnerable as CNN and the Democrats claim, then we must be prepared for the desperate attacks that are sure to be hurled at our campaign in the coming months.

**_Second_** , Democrats point out that a recent poll shows them "neck and neck" in Georgia. It's far too early for any polling to predict the outcome of the race, but we know for sure that it's going to be one heck of a race - and an expensive one.

**[Will you chip in $5, $10, or even $34 right now to help us start building our media fund so we're ready to respond when the attacks intensify?](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=11956d1cc78e4630bdf3ff68623ed35c&_e=cRPJzy8kn-J-mHMZUXrtY71hsuyoqUXAv7L6knp_LKlpH6UhB3G67ShqIDcyRffKHRmxyuCVPbmu-l-DaWAmpoyqT34NrDXKmscUhKnwLHRbm0AQxQjaDLDM3SnJQvZRlkcwndlhYFYo_z3H0HeLYatKGbFLcsYCjqdVc4F2OqkZDQ0cPmu9LZf6TfosZwGyzAx-B7x79VNMRjNQrbfY42AWCUNSyoQN0qe0B-zj7Gi9-i-w7EC-ilxG7ltEeYsc72u5qKKEp1zb_Ssn7VB18HRG1RgV72aEXP-ZkDANtzzDKeyWH_X6XbbkMYz1sy1pV4y0-yNk3X17mXe7-lXBHefeN8WgPftYtpnZ890YGEyrnyPvjAStGkgIyOsC6ekMSS_5ToAXdatEFNKm4F3P7ywfu5s86jDbRTDDSiY-9gv41IeFQkQSP7kOoV5G-v7az90eEjaQ5_D5vxMXUV6Qaw%3D%3D)** We're trying to raise $40,000 in the next 24 hours to kickstart our media fund so we can flip Georgia's Senate seat RED, so please help us hit this important goal.

subject: Biden is Unfit

body:
Peter, Biden has proven that he cannot lead. We must win the House in 2022.
Peter,**Joe Biden has been one of the worst presidents I have seen in my lifetime. Less than one year into his term, we have seen:**
* The tragedy and debacle of Afghanistan
* [Rising costs for gas, groceries, and everything else](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zljhrhl-idtjvlhlh-r/)
* [Terrible jobs creation](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zljhrhl-idtjvlhlh-y/)
* [Out of control spending](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zljhrhl-idtjvlhlh-j/)

**It 's no wonder a [majority of Americans see him as incompetent](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zljhrhl-idtjvlhlh-t/)**These are but a few of the ways that he is making America a weaker nation. He and the rest of the Democrats in Congress are simply not fit to lead.**We need real leadership in Washington. The radical left and Democratic elite think they know what is best for you. I know Wisconsinites are capable of deciding what is best for them and their families.** We need to pursue pro-growth policies that lower costs and leave more money in the hands of hard working Americans. The Democrats want us to live in a big government socialist state where there is no growth, prices are high, and the government takes your hard earned money and redistributes it to pay for their liberal agenda.[**Will you donate to our campaign so we can take back the House in 2022 and stop America from plummeting to disaster? We need to provide a check on Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi, and their plans to weaken the country we love.**](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zljhrhl-idtjvlhlh-i/) On Wisconsin,Bryan

name: ICYMI News
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nati
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6l0q50ida5bqqeegjol83jcvsevq5mok3ehv8g0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9g69oj2c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6u1gob0lftlfr0p1u52qkj6agrpmqavlh5hlda8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9g69oj2c1h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmdit1huc33e4bkbuv9nkblkve71ein8v1nunmq8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9g69oj2c1h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
[**Visit ICYMI News**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4ldci58k3pf0fub1c61e6q96j677p632oekm2cg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9g69oj2c1h2bs)

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to change your subscription preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4fk8risgmqp016484h3tuojp1lbe73qmuquilc0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9g69oj2c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kpqn4djm69qb0sbkmuprcst4moqfbd5jmkrncst66uqrf9v0mnhiadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4lqu1cbhe1pef9t56eibcd7lmipradrmeej3fddnkcrr4tdnklprctbi6pr34t5ge5qbfctnkjhf4ongcdhj2clhe3i36t31m9o79dtn63j7asti6eq68sljeioj6olmmhhr8orge8o60oh5u)

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z762j4nf7jccfeuuviqhk1jv3vao2mn9ss31hbgg_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6c5h60p72c9g649fg)

| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE THURSDAY, OCTOBER 14, 2021 MEAGAN HANSON RAISES OVER $300,000 IN FIRST QUARTER OF CONGRESSIONAL BID ATLANTA - Today, Meagan Hanson, conservative candidate running to unseat liberal Democrat Lucy McBath in Georgia's 6th Congressional District, reported raising over $300,000 in the first quarter of her bid for Congress. Hanson's haul, which does not include any personal loans, is anchored by more than 1,000 individual donors - including over 500 small dollar donors who contributed $25 or less. "I'm immensely grateful for the tremendous outpouring of support that our campaign has seen over the last three months - and I'm especially proud that our effort is bolstered by small-dollar donations from families across Georgia's 6th District," said Hanson. "With so much support, it's clear that Georgia's families aren't interested in an untested newcomer or another establishment Republican - and they're certainly not looking to elect a radical liberal. Our campaign to take back the House with strong, conservative values is resonating - and there's no question that we've got the momentum heading into 2022." ### Press Contact: media@meaganhanson.com

name: GOP Presidential
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our natio
This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5jb2911ofgff7rv6494e9mi1esnknkpgquuqn8o_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9i68p35chh2bs) Dear Fellow American,
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.
A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.
That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.**
By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.
You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below:
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2ljr2urhkvssu6omrfm6qq9nsnvnf7vha65qnt8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9i68p35chh2bs)**
For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.
**But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.**
This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.
Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states.
These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College.
**And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.**
So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.
**You can take the survey using this secure link I 've provided below:**
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdq1bsbhklb37h5q7dfv9rjirfrckdmtv71mu05o_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9i68p35chh2bs)**
And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.
Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.
Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, [please use this preferences page](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2zcqd9ii80mjsvci7me5j60t29pteiudp4svmgc1g).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zufbpgh07gp5lir622t9dsh6gn3btgk7h9g0v6m8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9i68p35chh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Jake Evans for Congress
subject: Jake brings in more than $907,000 in massive first quarter fundraising haul
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Oct. 14, 2021 Contact: (470) 588-2028, news@jakeevans.org
Jake brings in more than $907,000 in massive first quarter fundraising haul Jake Evans' campaign in the 6th Congressional District brought in more than $907,000 and has more than $836,000 cash on hand, his disclosure will show.
The bold, conservative trailblazer's fund-raising topped $407,000 and he personally injected $500,000 in the campaign, showing voters that he is equally invested in saving America from the radical left. "Baylie and I are thrilled and humbled by the response to this campaign," Jake said. "This report shows we have a deep well of support, and we're generating excitement. It also demonstrates that people in the 6th District are tired of the status quo. They don't like the direction Washington is going, and they know they can do our nation a favor by replacing Lucy McBath as our member of Congress. I'm ready to deliver the Great American Comeback." In addition to his fundraising success, Jake is the only candidate in the 6th Congressional District singled out for praise from President Trump at his recent rally in Middle Georgia and he's gained the endorsements of scores of conservative Republican leaders in Cobb, Fulton and Forsyth counties. "We know that national Democrats love Lucy McBath because they can rely on her to rubberstamp their failed agenda," Jake said. "We know that her out-of-state supporters are going to pour millions into her campaign just as they did last year. Republicans have to fight fire with fire, and I'm proving to 6th District conservatives that I will not only keep up with Rep. McBath, but will also beat her in the general election next year."

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: END Pelosi’s majority.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
We need this seat to flip the House.
_Sponsored message_

We need this seat to flip the House.
| [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z0hr9r5aasgesc5fsm8erkk9hi9tp6el96oq3ls0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9i64o72c1h2bs)
---
Friend,
---
The map of Texas’ new congressional districts was just released, and Nancy Pelosi is furious that Texas has gained 2 new seats.
---
_She knows that if we win Texas’s brand-new 38th district, her majority is LOST._
---
**That’s why I’m proud to endorse fellow U.S. Army veteran, Captain Wesley Hunt, as he leads the fight to win this new seat and FLIP the House from Pelosi’s control.**
---
[**Please make a contribution to help Wesley win Texas’ NEW seat -- 1 of just 5 seats needed to end Pelosi’s majority.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zeus65shtsqi3buspnnu46s5hcs1kq4v1lko4r80_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9i64o72c1h2bs)

**[CONTRIBUTE $500](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zvhjh91kd7sk584c5qmmmeau17ing7cbdu91lrh0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9i64o72c1h2bs)**

---
Over the last 9 months, the American people have suffered under Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi’s disastrous agenda.

Our only hope of stopping them in their tracks is to take back the House and place a check on Biden’s never-ending FAILURE.

subject: To hell with "Executive Privilege" - FORCE Trump to testify!
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Force Trump to testify before the January 6th committee >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T75e6e366-9ff4-4ae5-a245-8d59cd198b6d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T216af571-0928-4e57-9c0d-f652657cf647/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | There’s no doubt about it -- Trump incited a deadly insurrection at the U.S. Capitol on January 6th after spewing lies about the 2020 election for months. But so far he has faced ZERO CONSEQUENCES for his crimes. Enough is enough. Trump must be held accountable for his attempts to destroy our democracy. [So we’re collecting signatures to demand Trump testify before the January 6th Committee](https://default.salsalabs.org/T75287cc8-699c-4332-b832-91dc0979b688/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) \-- even if that means forcing him to do it using any legal means necessary. It's time to prove he’s guilty once and for all. We need to show that Americans across the country want to see Trump held accountable for his actions. We won’t let him get off scot-free.
---

subject: What it will take to defeat Dan Bishop
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Charles Graham for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37520549/311451232/-325589832?refcode=gra_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTVlMGRhMy1lZTJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=icFS23lYKtLHJAQnw1PrT3Fv2W2VHWN-Bg6w1WquuYc=)

| | | This is a long email about what it takes to defeat Dan Bishop, but it’s important that you read it. If you’re able to chip in today, [**please click on this link.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37520559/311451242/-327877729?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_211014_FR_MM1Bishop_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTVlMGRhMy1lZTJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=icFS23lYKtLHJAQnw1PrT3Fv2W2VHWN-Bg6w1WquuYc=)
---
Folks,
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to chip in to my grassroots campaign to flip NC-09 blue. But before I do, I want to share why I decided to run _against_ Dan Bishop in the first place.
Dan Bishop is a right-wing Trump loyalist who voted against certifying the results of the 2020 election, undermining the sanctity of our democracy and ultimately leading to the insurrection at our nation’s Capitol on January 6th.
He’s anti-choice, anti-mask, and anti-democracy. He cares more about touting far-right talking points and appeasing Donald Trump than the folks in NC-09. We need someone who will fight for working families. That’s why I’m running for Congress.
[**Before I get into the details of what it will take to unseat Dan Bishop, will you rush a donation to my campaign to give my team and I the resources to go up against Dan Bishop’s GOP mega-donors?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37520566/311451255/-327877729?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_211014_FR_MM1Bishop_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTVlMGRhMy1lZTJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=icFS23lYKtLHJAQnw1PrT3Fv2W2VHWN-Bg6w1WquuYc=)
| | [Donate ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37520569/311451258/-327877729?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_211014_FR_MM1Bishop_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTVlMGRhMy1lZTJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=icFS23lYKtLHJAQnw1PrT3Fv2W2VHWN-Bg6w1WquuYc=)
---
Now, let’s get into the nitty gritty.
Trump won in my State House district by 22 points -- a large margin. That same year, my team and I beat our Republican challenger by just _1,344 votes._
This tells me two things:
1. There are people who voted for Donald Trump who didn’t vote for my Republican opponent, and instead cast their vote for a Democrat -- me.

2. 1,344 votes is too close for comfort.

We need to mobilize a larger group of grassroots voters -- Republican and Democrat alike -- to turn out in 2022 if we want to unseat Dan Bishop.
This is where reaching across the aisle comes in -- reminding folks that we’re not all that different, that, at the end of the day, we all just want what’s best for our families and to feel like our voices are heard.
So, folks, I’m asking you today: [**Will you chip in ahead of my mid-month fundraising deadline tomorrow to give my team and I the resources to reach as many potential voters as possible?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37520572/311451261/-327877729?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_211014_FR_MM1Bishop_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTVlMGRhMy1lZTJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=icFS23lYKtLHJAQnw1PrT3Fv2W2VHWN-Bg6w1WquuYc=)

clean_body: | = | | | This is a long email about what it takes to defeat Dan Bishop, but it’s important that you read it. If you’re able to chip in today, = Folks, In a moment, I’m going to ask you to chip in to my grassroots campaign to flip NC-09 blue. But before I do, I want to share why I decided to run against Dan Bishop in the first place. Dan Bishop is a right-wing Trump loyalist who voted against certifying the results of the 2020 election, undermining the sanctity of our democracy and ultimately leading to the insurrection at our nation’s Capitol on January 6th. He’s anti-choice, anti-mask, and anti-democracy. He cares more about touting far-right talking points and appeasing Donald Trump than the folks in NC-09. We need someone who will fight for working families. That’s why I’m running for Congress. = | | = Now, let’s get into the nitty gritty. Trump won in my State House district by 22 points -- a large margin. That same year, my team and I beat our Republican challenger by just 1,344 votes. This tells me two things: 1. There are people who voted for Donald Trump who didn’t vote for my Republican opponent, and instead cast their vote for a Democrat -- me. 2. 1,344 votes is too close for comfort. We need to mobilize a larger group of grassroots voters -- Republican and Democrat alike -- to turn out in 2022 if we want to unseat Dan Bishop. This is where reaching across the aisle comes in -- reminding folks that we’re not all that different, that, at the end of the day, we all just want what’s best for our families and to feel like our voices are heard. So, folks, I’m asking you today: = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you in advance, Charles | | = | | We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, | | = | | = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please click | Paid for by Charles Graham for Congress Charles Graham for Congress 479 Bee Gee Road Lumberton, NC 28358

name: Roger Misso
subject: INVITE for Oct 21st: an HISTORIC EVENT supporting women veterans for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking the Hill
body:
Peter,

Women have fought and sacrificed for this country in harm's way since the Revolutionary War. [_**So why have only EIGHT women veterans been elected to Congress in all that time?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/r0hsSY_Z1MsDNskdRfUd0Dphv6o5mcUwYwoYI79f5Iw=/U8kmVcNAUb3NB6QGb6j34tEl6tmtRPqaiUyPI2g8nGA=)

We are not willing to accept that reality any longer. We're coming together with our friends to do something about - and [_**we want you there.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/r0hsSY_Z1MsDNskdRfUd0Dphv6o5mcUwYwoYI79f5Iw=/U8kmVcNAUb3NB6QGb6j34tEl6tmtRPqaiUyPI2g8nGA=)

[_**Join us for an historic night celebrating the contributions of women veterans to our country**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/r0hsSY_Z1MsDNskdRfUd0Dphv6o5mcUwYwoYI79f5Iw=/U8kmVcNAUb3NB6QGb6j34tEl6tmtRPqaiUyPI2g8nGA=) \- and of raising the resources it takes to support women veterans for Congress RIGHT NOW. We are proud to be joined by the Honorable Patrick J. Murphy, Senator Catherine Cortez Masto, Reps. Julia Brownley, Chrissy Houlahan, Elaine Luria, and Mikie Sherrill, former Senator Joe Donnelly, former Reps. Michael Arcuri and Heath Shuler, and many others as we kick off our year of building the next great generation of women veterans in Congress! Even if you can't be with us in person, [_**a contribution at our event link**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/r0hsSY_Z1MsDNskdRfUd0Dphv6o5mcUwYwoYI79f5Iw=/U8kmVcNAUb3NB6QGb6j34tEl6tmtRPqaiUyPI2g8nGA=) helps power our work and brings us closer to electing a record number of women vets.

**When:** **[Thursday, October 21st from 6:30 - 8:00 pm Eastern](https://act.myngp.com/el/r0hsSY_Z1MsDNskdRfUd0Dphv6o5mcUwYwoYI79f5Iw=/U8kmVcNAUb3NB6QGb6j34tEl6tmtRPqaiUyPI2g8nGA=)**
**Where:** [_**Washington, DC (Capitol Hill) - location upon RSVP**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/r0hsSY_Z1MsDNskdRfUd0Dphv6o5mcUwYwoYI79f5Iw=/U8kmVcNAUb3NB6QGb6j34tEl6tmtRPqaiUyPI2g8nGA=)
**Why:** [**To support and elect women veterans of integrity to Congress!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/r0hsSY_Z1MsDNskdRfUd0Dphv6o5mcUwYwoYI79f5Iw=/U8kmVcNAUb3NB6QGb6j34tEl6tmtRPqaiUyPI2g8nGA=)
**How:****[_Click on this link to RSVP!_](https://act.myngp.com/el/r0hsSY_Z1MsDNskdRfUd0Dphv6o5mcUwYwoYI79f5Iw=/U8kmVcNAUb3NB6QGb6j34tEl6tmtRPqaiUyPI2g8nGA=)**

[_**See you next Thursday**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/r0hsSY_Z1MsDNskdRfUd0Dphv6o5mcUwYwoYI79f5Iw=/U8kmVcNAUb3NB6QGb6j34tEl6tmtRPqaiUyPI2g8nGA=) on our way to making history!

Yours in service,
Roger

Roger Misso
Executive Director
[Taking the Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/r0hsSY_Z1MsDNskdRfUd0Dphv6o5mcUwYwoYI79f5Iw=/HKAHH4IwGFNdxOiTIggPSKlS6eDtRH78CM8UkY95ZWk=)
To make a contribution, [click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/r0hsSY_Z1MsDNskdRfUd0Dphv6o5mcUwYwoYI79f5Iw=/xInCT9hQRJIkSGa3GUaFhad8TOjdTubzCdXkX-Tt98Q= "https://act.myngp.com/el/r0hsSY_Z1MsDNskdRfUd0Dphv6o5mcUwYwoYI79f5Iw=/xInCT9hQRJIkSGa3GUaFhad8TOjdTubzCdXkX-Tt98Q=").
Checks may be mailed to:
Taking the Hill PAC
PO Box 2134
Bristol, PA 19007

Tomorrow is our third Day of Action as part of our #OrganizingEverywhere tour. We’re continuing to spread Jasmine’s message of hope and unity across all 17 WNC counties by knocking on doors, making phone calls, and writing postcards.
We’re doing this voter outreach early on because we truly believe that the more folks we meet, the stronger our grassroots movement will grow. And we’re funding this work the only way we know how, from grassroots supporters like you.
Every grassroots dollar you chip in to our campaign makes a big difference in the number of people we can connect with. And in a race this close, we cannot afford to be outworked or out-hustled.
[**We have just $3,729 left to raise to meet our goal. | | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans—views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4u8i8i5tn88trip5fadf1rvobi8cbaofkg45nto_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9i66ob4c3h2bs)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive—and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmfvnuageqodmj2vvgigco6jg4djbjh7u2ttugo0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9i66ob4c3h2bs)

Larry P. Arnn

subject: 🚨 URGENT BALLOT UPDATE 🚨
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ORTT FOR STATE SENATE
body:
Stop election fraud, ballot harvesting and gerrymandering by VOTING NO on the back of your ballot
---
| | | | | | |
---
---
| |
---
| URGENT ElECTION UPDATE
---
| Friend -
I wanted to make you aware of something scary on the ballot this year. Corrupt Albany politicians have snuck three constitutional amendments on to the back of the November ballot that will END fair elections in New York State.
If approved, these amendments would increase fraud and abuse in our elections, allow for ballot harvesting and let politicians gerrymander districts to send even more radical politicians to Albany and Washington.
When you go to vote this year, turn your ballot over and VOTE NO on proposition 1, proposition 3 and proposition 4.
---
|
---
| The corrupt politicians in Albany are more concerned with protecting their power than securing our elections. They are attempting to sneak these amendments by the voters to rig elections in their favor.
Help us stop them by VOTING NO on proposition 1, proposition 3 and proposition 4.
If you support FAIR ELECTIONS, please share the graphic above to make sure your friends and family know to flip their ballots over and VOTE NO.
To protect New York's future, we must protect fair elections. Join me in voting no on these three ballot amendments.
---
| God bless,
---
|
---
| Rob Ortt

clean_body: Stop election fraud, ballot harvesting and gerrymandering by VOTING NO on the back of your ballot | | | | | | | | | | URGENT ElECTION UPDATE | Friend - I wanted to make you aware of something scary on the ballot this year. Corrupt Albany politicians have snuck three constitutional amendments on to the back of the November ballot that will END fair elections in New York State. If approved, these amendments would increase fraud and abuse in our elections, allow for ballot harvesting and let politicians gerrymander districts to send even more radical politicians to Albany and Washington. When you go to vote this year, turn your ballot over and VOTE NO on proposition 1, proposition 3 and proposition 4. | | The corrupt politicians in Albany are more concerned with protecting their power than securing our elections. They are attempting to sneak these amendments by the voters to rig elections in their favor. Help us stop them by VOTING NO on proposition 1, proposition 3 and proposition 4. If you support FAIR ELECTIONS, please share the graphic above to make sure your friends and family know to flip their ballots over and VOTE NO. To protect New York's future, we must protect fair elections. Join me in voting no on these three ballot amendments. | God bless, | | Rob Ortt \-- IN THE NEWS: == == | | | | SENATE REPUBLICAN LEADER ROB ORTT == | == == | | | == | PAID FOR BY ORTT FOR STATE SENATE | | Ortt for State Senate | PO Box 1279, North Tonawanda, NY 14120 | | Sent by mailto:rob@robortt.com powered by

name: Ras Smith
subject: BREAKING: Workers on strike at John Deere
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor
body:
For too long, politicians including my opponent Kim Reynolds have sided with big corporations at the expense of workers and their families. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37524185/311466934/692104027?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWMwNWFiNC1mMjJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nYHEZILVd83RAVtMMJSyrdo_nR5DF9WhysaHqcafAR8=)
Friend,

As you may have heard, 10,000 workers at John Deere went on strike last night after voting down a proposed contract last Sunday by a whopping 90%. **This is the largest strike in the US in the last two years.**

I currently serve as state representative for Waterloo, home of the United Auto Workers Local 838, the largest local of Deere workers in the country. This is also personal to me.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37524187/311466960/136746040?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWMwNWFiNC1mMjJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nYHEZILVd83RAVtMMJSyrdo_nR5DF9WhysaHqcafAR8=&emci=65109a13-f02c-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=a1c05ab4-f22c-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=21044445)
_My father, LC Smith, was a Deere line worker for more than 40 years._
My father was active in the UAW and participated in the 1986 Deere strike. Because of his influence, I witnessed the importance of workers coming together to negotiate fair wages and benefits with their employer and the cost of corporate greed.

**For too long, politicians including my opponent Kim Reynolds have sided with big corporations at the expense of workers and their families.** That's why I'm running for governor, and it's why we're so focused on lifting up issues facing working people every step of the way.

**[Later this month, we'll be rolling out a Workers Bill of Rights -- a package that will expand rights for workers across Iowa. It changes the game for workers, but in the meantime, will you add your name next to mine supporting the workers on strike at John Deere? They need to know that we stand with them.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37524189/311466964/136746040?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWMwNWFiNC1mMjJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nYHEZILVd83RAVtMMJSyrdo_nR5DF9WhysaHqcafAR8=&emci=65109a13-f02c-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=a1c05ab4-f22c-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=21044445)**
| **[Add your name →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37524191/311466971/136746040?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWMwNWFiNC1mMjJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nYHEZILVd83RAVtMMJSyrdo_nR5DF9WhysaHqcafAR8=&emci=65109a13-f02c-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=a1c05ab4-f22c-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=21044445)**

In solidarity,

Ras Smith

body:
We simply cannot win without the resources to compete...

**The latest data out of Iowa's Senate race:**
Peter – radical Republican Sen. Chuck Grassley (IA) just launched his reelection campaign, and his challenger, Democrat Abby Finkenauer, is up against a tight mid-month fundraising deadline at 11:59 p.m. tomorrow. **We've got to keep pace with these fundraising goals to stay competitive, but we're still falling short. Here are the latest numbers from our data team:**
* **64% of Iowa voters DON'T want to reelect Sen. Grassley** , and Abby is running to defeat him in what The Des Moines Register called a "marquee matchup" – making this our best chance in decades to flip this seat blue.

* **The Senate is split 50-50** , meaning Democrats MUST defeat vulnerable incumbents like Sen. Grassley to maintain and expand our majority.

* The GOP Senate campaign arm has already raised $76 MILLION dedicated to defeating Democratic challengers like Abby and taking back the Senate – and an ally of Mitch McConnell has vowed to make Joe Biden a "half-term president" by dismantling Democratic majorities in Congress.

* Abby's big mid-month fundraising goal is tomorrow, but she's forecasted to fall short the $25,000 she needs to raise to defeat Sen. Grassley in Iowa.

Peter, Sen. Chuck Grassley is vulnerable, and if Abby defeats him it will virtually guarantee Democratic control of the Senate. Chuck Grassley (IA) just launched his reelection campaign, and his challenger, Democrat Abby Finkenauer, is up against a tight mid-month fundraising deadline at 11:59 p.m. tomorrow. We've got to keep pace with these fundraising goals to stay competitive, but we're still falling short. Here are the latest numbers from our data team: 64% of Iowa voters DON'T want to reelect Sen. Grassley , and Abby is running to defeat him in what The Des Moines Register called a "marquee matchup" – making this our best chance in decades to flip this seat blue. The Senate is split 50-50 , meaning Democrats MUST defeat vulnerable incumbents like Sen. Grassley to maintain and expand our majority. The GOP Senate campaign arm has already raised $76 MILLION dedicated to defeating Democratic challengers like Abby and taking back the Senate – and an ally of Mitch McConnell has vowed to make Joe Biden a "half-term president" by dismantling Democratic majorities in Congress. Abby's big mid-month fundraising goal is tomorrow, but she's forecasted to fall short the $25,000 she needs to raise to defeat Sen. Grassley in Iowa. Peter, Sen. name: Hendrell Remus
subject: Senator Doug Jones + Three Star Dinner = 🎉
body:
https://tndp.org/threestar/ [https://tndp.org/threestar/]
Dear Peter,

A very special guest will be joining this year's Three Star Dinner — longtime friend of TNDP, Former Senator Doug Jones! We couldn't be more thrilled to welcome Senator Jones back to Tennessee where he'll be joining as our special guest alongside our keynote speaker, Congressman Conor Lamb of Pennsylvania.

We are welcoming Senator Jones and Congressman Lamb in Nashville, on October 30th at the Renaissance Hotel, and I hope you will join us. Doors will open at 6:30 pm CT and dinner will begin at 7:00. COVID precautions will be taken, including proof of vaccination and/or a negative COVID test from within the previous 24 hours.

General Admission — $150
Table for 8 Guests — $1,200
Additional sponsorship and ad options are available.

THREE STAR DINNER [https://tndp.org/threestar/]

We can't wait to see all of our favorite Tennessee Democrats (that includes you!) on October 30th. Look forward to seeing you there!

Thank you for being a Tennessee Democrat,
Hendrell Remus
he/him
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

At last night’s Donald Trump rally for Glenn Youngkin, attendees kicked off the event by pledging allegiance to a flag from the deadly January 6th insurrection.

And Gov. Ron DeSantis is counting on that fact. He only narrowly won in 2018, so he’s hoping he can buy his way to victory this time around (he raised **_$5.5 million_** in August alone)!

**[The _only_ way we can beat him is by hitting each and every one of our grassroots goals. name: NextGen Pennsylvania
subject: Friend, you’ve got a deadline coming up!
body:
| | Friend, **This Monday, October 18, is your deadline to register to vote for the upcoming election in Pennsylvania.** In November, Pennsylvania voters will weigh in on important judicial and local elections that will have a lasting impact on our commonwealth. With an open seat on the Supreme Court, your choice for our next Supreme Court justice will impact the future of young Pennsylvanians as the court rules on high-stakes legal matters. Make sure you’re registered at your current address so you can vote in this crucial election! [Take a minute to confirm that your voter registration is up to date, or get registered if you’re not already.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37526305/311476773/-1227532436?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2I3M2EwNS1mNzJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vrXATsPam8k8-hLXG5hw9a7F9TZnEo8t3EM-RXhCIrQ=&emci=720c2650-552c-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=ecb73a05-f72c-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=6787172) Young voters are shaping the future of our democracy — we just need to keep showing up like we did last year. **Together, we get to decide who represents us and our community through this Supreme Court election and local elections across the commonwealth.** [Check your voter registration status, or register to vote before the upcoming deadline on Monday, October 18.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37526306/311476776/-1227532436?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2I3M2EwNS1mNzJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vrXATsPam8k8-hLXG5hw9a7F9TZnEo8t3EM-RXhCIrQ=&emci=720c2650-552c-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=ecb73a05-f72c-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=6787172) Thank you, NextGen Pennsylvania **P.S. When you’re all good to go, make sure to forward this email to three friends to encourage them to register to vote or check their registration! **
---
| **NextGen America**

San Francisco CA 94104-3503 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | [unsubscribe](https://email.everyaction.com/unsubscribeUnique/720c2650-552c-ec11-981f-c896653b9208/ecb73a05-f72c-ec11-981f-c896653b9208?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2I3M2EwNS1mNzJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vrXATsPam8k8-hLXG5hw9a7F9TZnEo8t3EM-RXhCIrQ=&id=109799863)

subject: 🚨 BREAKING NEWS 🚨 We've been OUTRAISED AGAIN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
| |
---
| | |
Peter

I cannot believe I have to write this...again.

My radical Trump Impeachment Manager Opponent has OUTRAISED me...AGAIN. How else can I spell this out for you, Peter? For the past 2 quarters, we lost the fundraising race to a RADICAL DEMOCRAT. This time we lost by $2.4 million dollars....

**[Things have gotten really bad around here, and they are poised to get worse if you don't step up, Peter. I have to ask you, can you rush just $18 to my campaign right now?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58527377:J3cxXK2NN:m:1:3253819041:3EF92609922BE118E4CB4DF46F734677:r "Things have gotten
really bad around here, and they are poised to get worse if you don’t step up, Peter. I have to ask you, can you rush just $18 to my campaign
right now?")**

If every person that reads this chips in just $18, this will put us back on track to win against my Impeachment Manager Opponent. Florida is going to be vital to taking back the Senate, **we cannot afford to lose any ground in this close race, especially since it 's been reported that my race is in a DEAD HEAT. **

Virtual tie in the polls. Outraised by $2.4 million dollars. We are so close to losing this, Peter. We've created an emergency fund to ensure we can close this gap for Quarter 4. Please, I am begging, I just need $18 to make up this lost ground.

name: Steve Nelson
subject: A story any parent can relate to

body:
---
| | “Steve, you have to do something!”

The urgency in my Mom’s voice was clear. Our doctor was trying to figure out why my little boy was not getting better, treating one symptom after the other without understanding why he was sick and getting sicker.

We were living in Stockholm, Wisconsin at the time. I was a pastor at Sabylund Lutheran Church. While the hospital setting was unfamiliar to me, my Mom was right at home. She’d been an Emergency Room RN for years. But now, something like panic was shaking her foundation. Only a parent could step in, and it was up to me.

I found our doctor and told him we wanted a pediatrician to check and treat our 9-month old patient. Within minutes Dr. Schulenberg was in the room, giving baby Thomas a quick once over and ordering the tools to do a spinal tap.

It was what he feared: spinal meningitis. Hoping it was bacterial, he ordered a cocktail of three antibiotics and sent him to what served as Intensive Care in this small rural hospital.

I had done something, alright, but was it soon enough?

All night Thomas’ Mom and I paced back and forth from waiting room to hospital crib, looking for signs of hope, signs of prayers being heard.

Finally, around 3:00 am, we entered his room to find his special duty nurse less grim. “I think he’s getting better; the medicine is beginning to work,” she said. “His vitals are improving. But he’s a very sick little boy.”

Long story short, it was bacterial spinal meningitis, the antibiotics did their job, and 14 days later, we were able to take him home. Home to his parsonage crib where we had found him in distress that Sunday before Christmas 1976. Of all the scenarios of after-effects and complications, Thomas was ok. Only a scar on the top of his forehead remained of the whole episode, left from the IV needles that had saved his life.

Trauma leaves scars in its wake and sometimes lessons. Besides the mark on his forehead, the experience at the hospital taught his grandmother something about what Thomas was to become. Having witnessed this she became convinced this little guy had a destiny, and she told me so, and often. “He’s destined for something great. His life was spared for a purpose,” is how she interpreted it.

Grandma Nelson is gone. She passed away in 1999. But she lived long enough to witness the beginning of Thomas’ career as a public servant committed to making the world a better place for all people. Grandma and Grandpa believed that the everyday folk who surrounded us in our community and church and work deserved leaders who were looking out for them. They saw in their grandson someone who would fight for the good as hard as he fought for his own life on his first Christmas.

Thomas, your family carries the torch for you in our generation, too. We know hundreds of you do, too. But he can’t do it without all of us. Supporters, we need your time, talent and treasure. Can you think of a better person or cause?

Peace!

Sincerely,

Steve, Dad, and if you read my diploma, The Rev. Dr. Steven M. Nelson

body:
The National Republican Congressional Committee just announced its initial "On the Radar" candidates in its "Young Guns" program -- and one of Kim's Trump-supporting opponents is on the list. **BREAKING: "House GOP reelection arm announces first round of candidates to watch in competitive battlegrounds"**
\- _Fox News_ , October 12, 2021
Peter,

The National Republican Congressional Committee just announced its initial "On the Radar" candidates in its "Young Guns" program -- and one of Kim's Trump-supporting opponents is on the list.

Young Guns is a recruitment program to find candidates in competitive races who they see as having a path to victory. Once they're added to the list, Kevin McCarthy and the NRCC will provide these candidates with "the tools they need" to win.

Republicans need to flip just five seats to take back the House majority, and it's clear they think Washington's 8th District can be one of them. Let's prove them wrong, Peter.

Kim Schrier's district a top target for the midterms, so we need your help to build another winning campaign. Will you chip in to protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority in 2022? | = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. name: Mark Meadows
subject: Home for Conservatives
body:
Fellow American:

Let's be clear. Washington, D.C. is not like any
other city in America. Conservatives come here from across the
country, only to be hit by a system filled with career
politicians and unelected bureaucrats fighting against them.
That's why the Conservative Partnership Institute was founded -
to fight back. We're about an American movement.

NEW VIDEO: Watch what leaders like Congressman Byron
Donalds and others are saying about CPI.

We're doing work no organization ever has.

"What CPI is doing is giving conservatives the
knowledge, the intel, the knowhow to choose the terrain and to
win the battles." - U.S. Senator Ted Cruz (TX)

CPI is staffed with veterans with decades of
experience fighting the Left. We know how to fight, and how to
win.

"They support me when the pressure is on." - U.S.
Congressman Louie Gohmert (TX)

Washington's strongest power play is isolating
conservatives - making them feel powerless to stand up against
the Swamp. Thanks to CPI, conservatives know they're not alone.

"A place you can call home, a place you can go get
advice, a place where my team can really coalesce." - U.S.
Congressman Byron Donalds (FL)

We help newly elected conservatives find
battle-tested staffers. And we train young staffers how to fight
effectively for their ideas and values.

"It's like having a super-staff by your side." -
U.S. Senator Cynthia Lummis (WY)

At CPI, we're not lobbyists. We're not another PAC.
We're conservatives' home base inside the Beltway. Our mission is
to make conservative leaders, staff, and activists better at
their jobs.

We're here to help all conservatives save our
freedom and save our country.

Watch this new video and join us in helping
conservatives win the fight for America's future.

As our Chairman, Jim DeMint, says, "The time to get
into this fight is now."

For Freedom,

Mark MeadowsCPI Senior Partner

CONSERVATIVE PARTNERSHIP INSTITUTE300 Independence
Ave SEWashington, DC 20003(202) 742-8988 Tel
(202) 595-0282 FaxCPI.org

DONATE

Conservative Partnership Institute, Inc. is an
IRS-approved section 501(c)(3) public charity. Your donation to
Conservative Partnership Institute, Inc. is tax-deductible to the
extent allowed by law.

subject: $10 million vs $5

body:

**$10,000,000** This is how much One Nation, a McConnell-linked super PAC, has pledged to spend in the coming weeks and months as part of the GOP's plan to flip the Senate. Mitch McConnell only needs to flip one seat to take back control, and New Hampshire is at the top of his list. This money will be used on TV, digital, and radio attack ads to rally Republicans' far-right base and smear Maggie's record. And in a swing state like New Hampshire, these tactics could work. **$5** That's how much we're asking you to donate today. It may not seem like much compared to the millions being spent against us. But when everyone gives, it can add up, helping our grassroots campaign stand up to the GOP's deep pockets. **[What you donate today will help our campaign respond to attack ads and share Maggie's bipartisan accomplishments across the state.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37530480/311496416/-214106137?refcode=e20211014_bsu-10m&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmJlZGE2ZC0wMTJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CIujooFTgw1OqV94QGn8cwaI9Cp2QHaG_Lrsv9MjIW4=)** It's clear that this will be one of the most competitive Senate races of the cycle. With outside groups like One Nation already pledging millions against us, it's only going to get more expensive. name: Team Lamb
subject: This is beyond party politics
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CONOR LAMB FOR SENATE Conor Lamb for Senate
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37530604/311496972/-1576960734?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmRmYmNlYS0wMTJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PnaBQr1iaTCcvCljOrxvYO49Rf9eZOU3R9edAMdvdFg=)

It's hard to believe it's already been two months since we launched this campaign, friend.

In that short time, we've gotten a lot done, traveled to dozens of counties all over Pennsylvania, and had a lot of good conversations about the issues at stake in this election. But we're just getting started. We have a lot of work ahead of us and a lot of miles left to travel.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37530606/311496974/65214105?refcode=em21_211014_mm&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmRmYmNlYS0wMTJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PnaBQr1iaTCcvCljOrxvYO49Rf9eZOU3R9edAMdvdFg=)
---

When we first set out to flip this seat and build on our Democratic majority, we told you it was because our democracy is in trouble, and it's our responsibility to protect it. And in those two months, since we've launched this campaign, we've seen all the proof we need to know that **that's becoming more and more true with each passing day.**

In the past few months, we've seen some of our worst fears come to fruition. **Texas passed yet _another_ voter suppression bill,** all but explicitly targeting minority communities. Pennsylvania launched an Arizona-inspired sham investigation into the 2020 election. And in a letter to Georgia's Secretary of State just a couple weeks ago, nearly a full year after the election, Donald Trump once again asked him to **decertify the results of the election on the basis of "large-scale voter fraud."**

**This is why I'm running, friend -- because we can't let this continue. It's gone beyond party politics. Now, this is about protecting our Constitution, and we're not going to do that with catchy tweets on social media. It's going to be hard. It's going to be the work of our lifetimes. But I know we can do it.**

**[So, can you spare just $5 or more to keep our campaign running strong, so we can flip this seat and help protect our democracy? Every donation makes a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37530609/311496976/65214105?refcode=em21_211014_mm&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmRmYmNlYS0wMTJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PnaBQr1iaTCcvCljOrxvYO49Rf9eZOU3R9edAMdvdFg=)**

clean_body: | = It's hard to believe it's already been two months since we launched this campaign, friend. In that short time, we've gotten a lot done, traveled to dozens of counties all over Pennsylvania, and had a lot of good conversations about the issues at stake in this election. But we're just getting started. We have a lot of work ahead of us and a lot of miles left to travel. | = When we first set out to flip this seat and build on our Democratic majority, we told you it was because our democracy is in trouble, and it's our responsibility to protect it. And in those two months, since we've launched this campaign, we've seen all the proof we need to know that that's becoming more and more true with each passing day. In the past few months, we've seen some of our worst fears come to fruition. Texas passed yet another voter suppression bill, all but explicitly targeting minority communities. Pennsylvania launched an Arizona-inspired sham investigation into the 2020 election. And in a letter to Georgia's Secretary of State just a couple weeks ago, nearly a full year after the election, Donald Trump once again asked him to decertify the results of the election on the basis of "large-scale voter fraud." This is why I'm running, friend -- because we can't let this continue. It's gone beyond party politics. Now, this is about protecting our Constitution, and we're not going to do that with catchy tweets on social media. It's going to be hard. It's going to be the work of our lifetimes. But I know we can do it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = As we continue to grow this campaign in the most competitive Senate race in the nation, I'm so grateful to have people like you standing with us. Thanks for all your support, Conor Lamb = = *

clean_body: This is how we protect our planet. | BREAKING: Gov. Roy Cooper signs historic clean energy bill to reduce NC carbon emissions by 70% by 2030 Peter— Roy just signed critical legislation to secure North Carolina’s renewable energy future, and we wanted to make sure you’d be among the first to know. We’re so proud of this bipartisan agreement because we know that curbing carbon emissions through clean energy is not only key to saving this planet for future generations , it will also create jobs and drive economic growth for our state. The renewable energy sector already employs over 100,000 people in North Carolina — and more good-paying jobs are on the way as this economy expands. And renewable energy will be cheaper and more accessible to consumers than ever with this law in effect. | We appreciate the support! ****
Terry’s opponent says he’s proud to have Donald Trump’s endorsement. He even added “Donald Trump represents so much of why I’m running.”

And he’s putting his money where his mouth is. He has supported Donald Trump’s anti-democratic conspiracy theories and pushed an agenda of restricting voter access.

On the other hand, Terry is a champion for our freedom to vote. As Governor, he restored voting rights to more people than any other Governor in history. He fought hard to make sure Virginia was one of the most welcoming, inclusive and forward-looking places in the country. But if Terry’s opponent wins, he’ll take the Commonwealth backwards.

**In state after state across the country, we have seen that governors play a large role in determining whether access is restricted or expanded. We must hold the line in Virginia to protect and expand progress.**

So here is the deal: if we do our part to elect Terry in Virginia, we can send a message to the entire country that our Democracy is stronger than ever. We can demonstrate that candidates who support voter suppression and Donald Trump’s big lie will be met with a groundswell of grassroots resistance.

**[Please, make a matched donation to Terry’s campaign right now and become a part of his historic movement.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37531279/311499848/-2023814932?refcode=20211014.3_SA_10DB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjI5OGM5OS0wMzJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xTFGo3gnZl7u4eTCeYleoNrSlD1cnUcYTqs9hp7T1wY=)**

I’m counting on you, Derek.

Stacey Abrams

He fought hard to make sure Virginia was one of the most welcoming, inclusive and forward-looking places in the country. But if Terry’s opponent wins, he’ll take the Commonwealth backwards. In state after state across the country, we have seen that governors play a large role in determining whether access is restricted or expanded. We must hold the line in Virginia to protect and expand progress. So here is the deal: if we do our part to elect Terry in Virginia, we can send a message to the entire country that our Democracy is stronger than ever. We can demonstrate that candidates who support voter suppression and Donald Trump’s big lie will be met with a groundswell of grassroots resistance. =** I’m counting on you, Derek. Stacey Abrams = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia

body:
our trip to Kansas City

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37531402/311500459/1300596418?refcode=211014_FR_midmonth1megan_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ1YzhmNjQyLTA1MmQtZWMxMS05ODFmLWM4OTY2NTNiOTIwOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=W_Tf-6qw7tzjuoDAkmdjFP1J7iR_EBMXRM-6bifbJsU=)
---
Hey Friends! You might remember from our selfies at the beginning of the month, I traveled to Kansas City, Missouri to stay with Eden.

And although there were tons of laughs, playtime with her dog, and KC BBQ -- the purpose of the retreat was to train a group of hungry up-and-coming campaign staffers ready to take on tough fights in 2022.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37531403/311500460/1300596418?refcode=211014_FR_midmonth1megan_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ1YzhmNjQyLTA1MmQtZWMxMS05ODFmLWM4OTY2NTNiOTIwOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=W_Tf-6qw7tzjuoDAkmdjFP1J7iR_EBMXRM-6bifbJsU=) At **_Barrier to Entry x Pay Your Interns PAC_** , we know how important it is to empower and value each and every staff member, particularly in the Democratic political sector. That starts with giving them the training and tools they need to be successful. **[And with your help, all of this is possible. Every donation allows us to train more staff and candidates to run strong, progressive campaigns. Will you chip in today so that we can keep training up new talent?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37531404/311500461/-2038882143?refcode=211014_FR_midmonth1megan_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ1YzhmNjQyLTA1MmQtZWMxMS05ODFmLWM4OTY2NTNiOTIwOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=W_Tf-6qw7tzjuoDAkmdjFP1J7iR_EBMXRM-6bifbJsU=)** **______[DONATE →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37531405/311500462/1300596418?refcode=211014_FR_midmonth1megan_btn1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ1YzhmNjQyLTA1MmQtZWMxMS05ODFmLWM4OTY2NTNiOTIwOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=W_Tf-6qw7tzjuoDAkmdjFP1J7iR_EBMXRM-6bifbJsU=)** _**Here's our team of staffers from last month's training retreat!**_ [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37531406/311500463/1300596418?refcode=211014_FR_midmonth1megan_img2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ1YzhmNjQyLTA1MmQtZWMxMS05ODFmLWM4OTY2NTNiOTIwOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=W_Tf-6qw7tzjuoDAkmdjFP1J7iR_EBMXRM-6bifbJsU=) But if we’re going to continue building our movement so that we can equip progressive campaigns with critical resources including talented staffers, we’re going to need your help right away.**** **We’re almost halfway into the first month of the final quarter of the year, which means the 2022 midterm elections are right around the corner. And well-trained staff is more vital than ever to help power these campaigns.**

[**Our mid-month fundraising goal of raising $2,300 by tomorrow’s deadline is going to determine the resources and training we can provide, so I’m hoping you can chip in. Please pitch in anything you can right now to help us hit our goal so we can provide working-class candidates with the campaign resources and staff they need to win. DONATE NOW >>**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37531407/311500464/1300596418?refcode=211014_FR_midmonth1meganL1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ1YzhmNjQyLTA1MmQtZWMxMS05ODFmLWM4OTY2NTNiOTIwOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=W_Tf-6qw7tzjuoDAkmdjFP1J7iR_EBMXRM-6bifbJsU=) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | ********[**$10 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37531408/311500465/1300596418?refcode=211014_FR_midmonth1megan_EL10&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode2=EL10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ1YzhmNjQyLTA1MmQtZWMxMS05ODFmLWM4OTY2NTNiOTIwOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=W_Tf-6qw7tzjuoDAkmdjFP1J7iR_EBMXRM-6bifbJsU=)********

clean_body: our trip to Kansas City | | | = Hey Friends! You might remember from our selfies at the beginning of the month, I traveled to Kansas City, Missouri to stay with Eden. And although there were tons of laughs, playtime with her dog, and KC BBQ -- the purpose of the retreat was to train a group of hungry up-and-coming campaign staffers ready to take on tough fights in 2022. = At Barrier to Entry x Pay Your Interns PAC , we know how important it is to empower and value each and every staff member, particularly in the Democratic political sector. That starts with giving them the training and tools they need to be successful. = __= Here's our team of staffers from last month's training retreat! = But if we’re going to continue building our movement so that we can equip progressive campaigns with critical resources including talented staffers, we’re going to need your help right away.** We’re almost halfway into the first month of the final quarter of the year, which means the 2022 midterm elections are right around the corner. And well-trained staff is more vital than ever to help power these campaigns. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ****=**** **** **** | | ******=****** | ******=****** **** **** | | ******=****** | ******=****** **** **** | | ******=****** Thanks for powering our movement. Underfunded schools. _Government corruption._ **That’s what Ohioans have gotten from years of single-party GOP rule, folks — and it’s time for a new direction.** **_[John Cranley is the Democrat who can flip Ohio blue and help write a comeback story for our communities — just like he did in Cincinnati. But he needs your help. John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

That’s what Ohioans have gotten from years of single-party GOP rule, folks — and it’s time for a new direction. = Look, Republicans in Columbus showed us exactly what their priorities are: Putting up roadblocks to expanding the clean energy economy and standing in the way of good paying jobs. Cutting taxes for the richest among us, while making life harder for Ohio’s working families. Maintaining their hold on power through partisan redistricting that will give some voters more of a say than others — despite Ohioans voting in favor of a fairer process. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Let's get to work, Team Cranley = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.** = = = = Paid for by the John Cranley Committee JOHN CRANLEY COMMITTEE 30 GARFIELD PLACE SUITE 900 CINCINNATI, OH 45202 United States Click here to

BEFORE NUNES AND JORDAN TAKE THE STAGE: = | = The GOP is pulling out all the stops -- they’re boasting MAGA crony Jim Jordan as a special guest, and charging as much as $2,500 to attend. Sadly, this event is a HUGE opportunity for Nunes to surge ahead in fundraising. So we need a surge of grassroots support right now to counter his dark money machine -- or else it might be too late to catch up. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Let's do this. \-- Team Arballo | Text UNITE to 25002 to receive special text message updates from our campaign! Message & data rates may apply. | Paid for by Arballo For Congress P.O. Box 3406, Fresno, CA 93650 www.philarballo.com Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. He's running for Congress in California's 22nd District against Devin Nunes -- a far-right, MAGA Republican who has turned his back on Central Valley families for two decades.
