name: Marcus Flowers
subject: I’m running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene -- will you join me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37533500/311511156/-1739877693?refcode=20211014_SA_MF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjAzZTQ3NC0wOTJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3Lbfpszl4bHA-DjP1snxvTxn8agB1mnu-jyfbVSv0BU=) Friend, My name is Marcus Flowers and I am an Army veteran running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore civility and common sense to our political discourse. As someone who spent a decade of my life serving in war zones, I’m sick of seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene and the other leaders of the alt-right hijack the phrase "patriotism" to serve their own vile beliefs. I know patriotism -- and the reality is they’re the farthest thing from it. **Through my work serving overseas on four continents, I’ve seen firsthand the damage done by radicalism, extremism, disinformation, lawlessness, and propaganda -- and after seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene bring her conspiracy theories and hatred to my home district? I knew I had to get in the race.** [**I’m asking you to split a donation between my campaign and Seth Moulton's Serve America PAC so we can stop the alt-right and Marjorie Taylor Greene:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37533501/311511157/-68044773?refcode=20211014_SA_MF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjAzZTQ3NC0wOTJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3Lbfpszl4bHA-DjP1snxvTxn8agB1mnu-jyfbVSv0BU=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37533502/311511158/-1739877693?refcode=20211014_SA_MF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjAzZTQ3NC0wOTJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3Lbfpszl4bHA-DjP1snxvTxn8agB1mnu-jyfbVSv0BU=)
Now, let’s not kid ourselves: the battle to unseat Greene and other Trump-Republicans like Glenn Youngkin will be difficult. She is the new darling of the Radical Right media machine -- and she’s backed by millions in special-interest money. But one thing I’ve learned throughout my career in service is that when the mission is this important, you have to stay focused. clean_body: | | | = Friend, My name is Marcus Flowers and I am an Army veteran running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore civility and common sense to our political discourse. As someone who spent a decade of my life serving in war zones, I’m sick of seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene and the other leaders of the alt-right hijack the phrase "patriotism" to serve their own vile beliefs. I know patriotism -- and the reality is they’re the farthest thing from it. Through my work serving overseas on four continents, I’ve seen firsthand the damage done by radicalism, extremism, disinformation, lawlessness, and propaganda -- and after seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene bring her conspiracy theories and hatred to my home district? I knew I had to get in the race. = = Now, let’s not kid ourselves: the battle to unseat Greene and other Trump-Republicans like Glenn Youngkin will be difficult. She is the new darling of the Radical Right media machine -- and she’s backed by millions in special-interest money. But one thing I’ve learned throughout my career in service is that when the mission is this important, you have to stay focused. = Together we can accomplish great things, Marcus Flowers = | | | | ---|---|---|--- If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | Paid for by Serve America PAC Serve America PAC PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

subject: Why I support the film and television workers strike
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EDDIE GELLER FOR CONGRESS
body:
One thing you should know about me: I’m a proud, card-carrying union member. Specifically, I belong to SAG-AFTRA, but we'll get to that another time. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37537027/311516137/810955667?refcode=fl_em_fr_20211014IATSE_EG_all_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWM0OTc5Ni0wZDJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m9Eml_A4tC9LzA4WJyj-KcCaL7Y5VDlkL_nEoNnQGUo=)

Hey friends,
One thing you should know about me: I’m a proud, card-carrying union member. Specifically, I belong to SAG-AFTRA, but we'll get to that another time.
**Because just yesterday, the IATSE — one of largest unions for workers in the film and television industry — announced that they’re going on strike on Monday if their demands aren’t met.**
I’m proud to stand with them now, [and I’d be even prouder to take my bona-fide union credentials to Congress to help ensure that every American has access to a union.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37537029/311516138/810955667?refcode=fl_em_fr_20211014IATSE_EG_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWM0OTc5Ni0wZDJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m9Eml_A4tC9LzA4WJyj-KcCaL7Y5VDlkL_nEoNnQGUo=)
One of America’s greatest exports to the world is the entertainment industry. Something we love so much — just think about how much we adore our movies and TV — is made possible because of the hard work of the people of IATSE. But even in a multi-billion dollar industry like film and TV, far too many workers lack reasonable and basic needs such as rest periods, meal breaks, a weekend, and living wages for even those at the bottom of the pay scale.
**IATSE’s strike shows _exactly_ why unions are so important: By standing together, workers have real power to fight for their basic needs. **
We need more unions in this country, not fewer. [_**It’s one of the reasons I got in this race, because our current representative is doing everything in his power to keep that from happening.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37537032/311516139/810955667?refcode=fl_em_fr_20211014IATSE_EG_all_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWM0OTc5Ni0wZDJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m9Eml_A4tC9LzA4WJyj-KcCaL7Y5VDlkL_nEoNnQGUo=)
Strengthening unions starts by passing the PRO Act, which expands protections for workers seeking to exercise their right to join a union. **Of course, since it’s a great idea that would provide real benefits to working people, Scott Franklin opposes it.**(Also, we need to repeal the Taft-Hartley Act which makes it harder for folks to join a union.)
[**__**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37537033/311516140/810955667?refcode=fl_em_fr_20211014IATSE_EG_all_xx_l4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWM0OTc5Ni0wZDJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m9Eml_A4tC9LzA4WJyj-KcCaL7Y5VDlkL_nEoNnQGUo=)

It’s not just IATSE, either. Unions with workers from John Deere and Kaiser Permanente are also going on strike this month if they don’t receive the benefits they’re asking for. That’s 90,000 workers right there! #Striketober is here. (For my bowling aficionados, you’ll note that an IATSE, John Deere, and Kaiser Permanente strike make a turkey.**)
**How many more strikes do we have to see before we realize that something is fundamentally wrong with our approach to labor in this country?**
It probably (definitely) has something to do with the pandemic and the alarming rise of income and wealth inequality in the past few decades , but something has to change. We have to shift power back into the hands of workers, away from corporate overlords who see dollars and cents instead of human beings.

name: Team Franchot
subject: Our diversity is our strength
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Hi Peter --
In case you missed it, Maryland has reached a groundbreaking demographic milestone: as of the 2020 Census, our state is now the most diverse state on the East Coast.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/hDwNGaiHdEyHnaURx4KcHA2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/hDwNGaiHdEyHnaURx4KcHA2]Peter Franchot believes that Marylanders deserve a government that reflects the incredible diversity of its people. That’s why as our next Governor, he’s going to take bold steps to make Diversity, Equity and Inclusion a foundational element of state government.
Under his administration, he’ll make sure that ALL of Maryland’s communities have a seat at the table. He's going to create a cabinet-level position focused on promoting diversity within state government and developing policies that promote economic relief for communities that have been structurally denied opportunity -- such as addressing the ongoing effects of redlining, which has prevented far too many Black Marylanders from building wealth through housing.
The simple truth is that when diverse perspectives are leveraged in policymaking, better outcomes and policies are achieved for all of our communities. Peter Franchot will remake state government along the lines of the diverse communities it represents. This doesn’t just mean inclusion for all races, genders, and sexual identities -- it also means inclusion of Marylanders from ALL counties, as well as urban, suburban, and rural communities.
We draw strength from our diversity, and recognizing that fact is more important than ever before. If you agree that the next Governor needs to ensure that state government represents and empowers Maryland’s many diverse communities, then we want to know that you’re standing with us. Click here to sign our petition saying that the next Governor of Maryland needs to promote diversity and inclusion within state government. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/hDwNGaiHdEyHnaURx4KcHA2]
Thank you,
Team Franchot
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot?refcode=em101421]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/9d09da66-4725-ec11-981f-501ac510a405/fd788928-102d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDc4ODkyOC0xMDJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6g9slyrrjS2V7wM19Q0DtUDwMs8WEW3tz90m4adEmDA=&id=136194660 .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

**Good judgment. Courage. Decency.**
Crew, I remain very concerned for our nation. Leadership has been replaced with blatant party politics. GOP politicians, in particular, are racing to the fringes of the far right. Legislation is stagnated. The future is in doubt. We need proven leadership in the Senate.
**And that's why I'm proud to announce the launch of my campaign to continue my lengthy service by representing Iowa in the United States Senate.**
[It won't be easy. But I wouldn't be running if I didn't know that we can win this race. Here’s your opportunity to be a founding donor to our campaign.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xnpPS9ElAtCH4oZLR7595Zq09gnDzcRbJCOrFmiHYHnjglxkrrsFzhU9svWvmQSA1Z1f20fLl5-elLPhon7r26wjYMSnDefW7Jwgop07pPAX6yjE87mgwAar6LOBM7QaqdwYvxE6XM9JdhQZ6KKR73jA18Sg_oMzVPOfS-fv079JnEXN-B2lGM5l8fnwpVb3Rm-QjS1ZgzdAqWrUFehzX1waxW0uz--21JPMTesVmezSoSq0KRwLZGKY1NZZY__fD0k3fxDa3WJ-00c5MP7s_Axjo6P4EhZQUtTchLePbGcySWoBxyd37v8AeDEZssoVKb6AtHCEltaot4wKoU6MhbB8qUEX7mYj0flc8_mzvm3PmssTL9kaXF8CYs5LJeGX4/3g5/gbHHZQHoRWqVdMyBG6wbRw/h1/T_l8oxG3LXLZ0fwvHZHu3IxuXwyU3chY3nRdBOJGuSw)

As a son of rural Iowa, and a proud one, I'm honored to be a part of this race. My mother, Ruth, was a one-room schoolhouse teacher. My dad, Big Joe, worked on farm equipment and trucks in Lebanon Farm Shop. Life in western Sioux County consisted of work, school, sports, and church. Life was good.
When military service called, I thought it’d be a short hitch. It wasn’t. Successive challenges, from the Cold War to the twenty years since 9/11, kept me engaged and committed in such diverse scenarios as responding to infectious outbreaks in Africa to commanding ships in a combat theater. Military service provided me with a lifetime of leadership.
A big part of leadership is doing what’s right. For instance, in 2002, during deliberations on the invasion of Iraq, I cast the sole ‘no’ vote on the planning committee. It was a bad idea to invade Iraq then and it didn’t get better with time. I was one of the junior officers at the table and under pressure to “go along.” But for me it remains one of those decisions that stand out.
As my mom would say, “Do what’s right; do what your head and heart tell you, and do not give up.”
★ ★ ★ Well, I won’t give up.
Iowans deserve a leader who will speak truth to power. They deserve a Senator who will represent every Iowan and use leadership to help heal the divisiveness between us.
---
In the months to come, I will be asking you for the funding needed to represent you as that Senator. I have some catching up to do so I need you to take on this big ask: [Can you support our campaign as a founding donor today? As a retired Admiral, I’m a hard target for the GOP hit men, but it doesn’t mean they won’t try. Please help me combat the onslaught of dark money in this race. Your grassroots support will make all the difference. ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xnpPS9ElAtCH4oZLR7595Zq09gnDzcRbJCOrFmiHYHnjglxkrrsFzhU9svWvmQSA1Z1f20fLl5-elLPhon7r26Da6eoNboWEKeCGgqIvVjW0Emwwfbu6l7dnmC9PlcxHjOuTmywbSTjeRdyt60whPa7sPj7UMwu-RvAOumdDNIPNoiX6XfB5Y_pg1E6nG4wALvtgXMhgePuKKl6RVPGIz7r4Ck1ivMRTLHgu48admZunphqCrb9ar2lYHolONYhgKZT1nlK1e7WGqYiLhgyVmJWnsx0NqkoTevauYWatsFO05a893FP_MWlv1rsVXSaYumFjLmpn1hu3m9_UaIHSqKwmgC4s5WhfAJY0rGlPn-uJCJqaezvyuiIU4tnJcXHr8/3g5/gbHHZQHoRWqVdMyBG6wbRw/h6/UfifxW98lMSxFOFnhIHgbGAFuvFX5kEibwlbBN-DtIM)

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: Why I support the Build Back Better Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37539904/311520779/-2037180865?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDc5ODkyOC0xMDJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U051bpr_4-1fBGGqwsyh1v5fd2nFhKSFpFQMSk7jgyo=&emci=cfbb55b4-512c-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=24798928-102d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=12898431)
---
Hello friend,
I won't sugar coat it, we all know these are challenging times for Arizona. Record drought has caused a horrendous wildfire season, scorching temperatures, and record heat waves from Phoenix to Tucson. **This starts with President Biden's Build Back Better Act.**
The Build Back Better Act provides critical investments in clean energy that will help reduce carbon emissions, create thousands of good-paying jobs, and deliver much-needed returns for our economy.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37539906/311520782/41694283?refcode=X_101421_Infrastructure&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDc5ODkyOC0xMDJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U051bpr_4-1fBGGqwsyh1v5fd2nFhKSFpFQMSk7jgyo=)
This is our moment to prove to the American people that the government works for everyone – not just those at the top.
In addition to providing critical investments in clean energy, **the Build Back Better Act will also help lower the price of healthcare in our country and expand the child care tax credit.**
With your support, I will work hard in Congress to pass critical policies like President Biden's Build Back Better Act that prioritize the needs of everyday Arizonans.
Together, we can make significant investments in our communities, environment, and economy to build back better for everyone.
Thank you for all that you do to make our campaign a success,
Kirsten

clean_body: Hello friend, I won't sugar coat it, we all know these are challenging times for Arizona. Record drought has caused a horrendous wildfire season, scorching temperatures, and record heat waves from Phoenix to Tucson. This starts with President Biden's Build Back Better Act. The Build Back Better Act provides critical investments in clean energy that will help reduce carbon emissions, create thousands of good-paying jobs, and deliver much-needed returns for our economy. = This is our moment to prove to the American people that the government works for everyone – not just those at the top. In addition to providing critical investments in clean energy, the Build Back Better Act will also help lower the price of healthcare in our country and expand the child care tax credit. With your support, I will work hard in Congress to pass critical policies like President Biden's Build Back Better Act that prioritize the needs of everyday Arizonans. Together, we can make significant investments in our communities, environment, and economy to build back better for everyone. Thank you for all that you do to make our campaign a success, Kirsten | = = Paid for by Engel for Arizona Engel for Arizona PO Box 40721 Tucson, AZ 85717 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please._

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Here’s the truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Derek, I’m very proud of the progress we’ve made over the past year, but there’s still so much more work to be done. The truth is that we have a once-in-a-generation opportunity to bring about real change for the American people, and we need to bring our party together to make it happen. Now. We need to abolish the filibuster and expand Medicare, invest in families, workers, climate action, and infrastructure. But Washington is at a stalemate. Here’s why: We ended Mitch McConnell’s Senate majority in a literal sense – but he still has a death grip on the Senate. And, apart from certain rare circumstances, that will be true until we can abolish the filibuster. Let’s face it, as one Republican colleague in the House admitted in an unguarded moment, their whole plan is to cause chaos and gridlock for the next eighteen months. Never mind what it does to the country, they think it's good politics. It isn’t. Just the same old cynicism. That is why I'm doing everything in my power to elect more Democrats to the House and Senate — especially candidates who champion our priorities on climate, health care, child care, housing, and abolishing the filibuster. **If you’re with me, pitch in $10 or $25 right now to help protect and expand our slim Democratic majorities next November. We need to finish the work we started after Trump’s election to protect our democracy, save our planet, and make the economy work for every American.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37539765/311520598/-827659615?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20211014_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTlkMzI5ZC0wZjJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C1zW2aLrcmwv3DHE4ZmOePz6fYtGjTUqRXtQV5t3Xok=)

body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| ICYMI: President Trump's Pollster Says MAGA Champion Eric Greitens Holds 30 Point Lead in Missouri Senate Race
---
| As reported by the [Washington Examiner,](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MhNrLQkcLgdCCvIxGW1XIdNPr3VwLagCkUD9XidFV6gpfLHCDvbFXkQ8jnROQJy-rJ71dTyAHBMA0R99s-y8z5drCNae-82k5ROd6CnB8_0TbijfVdfU3ElZKVnhv1i3eFafpoy5d_Fn_v8OGaDfLmglKAC7B7FjO_CdKoX9i0zbZl0qIdtDnKA5V7dSdr93fa79ixBJTa2guZntnVvrrYDtNiKp_X8DlCkE9DsCvMkubmaqZ_K2dqElkDHoagpnChJnDep1GorTmXx_imaiXQ==&c=7VNs_4gEMnTwipoxRgAvdIvKg0Lrm21MzvopMiMnghhCYYPVLZkcWg==&ch=eKvQkYTyMn5LmZgUin2fcIBIKIpaqBSdcp8QdwxpGz3H2rjtPLPUcg==) President Trump's pollster finds MAGA champion and former Missouri Governor Eric Greitens holds a massive lead in the 2022 GOP primary for the US Senate-- a lead which increases when voters are told of his vow to vote against reelecting Mitch McConnell as Republican leader.
[BREITBART: Senate Hopeful Eric Greitens Leads GOP Primary by Double Digits -- Gains Support with Anti-McConnell Stance](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MhNrLQkcLgdCCvIxGW1XIdNPr3VwLagCkUD9XidFV6gpfLHCDvbFXkQ8jnROQJy-ARCI1dO0AtErFsZqsNiVSuXK0pMzbRgjadGHAxKHUDhEXwd-CmLB1wlP3TtWqwW7-KGe5WCQucxJHsUs80o9cbsjhJIkMU1T8-yZZwalCmLDVxeHd52Oigy-2hb-o1ZwwLA_8u8QGVZVlex3yvwUEa75GMD51AhBKdVFHZcxXZ6EDOuL2PcBU9y5dUEqCabkRqg6WBrLPcWPY3JEua2pgGPlGbeYHmIk58bUR60MRgJojLVrzTJwLiQZrYuPcKQw-eMQ_oi-rHM=&c=7VNs_4gEMnTwipoxRgAvdIvKg0Lrm21MzvopMiMnghhCYYPVLZkcWg==&ch=eKvQkYTyMn5LmZgUin2fcIBIKIpaqBSdcp8QdwxpGz3H2rjtPLPUcg==)
New [Fabrizio, Lee & Associates ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MhNrLQkcLgdCCvIxGW1XIdNPr3VwLagCkUD9XidFV6gpfLHCDvbFXkQ8jnROQJy-DZSrPVBemr-ADzFKiFBcClW-PAHMssnPY-AgA65AKo_-ND-UXW3MvG7WfRhIvkSUtYdsiggO3r2aZjZoyi8AIg==&c=7VNs_4gEMnTwipoxRgAvdIvKg0Lrm21MzvopMiMnghhCYYPVLZkcWg==&ch=eKvQkYTyMn5LmZgUin2fcIBIKIpaqBSdcp8QdwxpGz3H2rjtPLPUcg==)polling shows Governor Greitens leading his Republican challengers in the 2022 race by double digits. He currently has 36% support in the race, and leads his nearest opponent by 19 points.
As reported by [Just The News](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MhNrLQkcLgdCCvIxGW1XIdNPr3VwLagCkUD9XidFV6gpfLHCDvbFXo4J6LgEbuaMPBYP6ssCNY6JRTakSo9hRzdYToMV8dw2J22oV5tHhsp_XbbGRL8SFZS5OSppJjRv_WNBSx-pwWQKgGCO-IRypdP9cWSr0fq34LrTxdVNcGrsOhM_cknt7fCqlV8xfMc94YKDcVKLKahEUTSPjwbmzz3F0-VYr1s5z6dEyIxNdE_Brd5ibbhh0YG1NVyxYWR_x08BlPj-p2gdYRAMieSjow==&c=7VNs_4gEMnTwipoxRgAvdIvKg0Lrm21MzvopMiMnghhCYYPVLZkcWg==&ch=eKvQkYTyMn5LmZgUin2fcIBIKIpaqBSdcp8QdwxpGz3H2rjtPLPUcg==), Governor Greitens' lead expands further when voters are told of his pledge to remove McConnell as Republican leader in the Senate, jumping from 36 percent support to 44 percent support-- extending Governor Greitens' lead from 19 points to 30 points.
On Wednesday, The Gateway Pundit published an article headlined, [NO MORE RINOS: Pro-Trump Candidate Eric Greitens Takes Commanding Lead in Missouri Senate Race](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MhNrLQkcLgdCCvIxGW1XIdNPr3VwLagCkUD9XidFV6gpfLHCDvbFXo4J6LgEbuaMUEtercru2QhLPUUU1wK2DW450LJYUXTjhkf-Vm04Obs3nVT22-SeADfWLSvCBJvmsz9Fa_6o58f8RAA5IcxpJRK94nyLbsMIM4x77SjPJ8vrOaMXO3BrUcrU-CP42HubbgC74-NAn9VPCau098USNe8Sxuhv85in0qnZ7laW3Un6KT5esrAEIbJ2hPyG87XRVHJpdg-9BbQnr3howQ8hw_Blyc2jFMGb&c=7VNs_4gEMnTwipoxRgAvdIvKg0Lrm21MzvopMiMnghhCYYPVLZkcWg==&ch=eKvQkYTyMn5LmZgUin2fcIBIKIpaqBSdcp8QdwxpGz3H2rjtPLPUcg==).
"Eric Greitens understands what the people want and the retired Navy SEAL is no wallflower. He is just what is needed today in the US Senate. he understands what the voters want," writes the Gateway Pundit.
[JUST THE NEWS: Greitens Up Double Digits in Missouri GOP Senate Primary, Aided by Opposition to McConnell, Poll](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MhNrLQkcLgdCCvIxGW1XIdNPr3VwLagCkUD9XidFV6gpfLHCDvbFXo4J6LgEbuaMPBYP6ssCNY6JRTakSo9hRzdYToMV8dw2J22oV5tHhsp_XbbGRL8SFZS5OSppJjRv_WNBSx-pwWQKgGCO-IRypdP9cWSr0fq34LrTxdVNcGrsOhM_cknt7fCqlV8xfMc94YKDcVKLKahEUTSPjwbmzz3F0-VYr1s5z6dEyIxNdE_Brd5ibbhh0YG1NVyxYWR_x08BlPj-p2gdYRAMieSjow==&c=7VNs_4gEMnTwipoxRgAvdIvKg0Lrm21MzvopMiMnghhCYYPVLZkcWg==&ch=eKvQkYTyMn5LmZgUin2fcIBIKIpaqBSdcp8QdwxpGz3H2rjtPLPUcg==)
On War Room: Pandemic, Steve Bannon praised Governor Greitens for his courage to commit to voting against Mitch McConnell as the GOP Senate Leader.
"Churchill told us that courage is the most important of all virtues, because it's upon courage that all other virtues rest. One man or one woman can make a change. Everybody in Washington, D.C. said 'the first person that comes out against Mitch McConnell is dead man walking. Now, that poll number is all people are talking about this afternoon. Look at what Greitens is doing with MAGA voters in Missouri-- they can't get enough of a guy standing up and supporting the MAGA movement," said Bannon.

He currently has 36% support in the race, and leads his nearest opponent by 19 points. As reported by ==, Governor Greitens' lead expands further when voters are told of his pledge to remove McConnell as Republican leader in the Senate, jumping from 36 percent support to 44 percent support-- extending Governor Greitens' lead from 19 points to 30 points. On Wednesday, The Gateway Pundit published an article headlined, ==. "Eric Greitens understands what the people want and the retired Navy SEAL is no wallflower. He is just what is needed today in the US Senate. he understands what the voters want," writes the Gateway Pundit. == On War Room: Pandemic, Steve Bannon praised Governor Greitens for his courage to commit to voting against Mitch McConnell as the GOP Senate Leader. "Churchill told us that courage is the most important of all virtues, because it's upon courage that all other virtues rest. One man or one woman can make a change. Look at what Greitens is doing with MAGA voters in Missouri-- they can't get enough of a guy standing up and supporting the MAGA movement," said Bannon. name: ICYMI News
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re lo
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhql1gjm3igortvp727r85suffr6goq8najlvtdo_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9j60o76c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zagadm1fntkvf7b3l2quihf5vcfl529v1vt4s000_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9j60o76c5h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcj6uasa64r1vcmsd15stm2m1p3mkv7u1lmj85po_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9j60o76c5h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

body:
This is a huge step forward for our campaign
#

Exciting news, friends —
Iconic changemaker Gloria Steinem just endorsed Malcolm’s campaign for U.S. Senate!
This is a huge step forward for our campaign — and now that Gloria Steinem is officially part of our growing coalition for Pennsylvania’s working people, we’re aiming for a BIG fundraising day today.
That’s why we need to ask:
[Can you make a $3 contribution to stand with Malcolm today? We’re counting on a lot of folks making small donations to fuel our campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37541206/311526591/-360183459?refcode2=20c0832e-142d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&refcode=em211014-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGMwODMyZS0xNDJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HiYsDFeNmafE6PriPxS3zJZuFpb7AyoOwVEBeFA7cU8=)

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37541208/311526593/-360183459?refcode2=20c0832e-142d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&refcode=em211014-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGMwODMyZS0xNDJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HiYsDFeNmafE6PriPxS3zJZuFpb7AyoOwVEBeFA7cU8=)**
We're thrilled to have the endorsement of renowned writer and activist Gloria Steinem. Here's what she said about Malcolm and what's at stake in our race:
**"It’s time for new activists to represent the breadth of American interests in the U.S. Senate, and I believe that Malcolm Kenyatta will be a welcome change from the status quo in Washington.**
"We need people who represent the full spectrum of the American experience... Malcolm Kenyatta has a perspective that is sorely missing in the Senate, including as a young, gay, Black, and working-class American."
The reason our campaign is gaining so much momentum is because of supporters like you. Thank you.
But the truth is that this is going to be a very long, expensive primary — and we’re up against some wealthy, self-funded opponents.
So the path forward will not be easy, but this will be one of the most-watched Senate races in the country, and we can't afford to slow down.
If we're going to nominate Malcolm Kenyatta as the candidate to flip Pennsylvania blue, it's going to require all of us staying involved.
[So please: If you’re able, make a $3 contribution to Malcolm’s campaign today. Our campaign is funded by working folks, so every donation makes a big impact on our long-term success.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37541209/311526594/-360183459?refcode2=20c0832e-142d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&refcode=em211014-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGMwODMyZS0xNDJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HiYsDFeNmafE6PriPxS3zJZuFpb7AyoOwVEBeFA7cU8=)
Thank you for being a part of this campaign. Everything we're able to accomplish will be made possible by people like you.
\- Team Malcolm

But if we let Glenn Youngkin win this race in 2021, all that work will have been for nothing — because that will be all Trump needs to launch his 2024 re-election bid. =** Thank you, Team Terry = Terry for VA PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. clean_body: The Democrats don’t think parents should have any say... | In North Carolina, Virginia, and countless other states, far-left activists in the teachers unions are using public schools indoctrinate children and change America. When muster the courage to attend public meetings and ask hard questions, Democrats are telling them that they have no role in shaping the public school curriculum. If you care about childrens’ education and the future of America, we need to hear from you right away. | Where do you stand, Peter? | | | The Democrats are not on your side, Peter. If we’re not careful, the Left is going to transform our children and “change America” -- and use our tax dollars to do it! Thank you. Republican Action Alerts Sent via North Carolina Republican Party

name: Tom Fitton
subject: A Critical Point in our Nation’s History
body:
Judicial Watch continues to exert a powerful and positive impact against public corruption and unlawful government secrecy

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Today, at this critical point in our nation's history, Judicial Watch is carrying out our largest caseload in our history and making an important impact for the rule of law, including:
* **_Achieving_** important progress **fighting for honest elections** (we are now pursuing lawsuits in _four states_ related to their failure to clean their voter rolls) _and our lawyers are now reviewing new federal data to help determine if more lawsuits are needed_ ;

* **_Uncovering_** critically important information through our investigations and litigation to expose the **use of taxpayer dollars to indoctrinate American public-school children with hateful, racist and Marxist "Critical Race Theory" propaganda**;

* **_Exposing_ Big Tech and Big Government** efforts to silence conservatives...which is **an assault on _all Americans '_ First Amendment free speech rights; **

* **_Prosecuting_** many active lawsuits on a host of other issues critical to **protecting our constitutional republic;**

* **_Filing_ record numbers of Freedom of Information Act (FOIA)** requests to find out **what our government is up to** ; and

* **Persistently****holding to account corrupt politicians (including Joe Biden) in both parties**.

That's why **_[I hope you will make your best donation today to Judicial Watch](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56867&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTEwMTQxNDAzMjI=)_** as we fight for the American people's right to know...
... ranging from exposing censorship of conservative speech and taxpayer funding of Critical Race Theory propaganda; to suing states that violate federal election law; to challenging illegal alien sanctuary policies in court; to uncovering bipartisan corruption in Congress and in the Executive Branch.
**_[With your help now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56867&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTEwMTQxNDAzMjI=) you can be assured that Judicial Watch will not let up on any single one of our lawsuits or investigations_!**
Clearly, our country is in a rule of law of crisis. And I cannot imagine where this nation would be if not for Judicial Watch. **_[Thank you for your support](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56867&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTEwMTQxNDAzMjI=)_**!
Sincerely,
Tom Fitton President

name: Trump News HQ
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zumq1if5abd8lqndtkne6alitq30g3ccfgeos6a8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9j62ob4clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkhghk7jcj72glpj3chsjjlqq0pkp26977bddt58_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9j62ob4clh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zla2i2g3kf0l9d514cooqlvfa910jpcgroq95tv0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9j62ob4clh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
Trump Train News

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to unsubscribe](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfm75nhqi37s93tjgu5b943jvhk3dnoo373rd5k8_)

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zeat2fvjg136qoa8ruduj7t32a6lfq980tigtn98_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9j62ob4clh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;” Reaching over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Trump Train News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

| | | We are so proud to see our campaign [recognized in the press](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=1777a26d7a&e=3f8e2ea1e3) again – and couldn't ask for a better title than "Deja the Disruptor."

_**City & State PA says:**_

_"Philly’s Deja Alvarez could disrupt the status quo in Harrisburg in a big way. Not only would she bring a rare public health background to Harrisburg at a time when the state is still trying to crawl its way out of a pandemic, but she would also be the first transgender Latina Pennsylvanian ever elected to the General Assembly.

If her campaign for the State House’s 182nd District proves successful, Alvarez plans to bring a fresh voice and new perspectives to a legislative body that, she says, is in desperate need of a new outlook on how to craft policy."_
---
| [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=b1982e25d7&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
| **_NBC News says:_**

_"Only .19% of US elected officials are LGBTQ, despite the community making up more than 5.5% of the population.

More than 28000 LGBTQ people must be elected to achieve full representation in local, state, and federal government. A key race in the Keystone state is hoping to put a big dent in that stark statistic."_

**[Will you help me shake things up in Harrisburg?](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=aa52af6312&e=3f8e2ea1e3)**

In May of 2022, we have an opportunity to continue to grow representation in our legislative body in Harrisburg that closely reflects the needs, interests, and diversity of the 182nd District. Join us as we get the work done. [www.dejaforpa.com](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=c4b73cacad&e=3f8e2ea1e3)_

body:
Did you know that In 2021, members of Congress with a military background only account for one in six members?For six years, I hunted the Benghazi terrorists. Then we elected Joe Biden, I quit my job to hold politicians accountable. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.johncastorani.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_s=4bd957c7b8934b7e9d149072d145df76&_t=KPQy2ztA-SZcCmDa635HXnxr3212KHcQk44rmD5GP8EThBAp8ouxkPIHbvPf23j6lQX0eCYUCWOMuxM8fnwO6aAF0OQtxUn5zT3RAoW-cz0q0sc0ODxki4x5L9XH8m2shySTVrpRjNt_f6_u1hq_0X7-G-pFTNR5EVIxMV4ddDA%3D) | [](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=4bd957c7b8934b7e9d149072d145df76&_e=iT7pbKvR-c6B6MgAUbRhMdmbceyQ8vJ8mTw8H-2QGMB-uFQl0fo2jmv3we1Hsz6RgycLujR0n2JOzRzlvbHorkQ6jcz70xRkEqtP2o_fHyp81a1uV_ygVUckGmsgUkZEPqlJZ2wifVMa2hVwtc2ctg3di_iW6LRlzBY5PJfizJdCB7gndgq75WY2YiWnhjcQH1lld2sebqHPyMrvA6l1bHxMKuz5k4-oEE3oaQTyb8S7lnTGnG-XW4XgiPw2MwpK2DMekowmE4AizV4MQbYVnn7JuS5Wvw-IvhdJPHnTRZkxjAFhaFo4gcMXiTCpoz5NZhrCXi3V38d-_2yeXBwPwwAQzODXKTJUKiG0fPHkj3Mm6od4JDFJiKNmKKPvYTIBofh4Ve4AgW3ZNjSpLo9ebQRdzKrjwe9CjhthN6wyrVpb80ij_oM-dyvkgwyKMGI6a39AzwnF4KZMue4bdNqTvpYKOUfJTpsx8adxEVRCbE52bsycdEkqvapRVjjxXiEa9dh-jN_BNHniOytXLiBqcA1jseLv2GO3ocVhFy2NQQS2iOJwrsFm_MywTIFLIYMmglzo2pOOAEjCPQsW3pFFh-aJW49K3KF89PDLcP6ouiuL5ZEUmz6MKo08SuHnwzbS69fmKILrReJS7sRfAPBmLQ%3D%3D)
---

According to the _Military Times_ , in 1973, "nearly **three in every four** members of Congress had some type of military service." In 2021, that number has dropped to **one in every six** members.

Fellow Conservative,

If I know one thing it’s that you are likely on the receiving end of hundreds, if not thousands of emails every day. I appreciate you opening mine. Would you please take a few moments to scan the contents of this email and take my brief survey re: veterans serving in Congress? **I gave up my career in military intelligence to run for public office, so[you’d be doing me a huge favor by sparing 30 seconds or so right now](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=4bd957c7b8934b7e9d149072d145df76&_e=iT7pbKvR-c6B6MgAUbRhMdmbceyQ8vJ8mTw8H-2QGMB-uFQl0fo2jmv3we1Hsz6RgycLujR0n2JOzRzlvbHorkQ6jcz70xRkEqtP2o_fHyp81a1uV_ygVUckGmsgUkZEPqlJZ2wifVMa2hVwtc2ctg3di_iW6LRlzBY5PJfizJdCB7gndgq75WY2YiWnhjcQH1lld2sebqHPyMrvA6l1bHxMKuz5k4-oEE3oaQTyb8S7lnTGnG-XW4XgiPw2MwpK2DMekowmE4AizV4MQbYVnn7JuS5Wvw-IvhdJPHnTRZkxjAFhaFo4gcMXiTCpoz5NZhrCXi3V38d-_2yeXBwPwwAQzODXKTJUKiG0fPHkj3Mm6od4JDFJiKNmKKPvYTIBofh4Ve4AgW3ZNjSpLo9ebQRdzKrjwe9CjhthN6wyrVqGuYEiRyqtRHi9XUNou3MxoJ4S-4EyAEpP4bLnZCw4ZWl939BsQmLDHA_b6sPrjIC_21mXhhlFQIyEEG2O8tYio-0eNuQ38kjUcfocloftQ_ZkIP-yYZqsaLbSXNMvuIiJ6svIGpB_c3wHXVX6qThKxvAu1xLWFRPIDvhr-M69jtw_Did5qg7z-JFqecPtrR8QxNaz_iL1pK-VsndnwQTSIhmLUVlouERcrjr467Q44g%3D%3D)**.

Whether or not you agree with the overarching mission active-duty military members participate in, I think that we can all agree that **it’s hard to disrespect a member of the military community or a veteran of the United States Armed Forces**.

[](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=4bd957c7b8934b7e9d149072d145df76&_e=iT7pbKvR-c6B6MgAUbRhMSPqY5pANCRbO5wafPrKEvMqyJR8HEIDvk4G3sr5isqL-FktZzOQ5vX2qngPQzst3UFEYOwJ3kT40f-U0T6iRJCAcq9BiBzafTp-3sVOatVRDhI0KBT4ktTD1O70u18BdhsTremf94ar1IPBwcKwHdwhbm-sZuoeLGQePUukb96h5r2ektbRvrkMryy8IonE4LvD7X3MjvHNHNFaAFv0G8EJn4sIdWXdH1glBn2FsmSUdbxI1Kx4DjjIY9N05Flj1pzqCXUfIOvtrdF4TmihSC0QlijVlKKSFry6-0rp1TRDkbzrQ6LSiUePvcBFNg3nb6f83fe9be123WWf7SyX9timCjFE8kkooDdTg6WSunvePPsJRMWWceXemDVf9vDPyXM9o1IuEmPNX-JWnVXvfjWXhOwMKEFyhgFwqqBkqQhfCLHNio8475eRmRvEGaPCzwCV-h4KsygzFgIEciSBtws%3D)

My name is John Castorani and for 9 years I served within the **Army’s Special Operations Command** , proudly representing the United States at home and around the globe. Perhaps you’ve opened up an email that I’ve sent prior to today. If that’s the case, then you may know that I’ve devoted my life to serving our nation – at home and on foreign battlefields.

| [**IN YOUR OPINION
DO WE NEED MORE VETERANS IN CONGRESS?** **››**](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=4bd957c7b8934b7e9d149072d145df76&_e=iT7pbKvR-c6B6MgAUbRhMdmbceyQ8vJ8mTw8H-2QGMB-uFQl0fo2jmv3we1Hsz6RgycLujR0n2JOzRzlvbHorkQ6jcz70xRkEqtP2o_fHyp81a1uV_ygVUckGmsgUkZEPqlJZ2wifVMa2hVwtc2ctg3di_iW6LRlzBY5PJfizJdCB7gndgq75WY2YiWnhjcQH1lld2sebqHPyMrvA6l1bHxMKuz5k4-oEE3oaQTyb8S7lnTGnG-XW4XgiPw2MwpK2DMekowmE4AizV4MQbYVnn7JuS5Wvw-IvhdJPHnTRZkxjAFhaFo4gcMXiTCpoz5NZhrCXi3V38d-_2yeXBwPwwAQzODXKTJUKiG0fPHkj3Mm6od4JDFJiKNmKKPvYTIBofh4Ve4AgW3ZNjSpLo9ebQRdzKrjwe9CjhthN6wyrVr7Ue-mF8Ma48Mtir8svYzqLFDwsrcMtb8nMcwylxDOzVWUi80cJmPE1BY_wwT95c7p44ee_j376D0QeBGdmcaBzwYRq2KsOrTEul3GUtMDW8UkrZrJMh28vTnJ-PBcz4XDbyvGG68WEJ_3p6SO_5rWb2BilVelu9zBm2HyrN4QU-tt9gwymH7WQzkX00KEYYwj0uTy6d_L-UwU87jzq4GEEum39Aj96kaB6k4htqvVDA%3D%3D)
---

**For six years, I hunted the radical Islamic terrorists who attacked our outpost in Benghazi, Libya. Along with fellow Special Operators service members, I helped hold the people who killed an American ambassador accountable**. One could say that we cleaned up the mess Hillary Clinton created when she refused to take the infamous 4 a.m. call on September 11th, 2012.

I know from first-hand experience fighting Islamic State, al Qaeda and other extremist elements that American military personnel are among the most agile and strategic-minded people around. So **why there are only 38 combat veterans currently serving in Congress – the lowest number since WWII?**

I find this alarming. It used to be the case that serving in the military was a prerequisite for those seeking public office.

**I’m curious to know if you share the opinion that Republicans must do more to ensure we’re putting resources behind men and women who have served old glory in the armed forces as they seek election to Congress.**

[**Will you let me know by taking a quick 3 question survey right now?**](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=4bd957c7b8934b7e9d149072d145df76&_e=iT7pbKvR-c6B6MgAUbRhMdmbceyQ8vJ8mTw8H-2QGMB-uFQl0fo2jmv3we1Hsz6RgycLujR0n2JOzRzlvbHorkQ6jcz70xRkEqtP2o_fHyp81a1uV_ygVUckGmsgUkZEPqlJZ2wifVMa2hVwtc2ctg3di_iW6LRlzBY5PJfizJdCB7gndgq75WY2YiWnhjcQH1lld2sebqHPyMrvA6l1bHxMKuz5k4-oEE3oaQTyb8S7lnTGnG-XW4XgiPw2MwpK2DMekowmE4AizV4MQbYVnn7JuS5Wvw-IvhdJPHnTRZkxjAFhaFo4gcMXiTCpoz5NZhrCXi3V38d-_2yeXBwPwwAQzODXKTJUKiG0fPHkj3Mm6od4JDFJiKNmKKPvYTIBofh4Ve4AgW3ZNjSpLo9ebQRdzKrjwe9CjhthN6wyrVrDTXKNWYQF0Fe_g7SCBhleHsfZKkYg-1kjLeDWFI00KRrNAIVZTQxRfsJj8d5s0GIbbB6-M8DuXbitMnUb4qV7BOKhBcABHcYvKNQRDxt4Z4bcwc9LTtPfl5rzt1LdrTTlNhuP6MBi0p6jJ5X-BsaNalA7QBhr7I1m5f9VeGWbAJOdzpIQ6BqAHFEGVr3RTBA2kkTx7TY08jxNp55kTyEbT4nKwV33tpss9gqAzW7gsA%3D%3D)

[**IN YOUR OPINION
DO WE NEED MORE VETERANS IN CONGRESS** **››**](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=4bd957c7b8934b7e9d149072d145df76&_e=iT7pbKvR-c6B6MgAUbRhMdmbceyQ8vJ8mTw8H-2QGMB-uFQl0fo2jmv3we1Hsz6RgycLujR0n2JOzRzlvbHorkQ6jcz70xRkEqtP2o_fHyp81a1uV_ygVUckGmsgUkZEPqlJZ2wifVMa2hVwtc2ctg3di_iW6LRlzBY5PJfizJdCB7gndgq75WY2YiWnhjcQH1lld2sebqHPyMrvA6l1bHxMKuz5k4-oEE3oaQTyb8S7lnTGnG-XW4XgiPw2MwpK2DMekowmE4AizV4MQbYVnn7JuS5Wvw-IvhdJPHnTRZkxjAFhaFo4gcMXiTCpoz5NZhrCXi3V38d-_2yeXBwPwwAQzODXKTJUKiG0fPHkj3Mm6od4JDFJiKNmKKPvYTIBofh4Ve4AgW3ZNjSpLo9ebQRdzKrjwe9CjhthN6wyrVqxmithVGiN6go-pFLC9ymdcvDZPYaUG2u6gA1axoN6j2dt-USr7Ly4tND40jOxk4-G8quQ92rHJNKzYo1j4s1HGlO3YvUJnh9rymhbDAFgoBVg45PSwNQdeAIyy_lASNVbhxgA4tf5PYRV_3VJoSWMuk0QLYHnj4j1wC_WDgNosCOLebjJF6EXObe3sVlT5PybyZjUdvfKoaANhgm6hEgYqkUYO9J2nMR3vdOoTkNSlg%3D%3D)
---

**Veterans know how to get things done. Give us a mission and a timeline and we’ll see anything through to the end.**

Veterans make the best members of Congress not only because they’ve served in our armed forces, rather because in the armed forces vets learn that regardless of your creed, ethnicity, race or religion, in the military it’s essential to come together and accomplish the mission... it’s the oath every veteran swore to uphold to our Constitution - in order to form a more perfect union.

[](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=4bd957c7b8934b7e9d149072d145df76&_e=iT7pbKvR-c6B6MgAUbRhMSPqY5pANCRbO5wafPrKEvMqyJR8HEIDvk4G3sr5isqL-FktZzOQ5vX2qngPQzst3UFEYOwJ3kT40f-U0T6iRJCAcq9BiBzafTp-3sVOatVRDhI0KBT4ktTD1O70u18BdhsTremf94ar1IPBwcKwHdwhbm-sZuoeLGQePUukb96h5r2ektbRvrkMryy8IonE4LvD7X3MjvHNHNFaAFv0G8EJn4sIdWXdH1glBn2FsmSUdbxI1Kx4DjjIY9N05Flj1nlhp8uE42TGzfoFrJgxgGSUN4e2SkXG3lZXGh-BneMEgXkHXrjPIrHq4_R4dVYJ8Qalee0qPuqkFuD1k54zuqS2MxXcymVjUZAlA3vhg14B1KGw6UWKmoOSTOX5oO-6K2dUWAwbC8iQNeDGInJLoDK1xv1nF9gG8aRU68w-6K1dKAN6S07jIcy6-O4Cd_qw9m2EhCtPu2W33GUL8PBTakQ%3D)

**Can anyone say that about career politicians?**

When I was assigned to the Special Operations Regional Task Force in North Africa, tasked with hunting down the planners of the Benghazi attack - **it didn't matter what political party you affiliated with, what religion you practiced or the color of your skin** ; we came together and successfully captured those bastards who killed four of our own, including Ambassador Chris Stevens. We secured justice for the victims of the premeditated terror that Hillary Clinton and the Obama administration refused to seek!

If you agree that we need more service-oriented Americans representing our interests in the hallowed halls of Congress, [**please let me know by taking my quick survey today.**](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=4bd957c7b8934b7e9d149072d145df76&_e=iT7pbKvR-c6B6MgAUbRhMdmbceyQ8vJ8mTw8H-2QGMB-uFQl0fo2jmv3we1Hsz6RgycLujR0n2JOzRzlvbHorkQ6jcz70xRkEqtP2o_fHyp81a1uV_ygVUckGmsgUkZEPqlJZ2wifVMa2hVwtc2ctg3di_iW6LRlzBY5PJfizJdCB7gndgq75WY2YiWnhjcQH1lld2sebqHPyMrvA6l1bHxMKuz5k4-oEE3oaQTyb8S7lnTGnG-XW4XgiPw2MwpK2DMekowmE4AizV4MQbYVnn7JuS5Wvw-IvhdJPHnTRZkxjAFhaFo4gcMXiTCpoz5NZhrCXi3V38d-_2yeXBwPwwAQzODXKTJUKiG0fPHkj3Mm6od4JDFJiKNmKKPvYTIBofh4Ve4AgW3ZNjSpLo9ebQRdzKrjwe9CjhthN6wyrVpe2JX-ybAYgkZLoRd8VddprpaSBa6RyGRMA6_lSOHGxdPFxBek1nc75CYdduPGd4q5Y94AILOReMqCndBPO1y0NDqrWyR31CZoQjyeJSJ3vDlN8z_nkHocItw1tO0wsXJVRA-_z8WdcY_6VYGWTzLblVLhBZr5gX_pUnBDSYGIYXoClEBXMyAVEgN5MgHkliwyzz2quV9d59nFjq_NPfbGZNW-eSSkvlY2kjsAGS0LXw%3D%3D)

[**IN YOUR OPINION
DO WE NEED MORE VETERANS IN CONGRESS** ›› ](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=4bd957c7b8934b7e9d149072d145df76&_e=iT7pbKvR-c6B6MgAUbRhMdmbceyQ8vJ8mTw8H-2QGMB-uFQl0fo2jmv3we1Hsz6RgycLujR0n2JOzRzlvbHorkQ6jcz70xRkEqtP2o_fHyp81a1uV_ygVUckGmsgUkZEPqlJZ2wifVMa2hVwtc2ctg3di_iW6LRlzBY5PJfizJdCB7gndgq75WY2YiWnhjcQH1lld2sebqHPyMrvA6l1bHxMKuz5k4-oEE3oaQTyb8S7lnTGnG-XW4XgiPw2MwpK2DMekowmE4AizV4MQbYVnn7JuS5Wvw-IvhdJPHnTRZkxjAFhaFo4gcMXiTCpoz5NZhrCXi3V38d-_2yeXBwPwwAQzODXKTJUKiG0fPHkj3Mm6od4JDFJiKNmKKPvYTIBofh4Ve4AgW3ZNjSpLo9ebQRdzKrjwe9CjhthN6wyrVqE6MZy7DuhsfEA-AiPBi7lM9hbne0LLw-oxGDQd9IrBLPEi7f31_bw8SaL0cUYcIRAXQzk2hA5jkoSzsrDjqHuSfDK-Vbd_9Lz8aH3_pE8YbwtGkI8ZYz6FtAg04hEaSuKbSsbu7rpCoJzA3VKPra-q7ZlrkceZvfGD2VOaEpeHPmm9PdVNO8OVtDvhskmo5JDnVKDgaccSz78k3NZ56zoQ1ejQWJ7puPWjaHhNwq8Pg%3D%3D)

Don't want to receive our emails? | According to the Military Times , in 1973, "nearly three in every four members of Congress had some type of military service." In 2021, that number has dropped to one in every six members. Fellow Conservative, If I know one thing it’s that you are likely on the receiving end of hundreds, if not thousands of emails every day. I appreciate you opening mine. Would you please take a few moments to scan the contents of this email and take my brief survey re: veterans serving in Congress? I gave up my career in military intelligence to run for public office, so. Whether or not you agree with the overarching mission active-duty military members participate in, I think that we can all agree that it’s hard to disrespect a member of the military community or a veteran of the United States Armed Forces. My name is John Castorani and for 9 years I served within the Army’s Special Operations Command , proudly representing the United States at home and around the globe. Perhaps you’ve opened up an email that I’ve sent prior to today. If that’s the case, then you may know that I’ve devoted my life to serving our nation – at home and on foreign battlefields. | For six years, I hunted the radical Islamic terrorists who attacked our outpost in Benghazi, Libya. Along with fellow Special Operators service members, I helped hold the people who killed an American ambassador accountable. One could say that we cleaned up the mess Hillary Clinton created when she refused to take the infamous 4 a.m. call on September 11th, 2012. I know from first-hand experience fighting Islamic State, al Qaeda and other extremist elements that American military personnel are among the most agile and strategic-minded people around. So why there are only 38 combat veterans currently serving in Congress – the lowest number since WWII? I find this alarming. It used to be the case that serving in the military was a prerequisite for those seeking public office. I’m curious to know if you share the opinion that Republicans must do more to ensure we’re putting resources behind men and women who have served old glory in the armed forces as they seek election to Congress. Veterans know how to get things done. Give us a mission and a timeline and we’ll see anything through to the end. Veterans make the best members of Congress not only because they’ve served in our armed forces, rather because in the armed forces vets learn that regardless of your creed, ethnicity, race or religion, in the military it’s essential to come together and accomplish the mission... it’s the oath every veteran swore to uphold to our Constitution - in order to form a more perfect union. Can anyone say that about career politicians? When I was assigned to the Special Operations Regional Task Force in North Africa, tasked with hunting down the planners of the Benghazi attack - it didn't matter what political party you affiliated with, what religion you practiced or the color of your skin ; we came together and successfully captured those bastards who killed four of our own, including Ambassador Chris Stevens. We secured justice for the victims of the premeditated terror that Hillary Clinton and the Obama administration refused to seek! If you agree that we need more service-oriented Americans representing our interests in the hallowed halls of Congress, Very Respectfully, John Castorani | Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia P.O. BOX 390 ORANGE, VA 22960

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: Can you spare two minutes to take our October issues survey and share your feedback?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
We’re building a people-powered movement across this state because that is what it is going to take to win.
#

We’re building a people-powered movement across this state because that is what it is going to take to win.
We need to speak to the hope and needs of North Carolinians across the entire state. That is how we will excite and mobilize the voters we need to win.
It’s important to me to hear from you regularly as part of this effort and get your feedback on what issues are top of mind for you and your family.
[**So today, I’m reaching out to see if you will take our October Issues survey. It will only take two minutes, and I’d greatly appreciate hearing what’s on your mind. What do you say?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37544234/311539541/-1970220877?refcode2=8d278813-1e2d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&refcode=em211014-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDI3ODgxMy0xZTJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pSH8rFN9dsymrXeEQW89Ki_zyHWcOVOpqgfvdS7J6eY=&emci=dfc4520c-1e2d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=8d278813-1e2d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=20912107)
Our families deserve a senator who will listen and be a voice for the people in Congress. That is the job of your elected leaders.
We’ve had enough with self-serving politicians in Washington who prioritize the needs of their wealthy and special interests donors. It’s time we have a senator who will fight for our shared progressive values.
That’s why it matters so much to me to hear from you. Doing surveys like this every so often also helps us see how issues are changing in importance over time.
[**Please take our October issues survey today. We’ll review the results soon, and it’s important that we hear from as many people as possible. Everyone’s feedback makes our campaign that much stronger.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37544235/311539542/-1970220877?refcode2=8d278813-1e2d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&refcode=em211014-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDI3ODgxMy0xZTJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pSH8rFN9dsymrXeEQW89Ki_zyHWcOVOpqgfvdS7J6eY=&emci=dfc4520c-1e2d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=8d278813-1e2d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=20912107)
Together, we can build a more just future where all of our children can thrive.
\- Cheri Beasley
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37544236/311539543/-1970220877?refcode2=8d278813-1e2d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&refcode=em211014-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDI3ODgxMy0xZTJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pSH8rFN9dsymrXeEQW89Ki_zyHWcOVOpqgfvdS7J6eY=&emci=dfc4520c-1e2d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=8d278813-1e2d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=20912107)**

body:

_Please see a message from our sponsor:_
---
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=73a1cb4c95c94129bfb7b1a9f541f7f9&_e=GQI8_dyHweP4S2eejk2AYBYmL-IE-LpWBp6hK7swTYwuHIN4jGDqnS6P-D8MVIYS4U0sCcAMy6iGXmVNovtJ5nvbcxdOM0EZQCzufhn8F2Cr10oAKysZotJ02SQXNQ0NMDAvAMUOe1G7iEge1DoULu9JDjyZaBuhZZmirW3Q0ZiDSpgoCql1BBtypEFSoZtOnSnKWi1pN-x7e_RZmCay9yT0oJCoIAX545UmFbKyJPmdCGwSqU01HqlPlHUlTJuuiY_OGqFUhK5UfTXcHUTnjZEKKQobt-YNBC3eCxk5Dwp-EV0mXgz3K5A_i-vHFjlpx3Eja_OADJdw4IydXxJPaL4FPES82zxzWqHgQm3uCPHZiLfLpQj-ggGiHf4TqHChhWcj5K2JLI60XlMyF4QrUjv9XM6rK63pzkKTFHlgUc1aDD6aqGp2_HdgJ53yws9X) Fellow Conservative,
Today, I'm writing to ask you to consider becoming a part of the movement that can transform America.
Free enterprise, limited government, individual freedom, traditional American values, and a strong national defense—these are the values that we fight for every single day. As the nation’s largest, most broadly-supported think tank, The Heritage Foundation has long been the bastion of the American conservative movement. And with more than 500,000 members, our ranks are growing stronger every day. And now, you can join us and help to ensure that your values are being advanced in Washington, in the Media, and across this great nation.

**America faces difficult times ahead—but there is hope**
Right now, our nation is heading into a time of trial. We live in a deeply divided nation, where public discourse is broken and respect for different opinions has dwindled to nothing. Two opposing ideologies fight for the future of America.
The outlook seems bleak, and the deck seems stacked against conservative principles. We have a White House and legislature bent on pushing a far-left agenda. They want to end the filibuster, pack the Supreme Court with their own judges, and advance their socialist policies unchecked. If they’re not stopped, we could see deeply disastrous policies like the Green New Deal, Medicare-for-All, and attacks on our freedom of speech become reality. [Learn More Now >>](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=73a1cb4c95c94129bfb7b1a9f541f7f9&_e=GQI8_dyHweP4S2eejk2AYBYmL-IE-LpWBp6hK7swTYwuHIN4jGDqnS6P-D8MVIYS4U0sCcAMy6iGXmVNovtJ5nvbcxdOM0EZQCzufhn8F2Cr10oAKysZotJ02SQXNQ0NMDAvAMUOe1G7iEge1DoULu9JDjyZaBuhZZmirW3Q0ZiDSpgoCql1BBtypEFSoZtOnSnKWi1pN-x7e_RZmCay9yT0oJCoIAX545UmFbKyJPkPS0l6Faeil6jjqkKThJHtX-0qQHW202TvrTall5HPgDAByHnEJ7aU8-0ZKVmogPmdqWgVacp1pkdhJ82AjEp91vk6Im98KSUuR_3sRkLC_it7Ljr3oNgRCot1UFW75fJwquU9110i3R-2lDz5ppJR_84yU6U0twgMeeH39yBzC-YogRDLGMupNyfB4thnjwkAHTvvnwEN7sWd-aDfAcdH) **Enough is enough—it is time to reverse our course.**
As the far left threatens to take more control of our lives and livelihoods, The Heritage Foundation has the policy solutions that can make America that “shining city upon a hill” once again. And we are strategically positioned to do just that:
* **Heritage has a media distribution network second to none.** Millions of Americans visit our Daily Signal website each year, bypassing the mainstream media filter to get the facts. Heritage experts appear on television and radio dozens of times each week, publish hundreds of sound policy research reports annually, and host meetings with grassroots leaders and local and national officials.****

* **Heritage stands strong for conservative principles no matter who’s in office** , and we have for almost half a century. As Rush Limbaugh has said, “As long as there has been conservatism, there has been The Heritage Foundation. They have been a bulwark and they have stood strong and they have not wavered.”

* **Heritage’s over** **100 policy experts are committed to solving complex policy issues with simple and effective conservative solutions,** and making sure those recommendations are available for the conservative lawmakers who desperately need them right now.

[Learn More Now >>](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=73a1cb4c95c94129bfb7b1a9f541f7f9&_e=GQI8_dyHweP4S2eejk2AYBYmL-IE-LpWBp6hK7swTYwuHIN4jGDqnS6P-D8MVIYSOvkvotbC1giFVqxOwzsWHGhQzVTgJNGJSjbETHZLYaGyg0GgtwgF2y3YG6fkA-07-j09brqDElno8wKVB6UGLU4B2Mt4XG0L6zQkqzc3l0hP0nicpVVbjw6PEoJAGEgzuVC76XnkaUsEc2NUkXYGwrlbOCPFKUjivTaRKDV6hqzgNHafv3W1mYjZkI2Pm_IbKudfFMeTmfIwy99VfyjEXpMsfAAqJHvLfotVPwB2Lvy30tQJO79QF0Sbt0jpjDYAsUt07tdBmvkzgA6R3ehSmvs7H3ky2HJu31YJBPZjNAFpWYliEVVK4JXV8-iJq3B3FtUWZcOATSU64OVY3C1NkEgbr6ZXAYih8QDcG_FsrgIV4J2s_WqxshEwL5VVuiQb) **Get Exclusive Insider Access to Heritage When You Become a Member Toda y**
When you become an official member of The Heritage Foundation, you are taking your place along with over 500,000 fellow conservatives that stand for conservative principles of free enterprise, limited government, individual liberty, traditional American values, and a strong national defense.
**But, as a member, you also get special access to content and benefits that are not available anywhere else:** [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=73a1cb4c95c94129bfb7b1a9f541f7f9&_e=GQI8_dyHweP4S2eejk2AYBYmL-IE-LpWBp6hK7swTYwuHIN4jGDqnS6P-D8MVIYSOvkvotbC1giFVqxOwzsWHGhQzVTgJNGJSjbETHZLYaGyg0GgtwgF2y3YG6fkA-07-j09brqDElno8wKVB6UGLU4B2Mt4XG0L6zQkqzc3l0hP0nicpVVbjw6PEoJAGEgzuVC76XnkaUsEc2NUkXYGwrlbOCPFKUjivTaRKDV6hqysOJ-DtKGqDRTv5c2rT5VBdxSuKEo_QEceeiOcpUP-zRIfU44Re-otHY1BtEk7dMZPwPqrudJi4RSSqgMix2-0HC8sQILmQred-9ZrxLUM7HAMbLCudZcapVNFdEKPUoC9_dNiqu_YoLwYbjNhDap1VIwb3pB1biXHBcudMvdBT39hySBdlzDbVezbsXkPYMswLrOTs1t0RwdTAzBF3edw) **Official Heritage Membership Card**

Heritage Foundation members are proud to stand for their conservative principles and we recognize each member with their own membership card. clean_body: Free enterprise, limited government, individual freedom, traditional American values, and a strong national defense—these are the values that we fight Please see a message from our sponsor: Fellow Conservative, Today, I'm writing to ask you to consider becoming a part of the movement that can transform America. Free enterprise, limited government, individual freedom, traditional American values, and a strong national defense—these are the values that we fight for every single day. As the nation’s largest, most broadly-supported think tank, The Heritage Foundation has long been the bastion of the American conservative movement. And with more than 500,000 members, our ranks are growing stronger every day. And now, you can join us and help to ensure that your values are being advanced in Washington, in the Media, and across this great nation. America faces difficult times ahead—but there is hope Right now, our nation is heading into a time of trial. We live in a deeply divided nation, where public discourse is broken and respect for different opinions has dwindled to nothing. Two opposing ideologies fight for the future of America. The outlook seems bleak, and the deck seems stacked against conservative principles. We have a White House and legislature bent on pushing a far-left agenda. They want to end the filibuster, pack the Supreme Court with their own judges, and advance their socialist policies unchecked. If they’re not stopped, we could see deeply disastrous policies like the Green New Deal, Medicare-for-All, and attacks on our freedom of speech become reality. Enough is enough—it is time to reverse our course. As the far left threatens to take more control of our lives and livelihoods, The Heritage Foundation has the policy solutions that can make America that “shining city upon a hill” once again. And we are strategically positioned to do just that: Heritage has a media distribution network second to none. Millions of Americans visit our Daily Signal website each year, bypassing the mainstream media filter to get the facts. Heritage experts appear on television and radio dozens of times each week, publish hundreds of sound policy research reports annually, and host meetings with grassroots leaders and local and national officials. Heritage stands strong for conservative principles no matter who’s in office , and we have for almost half a century. As Rush Limbaugh has said, “As long as there has been conservatism, there has been The Heritage Foundation. They have been a bulwark and they have stood strong and they have not wavered.” Heritage’s over 100 policy experts are committed to solving complex policy issues with simple and effective conservative solutions, and making sure those recommendations are available for the conservative lawmakers who desperately need them right now. Get Exclusive Insider Access to Heritage When You Become a Member Toda y When you become an official member of The Heritage Foundation, you are taking your place along with over 500,000 fellow conservatives that stand for conservative principles of free enterprise, limited government, individual liberty, traditional American values, and a strong national defense. But, as a member, you also get special access to content and benefits that are not available anywhere else: Official Heritage Membership Card Heritage Foundation members are proud to stand for their conservative principles and we recognize each member with their own membership card. Special Invitations to Virtual Gatherings As a member, you will be invited to attend special gatherings where you can network with Heritage staff and fellows as well as other conservatives that share your values. Exclusive Updates from Our President We want you to be constantly informed about the impact of your membership. Every member will receive regular updates from the front lines of policy battles happening in Washington DC and across the country.. Subscription to the Morning Bell The Morning Bell arrives in your inbox first thing every weekday morning with the day’s most important news, conservative commentary and policy analysis. As a member, you will get a free subscription to the daily edition of the Morning Bell. Activate Your Membership to The Heritage Foundation Instantly** With your most generous tax-deductible gift of $25 or more, you will join over 500,000 Americans as an official member of The Heritage Foundation. Your membership will help to support our work to build an America where freedom, prosperity, opportunity and civil society flourish. I hope you will consider it. Sincerely, Andrew P. McIndoe VP, Development, The Heritage Foundation | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002 To Unsubscribe by email, please reply to this message with Unsubscribe as the Subject Line. .

| | | Dear Peter,

It's time to take this country back and make it what it is meant to be - the Land of the Free.

I'm looking forward to seeing you at my event!

If you're not able to attend, please consider donating to my campaign so we can bring common sense back to WDC. [Click here](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=4ac249911b&e=25f4fa3311) to donate to my campaign and bring common sense to Congress.

Niki Conforti

October is National Bullying Prevention Month and we wanted to talk about the biggest bully of them all -- Donald Trump.

From calling his political opponent names to telling victims of bullying to "get over it," and using racist and xenophobic language -- Trump has used hateful and harmful language to try to intimate others and maintain power.

clean_body: Tony Evers’ allies are running a lying attack ad about me. | Friend, After our campaign came out of the gate strong and crushed our first quarterly fundraising deadline, it was only a matter of time before Tony Evers would resort to dirty tactics. Evers’ allies just launched an attack ad full of lies in an attempt to torpedo our campaign’s momentum after this race was labeled a 50-50 TOSS-UP. And with the mid-month deadline just around the corner, we can’t afford to fall short of our $25,000 goal and let these attacks go unanswered. It’s telling that Tony Evers and the Democrats' only attack against me is that I actually meet with and listen to our voters. He claims that my determination to personally listen to what matters most to YOU is creating “potential super spreader events.” Perhaps Evers just isn’t used to people attending his campaign events... But despite the ridiculousness of these attacks, we can’t allow the Left to continue fueling these lies with even larger ad buys. That’s why I’m asking for your help ahead of the mid-month deadline, to ensure we meet our $25,000 goal so that we can stamp out these lies here and now. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfhj4ak2dl95r3p01esb2hqjg6u3tflgi58mtp40_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf6plnc1p7fdj5c1j32obn6lq3fdb0edg76srhecr34p3l61j7bc3gsjhr2phim1jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0eaq6cd72mdi6fclhcopb1cj26pp238h1e8he4933cpgm4pj0s9i69oh5u)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztcqkj8o00qrc59uss8hgiqhr9vg2qr7fvh5t6l8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9j61oj4cjh2bs) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb1n1d4iuqu5gl0ditqgrostckequvn6h1oj4ku0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9j61oj4cjh2bs) [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za2jfkstlbrliuuc70cnkjaokbscjgmnjus2hd68_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9j61oj4cjh2bs) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0i34iq5g7g0hq7ossg401hfmbm6h0t0bm9jng1o_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9j61oj4cjh2bs) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students —the least affected by the disease — must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsh4tluqf1lp5pmsrr2h490po80oo773oph74ojo_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9j61oj4cjh2bs) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvp9as8bmm8a73rue9vb8m0uktnsgaskaasafssg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9j61oj4cjh2bs) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

I’m on a mission to find out what’s really going on at our southern border, which is why I’m booking a trip to Texas.
