# **Friend — We’re approaching the middle of October and I wanted to share a quick update with you.**

---
With your help, this month we’ve funded two yard sign orders to meet overwhelming grassroots demand. We’ve secured additional endorsements from local leaders across Georgia. We’ve held packed events across the state meeting voters. And we’ve visited the border to expose the truth about this crisis. **We've accomplished a lot, but we all know the work has just begun. That’s why I’m asking you, if you haven’t already, please contribute whatever you can now.**
---
[**DONATE HERE »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/ede246ec8e200290/c6a2fc550ea10321c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Raphael Warnock is on a mission to fundamentally change America, and if we don’t stand in the gap to stop him now, he’ll have six more years to do so. **I’m the only Republican in this race who can make the election about Warnock. ** This isn’t going to be won with distractions or experiments. It’ll be won with trusted experience. [**We’re standing in that gap. And we’re proud to have you standing with us. If you’re able, I hope you’ll contribute whatever you can now to help us continue our October momentum.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/ede246ec8e200290/cd346ea3a7221391c3d6b838967d376c/37793)

Gary Black

| | _**Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary:**_ I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $10 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below.

body:
#

Friends —
If everyone who made a contribution to help Mark Kelly win his first election, chipped in again to this campaign, we’d almost immediately raise everything he needs to stay in the Senate.
But the truth is, few have done that so far. Which is why it’s so important you make your first online donation to help re-elect Mark Kelly — to make up for those who haven’t given again.
Tomorrow night at midnight, our mid-month fundraising drive ends. And we’re going to be very honest, we’re behind where we need to be at this point of the month.
So please, this is such an important request:
[**Can you please make your first $3 contribution to help re-elect Mark Kelly to the U.S. Senate? This is going to be such a close race, and every donation, especially from those who have yet to give, means a lot.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-oct21?refcode=em211014-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=1525_6688874_ihIxKm&akid=1525%2E6688874%2EihIxKm)

name: NH Poll Alert (via MaggieHassan.com)
subject: NH doesn't need another anti-choice Republican
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Team – **A recent UNH poll shows Senator Hassan trailing an anti-choice Republican.** With Roe v. Wade hanging on by a thread, the last thing the Senate needs is another Mitch McConnell puppet. Across the country, including in New Hampshire, Republican-led legislatures are restricting access to women's health care, like contraception, cancer screenings, and abortion. Last month, the Supreme Court rejected an emergency request to block an extreme six-week abortion ban in Texas. **The Supreme Court's failure to act is a devastating blow to women's reproductive freedom and will have dangerous consequences across the country.** Nobody has done more to help dismantle Roe than Mitch McConnell. **By confirming three anti-choice justices to the Supreme Court, McConnell has all but cemented an anti-choice majority.** And now he's looking to replace Maggie with a rubber stamp to continue pushing his extreme far-right agenda. Senators like Maggie Hassan are working to fight back and protect access to reproductive health. Senator Hassan believes that all women have a constitutionally protected right to choose if and when to start a family -- and she helped introduce the Women’s Health Protection Act to guarantee the right to access an abortion. **[But right now, Maggie is down in the polls. With so much at stake in 2022, we can't afford to fall behind. Can you rush $5 right now to help us defend this vulnerable seat and protect reproductive rights?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37546258/311548425/-214106137?refcode=e20211014_oct-poll&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjBjZWI1Zi0yNTJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g5RuSod1W__oNJ17n_zEWMUC8PmB1OgQM_SaOq8iOow=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37546259/311548426/-214106137?refcode=e20211014_oct-poll&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjBjZWI1Zi0yNTJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g5RuSod1W__oNJ17n_zEWMUC8PmB1OgQM_SaOq8iOow=)

name: James Carville
subject: Terry needs your help now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
Won’t take long, don't worry.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37546321/311548739/-2023814932?refcode=20211014.5_JC_10DD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Zjc0NmQxYi0yNTJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nMTfvG_dnNHK4FfKdf7wg_8YfW--fGEpNgk9DBYgpgo=)

| | Derek, we don’t have much time, so I’ll make this quick.

Terry McAuliffe has a critical fundraising deadline coming up tonight. He needs to raise $500,000 by midnight, and he can’t do it alone.

[**Will you make a matched donation right now to help Terry reach his goal?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37546322/311548740/-2023814932?refcode=20211014.5_JC_10DD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Zjc0NmQxYi0yNTJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nMTfvG_dnNHK4FfKdf7wg_8YfW--fGEpNgk9DBYgpgo=)

Here’s the deal, Derek: Glenn Youngkin is funding his campaign with his vast personal fortune — he’s promised to spend up to $75 million of his own money to win this race because he’s desperate to win.

Terry McAuliffe is running a campaign powered by the people.

It’s a more challenging way to run a campaign, but it’s the right way because Terry is running to help the people of Virginia — not Donald Trump and a radical right-wing agenda.

Terry McAuliffe is running a campaign powered by the people. It’s a more challenging way to run a campaign, but it’s the right way because Terry is running to help the people of Virginia — not Donald Trump and a radical right-wing agenda. And now, these fundraising deadlines are even more critical because early voting is underway. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Thank you, James Carville = Terry for VA PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. subject: The Biden Regime wants access to your bank account
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us10.campaign-archive.com/?e=645b3b1338&u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=030f5745d9)
---
| | | [ ](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=5e365732a6&e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | Dear Peter,

The Biden Regime wants to give the IRS power to track every transaction in every bank account with $600 in it.

It is yet another massive invasion of privacy by the Deep State.

We know the NSA is already tracking all of our digital communications.

The FBI is rabidly partisan and wants to declare all Trump supporters "domestic terrorists."

_The Deep State has eroded our right to privacy enough, and I've had it with these illegal, intrusive and degrading schemes_.

[_**I'm fighting like hell against this corrupt administration, and the out-of-control alphabet agencies, and I need your support more than ever**_](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=3b5447e98c&e=645b3b1338).

I'm trying to stop the dam from breaking before the 2022 midterms, so we can take back the U.S. House and Senate and return to real checks and balances in Washington.

Unfortunately, Fellow Patriot, there are only a few other members of Congress fighting alongside me.

Many RINOs in the GOP are fine with the surveillance state's newest power grab.

Communist Democrats love it. They want to control every aspect of your life.

Now more than ever, we must stay strong and fight together against these tyrants.

[_**By contributing generously to my reelection campaign today, you're letting me know you have my back against the massive illegal surveillance state**_](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=ce4de4ff49&e=645b3b1338).

Just think of what the Deep State could do with access to your bank accounts.

**They could track every purchase you make, including purchases of firearms**.

**That would create a de facto database of gun owners for the federal government. **

The IRS is an irredeemably corrupt agency that already has a history of targeting conservative groups.

They refused tax-exempt statuses to Tea Party groups just 10 years ago.

Why should be believe they won't use this new power to harass and punish conservatives?

_We shouldn't_...

...[_**and I need your support today so I can keep fighting back against the Deep State's overreach here in Washington**_](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=3c3501658c&e=645b3b1338).

_[**A contribution of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, or any other amount will go a long way in helping me battle the Biden Regime's reign of tyranny**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=9cbc4a96a5&e=645b3b1338)_.

Thank you in advance for helping battle this massive federal government overreach.
---
| For America,
[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=0bf6a6fdd8&e=645b3b1338) Rep. Paul Gosar, DDS Arizona’s 4th District **P.S.** The Biden Regime is making another monstrous power grab.

**It wants to track every purchase you make from your bank account. **

_[**_Chip into my reelection campaign today to fight back against the latest Biden Regime tyranny_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=1f1db40a31&e=645b3b1338)._

---
| |

body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/ec75c37149988a80/737efc3520e1f269c3d6b838967d376c)
---
# **Friend — Did you see me on Fox Business yesterday?**

---
I joined to talk about the choice facing the U.S. Senate right now: big government socialism or economic freedom. That’s what the fight over Joe Biden and the Democrats’ $3.5 trillion bill is about. And this out-of-control spending and borrowing will make inflation even worse. [**Watch the interview here.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/ec75c37149988a80/e072202f9645dd45c3d6b838967d376c)
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/ec75c37149988a80/5f4671015963af26c3d6b838967d376c)
---
Kansans and Americans aren’t just mad about inflation; they’re panicked. Everyone is feeling the impact of Joe Biden’s disastrous agenda. I’m going to continue calling it out and fighting against it in the U.S. Senate. And I hope you’ll continue to stand with us.

subject: A slow start

body:
Hey --

I’m not here to fool you with any “the sky is falling!” language begging you to pitch in a donation. That’s just not how I do things.

name: Mark Warner
subject: Add your name: hold Facebook accountable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Last week, a whistleblower from Facebook testified before a Senate committee about how Facebook is hurting its users and our democracy.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37548012/311559335/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWZmNjg3YS0yZDJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0MePQtsxIv3bvoBozDrCl6AHoMQ3M6FcO1KXT_pnVmo=&emci=7ff7705d-152d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=41ff687a-2d2d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, Last week, a whistleblower from Facebook testified before a Senate committee about how Facebook is hurting its users and our democracy. Here’s the problem with stopping misinformation on Facebook: Right now, tech platforms like Facebook have legal immunity when it comes to the content posted on their platforms, even when that content breaks existing laws. The best way for us to combat misinformation, harassment, sexual violence, and other bad behavior on Facebook is to make sure the law doesn’t give Facebook a ‘get out of jail free card’ for harm it enables -- and I’ve introduced legislation called the SAFE TECH Act to do exactly that. **_[Facebook shouldn’t be immune from legal and monetary consequences for its irresponsibility. Add your name now to hold Facebook accountable.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37548013/311559340/1863070436?ms=mw_em_211014_1&refcode=mw_em_211014_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWZmNjg3YS0yZDJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0MePQtsxIv3bvoBozDrCl6AHoMQ3M6FcO1KXT_pnVmo=&emci=7ff7705d-152d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=41ff687a-2d2d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=4568237)_** Everyone has a right in this country to say stupid stuff. But that right doesn’t extend to having it amplified millions of times across the internet. We should enforce our existing laws about behavior like harassment and fraud, even when that behavior takes place on a social media platform. Facebook has promised before to address misinformation on its platforms, but its efforts have been half-hearted at best. It’s clear we cannot rely upon the goodwill of the Facebook leadership to correct this problem on its own. We need governmental and societal action. **_[Add your name now: Urge Congress to take action holding Facebook accountable for misinformation and other bad behavior on its platform.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37548014/311559341/1863070436?ms=mw_em_211014_1&refcode=mw_em_211014_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWZmNjg3YS0yZDJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0MePQtsxIv3bvoBozDrCl6AHoMQ3M6FcO1KXT_pnVmo=&emci=7ff7705d-152d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=41ff687a-2d2d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=4568237)_** Thank you, Mark Warner **[Sign the Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37548015/311559342/1863070436?ms=mw_em_211014_1&refcode=mw_em_211014_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWZmNjg3YS0yZDJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0MePQtsxIv3bvoBozDrCl6AHoMQ3M6FcO1KXT_pnVmo=&emci=7ff7705d-152d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=41ff687a-2d2d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=4568237)**

Hey Peter, it’s Rachel with a quick update on the eve of Democrat Hala Ayala’s mid‐month fundraising deadline.

**It’s hard to believe that Election Day is in less than three short weeks!** With that in mind, we are kicking our fundraising efforts into high gear.

I set an ambitious $30,000 goal for this final month of the campaign, and every cent donated makes a difference — _especially in light of recent news:_ | **_BREAKING FROM THE WASHINGTON POST:_
Republicans gaining ground on Democrats in Virginia statewide elections, poll finds**
---
[**Peter, we cannot lose this election to radical Republicans. Everything is on the line — so can Hala count on seeing your $3 donation toward our final $30,000 fundraising goal today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37548025/311559408/-1547699132?amount=3&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=HAFV_20211014_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWU1ZGE4MC0yZDJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dWOYiU03fvwypGnYEbW2dkF7uYra1taNGAQSqOj2OEs=)

Hala is working day and night to make sure we win this election.

**Because our extreme opponent wants to turn back the clock!**

She refused the coronavirus vaccine despite the good it does to help our Commonwealth build back from the pandemic, vowed to install an abortion ban, and promised to roll back access to the ballot box.

The past few elections have highlighted the need to protect voting rights at the federal level. Since the expiration of the Voting Rights Act, several states have pushed through discriminatory laws that make it harder for people to exercise their right to vote.
Sen. Warnock has raised the alarm.
We must protect our right to vote. And the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act is that protection. Getting this critical piece of legislation out of the Senate and on President Biden’s desk is of the utmost importance.
[**We need you to raise your voice in support of voting rights. Will you sign on to protect our right to vote?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37548219/311560024/579511596?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGI3ZTEyZi0yZTJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5jF1n9Z6sU2s5OHhu0W8ltcMn5la_JmSq3S3BmOZfrQ=&emci=96867fb4-6c2b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=38b7e12f-2e2d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=10997957)

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: I won’t sugarcoat it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | I won't sugarcoat it: ****[Our Democratic House Majority is in serious trouble.](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/We_6hvrr~)****

\-- House Republicans have shattered**SEVEN** fundraising records in a row.
\-- They need to flip just **FIVE** seats to take back power for good.
\-- And they're targeting**57** of my Democrats for defeat.

It's deeply alarming.

But I'm more fired up than ever before to defend my House Democrats and safeguard our progress.

And with such high stakes, I know it will take everything we've got to defeat these Republicans and come out on top.

**So I 've set a mission-critical $125,000 Mid Month fundraising goal for my House Democrats -- and we simply must meet it if we want any hope of halting this Republican momentum in House races before it completely overpowers us.**

Please, can I count on you and your $3 to meet my Mid Month goal before time runs out and defend our House Majority?

| _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Chip in $1 immediately>>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ka_)**

**[Chip in $35 immediately>>](https://links.e.dccc.)**

**[Chip in $50 immediately>>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Eqxzt_)**

**[Chip in $100 immediately>>](https://links.e.dccc.)**

**[Chip in $250 immediately>>](https://links.e.dccc.)**

**[Or chip in another amount>>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Z6_Zc-)**

Thank you,

Nancy

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45778560&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEwMTQzMjEyOAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45778560&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEwMTQzMjEyOAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

| Inflation is skyrocketing. Employment is plummeting. Grocery shelves are empty. And the White House is warning people they might not be able to buy presents for Christmas.
This is America under Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi.
---
| | | [DONATE. JOIN THE FIGHT TO FIRE JOE AND NANCY.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013lnBr-e8GK0Jf0YW9MQvxZ08v4KaBvkijNWBK-tl0oDSCaw8L71gdoiMdn6akeV3zDaJc_CMY1vsYWooKNImqAZdHAFtwxiKGf0sussPPUrET7aufBs2JD13LSb-D0qM3x972F58n_nSRCVydBoLK2PnkQKKHBdTZom6fmoCTu9n-udKrj6t0Brb7Vb7sxTJsKGoWgQAcJCNZa7cazLQuUrP5MmWpryo8lvwnaQUxhgN7cRgl_3LbLk5tMoGMZ7LYWutEFDhF6x1f3HyCXzAt2MhDyfOm2cagO5Wj0Dl-r2d3DFE6ZaQFcZC0lMLNDqQ2muZc01nnnE0zPAyXOvq1jbgqd0Pwo5W&c=sC5p-WhO54-lgNQ1mIlDXOReX0wMGd2y4F5D7duIDBGr8iLgZB4Riw==&ch=EeK0hHTphSBcYRdggIkh40NUA42ZBAcl2MMOKHbt04xmmByj0hH-wQ==)

| But don't worry. According to the Biden White House, these aren't real problems...they're just "high class problems."
Can't afford gas? High class problem.
Can't find food at the grocery store? High class problem.
Can't run your business because your employees would rather stay home? High class problem.
Are you kidding me? While millionaires like Joe and Nancy and Kamala run the country from the comfort of the White House and the Speaker's Chair, they're laughing at Americans struggling.
[We need to win back the majority and FIRE Nancy Pelosi. We need to take back the Senate and FIRE Chuck Schumer. We need to take back the White House and FIRE Joe Biden.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013lnBr-e8GK0Jf0YW9MQvxZ08v4KaBvkijNWBK-tl0oDSCaw8L71gdoiMdn6akeV3zDaJc_CMY1vsYWooKNImqAZdHAFtwxiKGf0sussPPUrET7aufBs2JD13LSb-D0qM3x972F58n_nSRCVydBoLK2PnkQKKHBdTZom6fmoCTu9n-udKrj6t0Brb7Vb7sxTJsKGoWgQAcJCNZa7cazLQuUrP5MmWpryo8lvwnaQUxhgN7cRgl_3LbLk5tMoGMZ7LYWutEFDhF6x1f3HyCXzAt2MhDyfOm2cagO5Wj0Dl-r2d3DFE6ZaQFcZC0lMLNDqQV7LXXTeWxvhZaojm9IqTiw==&c=sC5p-WhO54-lgNQ1mIlDXOReX0wMGd2y4F5D7duIDBGr8iLgZB4Riw==&ch=EeK0hHTphSBcYRdggIkh40NUA42ZBAcl2MMOKHbt04xmmByj0hH-wQ==)
That's the only way we'll pull our country out of these crises. And I'm ready to go on offense to do just that.
Are you?

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: Peter, I'm writing to you personally about this campaign and your support.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
I'm determined to win this race with grassroots support
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37549471/311564979/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk276-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjMwODE2Mi0zMjJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DqNgr2GzYLG-wwov8e25FR9OGobweBYKtPwiAnIyfo4=)
---
Hi Peter, it's Abby, reaching out about my campaign to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R) in Iowa – and today, I'm asking you to make your very first contribution by donating $5. I hope you'll allow me a moment to explain why.
I have every intention of defeating Sen. Grassley – and right now, he's vulnerable: Only 27% of likely Iowa voters say they want to reelect him to an eighth term. But Republicans know just as well as you and I that Sen. Grassley is on thin ice with Iowans, and they will spend heavily to protect him. In fact, just this year alone, the campaign arm of the Senate Republicans has raised $76 million.
To compete against the massive resources of national Republicans, I need to build up the strongest grassroots movement possible: **Made up of committed supporters like you, donating $5, $10, $20 at a time to flip Iowa blue and protect our Senate majority.**
**Peter, with Sen. Grassley as vulnerable as he is, the Senate Republicans' campaign arm and Fox News are already attacking me.[This race will be a marathon, not a sprint, so I'm counting on early and strong support by hitting my next $25,000 mid-month fundraising goal tomorrow. Please, will you donate your first $5 to our campaign today so we can defeat Sen. Grassley in Iowa and protect our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37549472/311564980/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk276-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjMwODE2Mi0zMjJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DqNgr2GzYLG-wwov8e25FR9OGobweBYKtPwiAnIyfo4=)**
As a young woman in public service, I can't count the number of times I've been underestimated or counted out. But I'm never one to back down from a challenge, and I know the power of hard work: I won an election against a man twice my age, flipped a House seat blue and became the youngest woman to pass legislation through the House.
**At the end of the day, that's what flipping this seat blue and protecting Senate control is going to take: hard work. And lots of it, too.**
It's my parents who taught me the value of seeing work to be done and doing it. Our family has a tradition of public service going back generations: from one of my grandfathers who was a firefighter, to another who served in World War II. Their service inspires me to show up for my community and do the work – and right now, working families in communities across Iowa are being failed by a senator who has left them behind. It's time to change that.
The work ahead to defeat Grassley will be hard, but I know that with a movement of committed grassroots supporters like you, we can – and will – win. [**So please, Peter, can you commit to being a part of this movement by donating your first $5 before my mid-month fundraising deadline? Every donation puts us one step closer to flipping Iowa blue and protecting our Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37549473/311564981/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk276-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjMwODE2Mi0zMjJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DqNgr2GzYLG-wwov8e25FR9OGobweBYKtPwiAnIyfo4=)
Thank you for standing with me and doing all that you do.
With deep gratitude,

Abby
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37549474/311564982/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk276-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjMwODE2Mi0zMjJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DqNgr2GzYLG-wwov8e25FR9OGobweBYKtPwiAnIyfo4=)

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: We need to win this battle on the campuses
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z4s6o70674lck7nt6218hosp7m5vg4v08uo8thco_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9gmaoj6c9h2bs) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z6iu9f9i42oifh5l61ab0nkdjd4kj27shkkqptf0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9gmaoj6c9h2bs) [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zf2tajpfk1pb0p5s3md2140rnm2n6eeqd2bihsno_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9gmaoj6c9h2bs) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z1ft688len1n8h06903sg1sfk735bv5o2ral070g_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9gmaoj6c9h2bs) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students —the least affected by the disease — must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zdahe5h2kpm6cd8j8lek37k8t26jaqka8arc7r1g_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9gmaoj6c9h2bs) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zu3mnomhhhtrlvkbdkknrhu4irk0tvp472dldmp8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9gmaoj6c9h2bs) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
| This email was sent by: Self-Reliance Central

name: Nina Turner
subject: With redistricting underway, the newly drawn maps unfairly favor Republicans in Ohio.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
The GOP is using gerrymandering in an attempt to control Ohioan voters.

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37549716/311565974/1761773496?refcode=211014_FR_REDISTRICTING_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzFjOWQ1Zi0zMzJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jyR9Cd8Wcj3hALyLRp56E7ML4X4Tgv3tu_FD-Bm2rwg=)
---
Friends and Neighbors,

With Ohio redistricting underway, the newly drawn maps unfairly skew in favor of Republicans. _**Because they know that they can only win if they cheat.**_

Despite only winning 54% of the statewide vote, the GOP is claiming 67% of the Ohio districts for themselves — **which is in direct conflict with a constitutional amendment from the voters of OH in 2016 and 2018.**

With the GOP’s gerrymandering tactics, more than half of the voters in this district will be new. And with Ohio remaining a key battleground state, it’s more critical than ever that these voters have a choice in fair representation.

**[**We cannot allow the far-right to succeed in their attempts to control Ohioan voters through their dirty gerrymandering tactics. I’m doing everything I can to ensure that they don’t get away with rigging our redistricting process — because every Ohioan deserves an equal voice. Will you fight back with me by pitching in today? name: Team Ryan
subject: 852 teachers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1157%2E3611125%2EOVYL8f ][IMG]

Hi there,

The numbers don’t lie.

Our FEC reports show that this grassroots campaign is backed by workers.
37 truck drivers, 6 woodworkers, and get this -- 852 teachers donated to
our campaign last quarter.

It’s a far cry from Tim’s Republican opponents. Tech billionaire Peter
Thiel has already given upwards of $10 million to a super PAC backing JD
Vance and Josh Mandel has been busily chasing every Trump donor he can get
a hold of.

Tim’s the proud husband of an elementary school teacher. He knows better
than anyone that 852 teachers are more powerful than any out-of-touch,
out-of-state millionaire GOP donor.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5066?t=1007&akid=1157%2E3611125%2EOVYL8f ]If everyone reading this email chipped in a few bucks, we’d have enough
resources to go toe-to-toe with Republican mega-donors. Are you in?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5066?t=1008&akid=1157%2E3611125%2EOVYL8f ]Chip in >>

Don’t forget: We must win in Ohio for Democrats to maintain control of the
Senate. Right now, Democrats have a 50-50 majority and Republicans will
spend millions of dollars to win this seat and reinsert Mitch McConnell
back into the Majority Leader’s office.

We need your help, folks. We wouldn’t be writing this email if
we didn’t.

So as we approach our mid-month fundraising deadline, we’ve set a $25,000
goal. The deadline is this Friday at 11:59 PM, so we really need you to
make a donation as soon as possible.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5066?t=1009&akid=1157%2E3611125%2EOVYL8f ]Will you chip in before Friday to help us reach our $25,000 mid-month
fundraising goal?

Thanks.

Let’s get this done and start cutting workers in on the deal.

-- Team Ryan

name: Nicole Neily, Parents Defending Education
subject: DOJ: “Concerned parents = domesticterrorists?”
body:
Maybe you heard the news – recently, the U.S. Department of Justice said they will mobilize the FBI against parents
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvpj3pucrn9aajud38j80ftb7nae01v8ptgfk8s8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9gm6oj0cjh2bs) Fellow American, Maybe you heard the news – recently, the U.S. Department of Justice said **they will mobilize the FBI against parents ... for standing up for their own children!** On October 4, 2021, the DOJ announced a new initiative to address “harassment, intimidation and threats of violence” against school board members and employees – including but not limited to **the creation of a federal task force as well as dedicated lines of communication for threat reporting, assessment, and response by law enforcement under the auspices of the FBI.** [**Tell the DOJ this is unacceptable**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zq8b6sbn716vj0j6le7rbc4jfrvs6djrf949d790_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9gm6oj0cjh2bs) My name is Nicole Neily, and I’m the President of Parents Defending Education. We’re a national grassroots organization working to reclaim our schools from activists promoting harmful agendas, and fighting against indoctrination in the classroom -- and _for_ the restoration of a healthy, non-political education for our kids. We are also standing with parents like you who are troubled by what’s happening in our schools today. You might be wondering how something so outrageous -- **the FBI being mobilized against parents for simply speaking up for their own children** \-- could happen in “the land of the free.” It all started recently, when the National School Board Association (NSBA) sent a letter to President Biden asking for help **silencing parents like you** who are demanding change at school board meetings. In their letter, NSBA cites a tiny number of minor incidents to insinuate that** parents who are criticizing and protesting the decisions of school boards are or may be engaging in “domestic terrorism and hate crimes."** While PDE naturally does not support _anyone_ who uses violence or threats against school board members, officials, or teachers, the NSBA choosing to invoke the PATRIOT Act (which was passed after 9/11 to uncover potential terrorist plots) takes it WAY too far. The association of legitimate protest with terrorism and violence reveals both NSBA’s contempt for parents and their unwillingness to understand and hear the sincere cries of parents on behalf of their children. In short, **_NSBA’s letter to President Biden was a thinly veiled threat_** , intended to intimidate into silence and submission the very constituents -- parents and taxpayers like you, -- that its members ostensibly represent. And the Department of Justice is wholly complicit in this charade. [**Tell the DOJ you OPPOSE FBI persecution of parents**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zac2hencf0da13vabqk9t7cdq2doplcd822o79qo_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9gm6oj0cjh2bs) I’m in awe that NSBA would choose to threaten parents for having the courage to hold them accountable -- as I’m sure you are. And it’s unthinkable that concerned parents should be equated with domestic terrorists. **We will not be bullied.** We refuse to have our free speech chilled by threats. America’s parents have a constitutional right to petition our elected officials -- and Parents Defending Education will continue to do so, with the support of parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens like you! The good news is that this proves the NSBA, the teachers’ unions, and radical school boards around the country are running scared. They’ve been bullying us for decades -- and now that parents are standing up to them, they’re terrified. **The mere fact that they’ve summoned the Biden administration to back up their crazy power trip clearly shows they feel the power slipping from their hands.** In cities and towns across America, we’re seeing a backlash against the school administrators and bureaucrats who disdain the parents whose children they are entrusted with educating. This behavior is arrogant and out of touch and these fiefdoms must be exposed and held accountable. And that’s exactly what Parents Defending Education is doing -- keeping the pressure on the NSBA, teachers’ unions, and school boards. But we need the support of parents, teachers, and concerned Americans like you to effectively fight back against these bullies and defend the rights of American parents and school children. [**Tell the DOJ you won’t be bullied**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z59qb81u3q4dhaov9lodm8bk40ljns9eru2a6ft8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c9gm6oj0cjh2bs) So thank you for standing with us -- and standing _up_ for America’s parents! Nicole Neily President Parents Defending Education 4532 Lee Hwy #119
Arlington VA 22207
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2zhjv5fj2eils9210khg1m17om3tkudmkmlqaq5rg).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zeau66hjjoisr22ielp06j6l0npmk51pkdrdtsf0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6c5h62or2c1ie49fg)

subject: Multiple new opponents and a single-digit race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado

Mitch McConnell and National Republicans are desperate to take back the Senate and undo our hard-earned progress. |

Another poll shows Michael in a single-digit race for re-election and three new candidates have entered the race to defeat him, including two who could use their personal wealth to fund their own campaigns. It’s clear Mitch McConnell and the National GOP have their pick of the self-funders and Trump loyalists but this grassroots team can beat back their efforts and close the gap. Days after announcing, one opponent has already launched a television ad attacking Michael — so we know they’re coming for this seat, and for our Senate majority. Despite our slim Democratic majority in the Senate, Michael overcame obstructionism and partisan games to cut child poverty nearly in half, pass a once-in-a-generation infrastructure package, and roll-back anti-climate Trump era rules. Now, he’s counting on grassroots supporters like you — not corporate PACs and federal lobbyists — to fend off incoming attacks and keep Colorado blue. **Pitch in $10 before Saturday’s mid-month fundraising deadline to support Michael Bennet in keeping Colorado blue and defending our Democratic majority in the Senate.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | **[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37550058/311567617/1929152467?express_lane=true&amount=10&&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20211014_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzFlMTdiMi0zNTJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7xqZ4mLDgnrWEQbTRhlEBf2-S6_NByCmHay1iS0r3bw=)**

name: American Update
subject: Help us fight socialism
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8809%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=0fSlRTz%2bGWqUClJgO3qsCw&sysid=1)
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15259%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Nogcg00TMHCQWp2ykYvy0A&sysid=1)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans--views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15250%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=trFiiUNKoNbq7UAq3%2bExKw&sysid=1)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive--and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15251%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yYo3hly5rRq%2f9CZGM9MxCA&sysid=1)
---

Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844

name: Salud Carbajal
subject: A changing political landscape
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ig4J4IxQ0v6Bncn-qqFTosGjaiRx5q4vZhKzrhxz8LA=/_ndanbfMSmc0WbDXvs86yciaY5qSbReEVx8DOu4kftQ=?am=&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
There is no question that our political landscape is changing, and because of it, we cannot afford to take anything for granted.
Due to redistricting, voter suppression and shifting national political dynamics, we just can't count on any seats being "safe" anymore.
As an example, look no further than the recall efforts in California last month. Initially, no one thought Republicans could put up a real fight in such a strong Democratic state, but in the end Democrats had to spend millions to defend Governor Newsom's seat.
Our next race is quickly approaching and we can't be caught off-guard. We must look ahead now and be prepared for anything, because, as we've learned from the recall, any incumbent can be challenged by well-funded right wing interests.
As we work to meet our mid-month fundraising goal, I want to ask you personally to help us prepare for our next race. [ **_Will you chip in here today?_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ig4J4IxQ0v6Bncn-qqFTosGjaiRx5q4vZhKzrhxz8LA=/_ndanbfMSmc0WbDXvs86yciaY5qSbReEVx8DOu4kftQ=?am=50.00&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
We know that Republicans are tired of being in the minority, and that they will spend hundreds of millions of dollars next year to take back the House. There is just too much at stake for complacency and to be caught unaware when outside money begins pouring into our district. That is why we must prepare now.
Thank you for standing with me and [**_chipping in today_** ](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ig4J4IxQ0v6Bncn-qqFTosGjaiRx5q4vZhKzrhxz8LA=/_ndanbfMSmc0WbDXvs86yciaY5qSbReEVx8DOu4kftQ=?am=50.00&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)to help protect our progressive achievements. Every dollar we raise really makes a difference and I greatly appreciate your support.
Sincerely,
Salud

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ig4J4IxQ0v6Bncn-qqFTosGjaiRx5q4vZhKzrhxz8LA=/_ndanbfMSmc0WbDXvs86yciaY5qSbReEVx8DOu4kftQ=?am=50.00&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: FWD: A note from John on the trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
John sent me this memo last night, and I think you should see it.
Hey Peter,
Eric here — John asked me to dress up this campaign memo before sending it out to you, but I think you should see it exactly as it is.
Our campaign has always been about values, and John has always owned them. From day one, John has stood firm on his stances on legal weed, a living wage, LGBTQIA+ equality, climate justice, second chances, the list goes on and on. There are videos from _ten years_ ago demonstrating that he always owned these issues.
It’s the reason that I, and so many of our staff, are here today fighting to ensure that John can be our 51st vote in the U.S. Senate.
**[I hope you can take a moment to read John’s campaign memo below. And if you agree with John Fetterman that everyone deserves an equal shot, I hope that you’ll make a contribution to our campaign — whatever you can afford at this moment — to help us continue this important work.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32961?refcode=em20211014-3013&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3013%2E434096%2EiTSnY1)**
Thanks for being here, Peter. And for being a part of our work.
Eric
Eric Stern
Deputy Campaign Manager
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate
\-------Forwarded message-----
To: Eric Stern
From: John Fetterman
Date: Wed, Oct 13, 2021
Re: Can you fwd this campaign memo to our supporters?
CC: Team Fetterman Eric, Can you do me a favor and pass along this campaign memo to our supporters? Gisele and I have been hitting the trail hard this month. Meeting voters across our Commonwealth has got me thinking — we’ve come so far as a campaign, but we’re also so near to where we started. And I mean that the values that launched this campaign — and set the trajectory for my own life in service — are right where they started. We’re all created equal, and we all deserve an equal shot. This month we’ve seen workers on strike to support a better life and a better wage for themselves and their families. We’ve spoken with formerly incarcerated folks who spent years of their lives behind bars for seeking access to what we call a medicine — marijuiana. We’ve seen families, we’ve seen veterans, we’ve heard from folks that are giving it their all. Every. Single. Day. As you know, my life has forever been changed by the people I have encountered who have set me on this path. And I feel *so* grateful that in this campaign, I am able to connect with more folks every day who are cementing the importance of this race, of our shared values, and of the work ahead. Anyway, if you could dress this up a little bit and pass it along to the team, I’d appreciate it. 🙏 See you on the 10AM tomorrow. John
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211014-3013-footer&t=2&refcode2=3013_434096_iTSnY1&akid=3013%2E434096%2EiTSnY1)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=3&akid=3013%2E434096%2EiTSnY1)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=3013%2E434096%2EiTSnY1)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Alex Lasry
subject: Reproductive rights are under attack, and we can’t let it stand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin **[alexlasry
body:
Let’s be clear: I will fight back against any attempts to limit a woman's autonomy over her own body. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37550619/311570544/-1337061357?refcode=EM_PET_211014choice_N_AL_90DA_4_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzE4MmQ2MC0zOTJkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p29Sc0Ew6vGnFLQKu7_32USE-E7hK_11IjdLYwOcI6w=)
---
Peter,

Over the last few weeks, we’ve seen how fragile reproductive rights are across the country.

We must codify Roe v. Wade as the law of the land and fight back against any effort to undermine access to safe and legal abortion. I also support a repeal of the Hyde Amendment, which creates huge healthcare disparities for low-income women and women of color.

Let’s be clear: **In the Senate, I will fight back against any attempts to limit a woman's autonomy over her own body.** The radical laws we are seeing in states like Texas are an attack on women’s health, the federal government must step in to stop this.

**[I’m asking you to join the fight and add your name to my petition to call on the federal government to codify Roe v. Wade as the law of the land. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Why now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Nearly 90% of Congressional races are won by the candidate who spends more
money. We’ve won races with less money, like when Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
beat a high-ranking corporate Democrat in 2018. But it’s really hard to
do, and that’s one of the reasons AOC’s victory shocked the political
establishment so much.

AOC’s opponent in 2018 spent at least 5 times more than she did on the
primary election. AOC won because she was what NY-14 needed, had a strong
campaign, and a strong message. We helped her build that campaign.

As we build power and see the impact of the 10 Justice Democrats in
Congress, we’ve been able to close the spending gap. Then, more challenges
came our way. The political establishment started spending millions
through Super PACs to smear our candidates. Centrist and right-wing
groups, big corporations and Wall Street all started flooding money into
our races to keep corporate Democrats in office.

We continue to shock the political establishment because of our grassroots
support. We do our best to match the unlimited resources of the political
establishment with donations of $3, $16.95 (our average donation this
year), $27 or more from folks like you. We rely on your support 100%, we
don’t take a cent from corporate PACs.

And we use your donations strategically,
Peter. We build campaigns to win,
help our candidates hire staff, set up field organizing operations,
support media strategies, and so much more.

We’re supporting four primary challengers for 2022 — Jessica Cisneros,
Odessa Kelly, Kina Collins, and Rana Abdelhamid — with more to come. That
takes a lot of money, especially when our opponents are bankrolled by Wall
Street and the Democratic establishment. These primaries are around the
corner (Jessica’s is in March!) and we need your help right now to expand
progressive power in Congress.

So, Peter, can
you make your
first $3 contribution to elect more Justice
Democrats and transform the Democratic Party? We set a critical goal to
raise $15,000 by Saturday at 11:59 p.m. so we can fund these primaries!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/75478?refcode=em20211014-20011&t=1002&akid=20011%2E1203867%2Et4QFVb ]→ Yes, I can give $3 to Justice Democrats to help grow
the Squad!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/75478?refcode=em20211014-20011&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=20011%2E1203867%2Et4QFVb ]Contribute $3

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1004&akid=20011%2E1203867%2Et4QFVb ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1005&akid=20011%2E1203867%2Et4QFVb ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211014-20011-footer&t=1006&refcode2=20011_1203867_t4QFVb&akid=20011%2E1203867%2Et4QFVb

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1007&akid=20011%2E1203867%2Et4QFVb

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

But here’s what’s shocking: _the crosstabs also show Glenn Youngkin with a significant edge when it comes to supporter enthusiasm._

_**How can that be true, Derek?**_

Glenn Youngkin is a far-right culture warrior who’s been endorsed by Donald Trump six times. He’s running on Trump’s “big lie,” calling for the auditing of voting machines.

And it gets worse: at last night’s Trump rally for Youngkin, attendees pledged allegiance to a flag used in the deadly January 6th insurrection.

Later, Donald Trump phoned in and promised Youngkin would, "do anything we need him to do."

clean_body: | | | = | | CBS News poll: McAuliffe and Youngkin locked in tight race while Democratic enthusiasm lags “There are some clear warning signs for Democrats: Youngkin leads with independents, andhis backers look more enthusiastic about voting. ” | = Derek, a breaking CBS News poll shows Democrat Terry McAuliffe and Trump-backed Glenn Youngkin locked in a dead heat in the Virginia governor’s race. But here’s what’s shocking: the crosstabs also show Glenn Youngkin with a significant edge when it comes to supporter enthusiasm. How can that be true, Derek? Glenn Youngkin is a far-right culture warrior who’s been endorsed by Donald Trump six times. He’s running on Trump’s “big lie,” calling for the auditing of voting machines. And it gets worse: at last night’s Trump rally for Youngkin, attendees pledged allegiance to a flag used in the deadly January 6th insurrection. Later, Donald Trump phoned in and promised Youngkin would, "do anything we need him to do." After Democrats worked so hard to vote Donald Trump out of office last year, it’s shocking that more Democrats aren’t fired up to stop a Trump acolyte. = | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Thanks for your quick response to this urgent situation, Terry for VA = Terry for VA PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click._ Paid for by Terry for Virginia

clean_body: We cannot lose a single House seat if we’re going to keep the House blue in 2022. | = | Hi Peter, Daniel here from Susan Wild’s finance team. If you can believe it, we’re almost halfway through October — but unfortunately, we’re not halfway to our October fundraising goal. With Republicans already running attack ads against Susan right here in the district, we can’t afford to fall behind on a single goal. = | = | = Between Democrats holding a razor-thin majority in the House and upcoming redistricting, we cannot lose a single House seat if we’re going to keep the House blue in 2022. Republicans are already targeting Susan because they know their path to the House majority runs through PA-07. You and I know that Susan isn’t going anywhere without a fight, but she needs our support to run a strong campaign and stay in Congress fighting for families and workers in the Lehigh Valley and across the country. Please, if you are able, consider contributing to Susan’s re-election campaign today. | | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Daniel Roth Finance Director, Susan Wild for Congress | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States | | ---|--- Susan Wild represents Pennsylvania's 7th District in Congress. She believes we can grow overall economic prosperity while still caring for the vulnerable members of our community. And she knows, now more than ever, it's working-class families that deserve a break in this economy — not big city billionaires and wealthy corporations. body:
| | |
---

| | Folks, **I’m proud to announce that NARAL, one of the nation’s leading reproductive rights groups, just endorsed my reelection campaign.** I’ve spent the past three years fighting to protect reproductive freedom -- **_and I always will._** **I strongly believe in leaving personal decisions up to****pregnant people and their healthcare providers --****_but the 5 Republican opponents looking to unseat me can’t say the same_****.** **[Polling shows that we’re within single digits of losing this race. As Governor, I’ve signed the Trust Nevada Women Act**** into law to remove harmful restrictions on the reproductive rights of Nevadans, and proudly made investments in family planning services and reproductive health care.
**My Republican opponents like Dean Heller want to follow in Texas’s footsteps and reverse all of the progress we’ve made on reproductive freedom. **_But_****,_folks_**** _, we simply can’t let that happen._** **

clean_body: | | | | | Folks, I’m proud to announce that NARAL, one of the nation’s leading reproductive rights groups, just endorsed my reelection campaign. I’ve spent the past three years fighting to protect reproductive freedom -- and I always will. I strongly believe in leaving personal decisions up topregnant people and their healthcare providers --but the 5 Republican opponents looking to unseat me can’t say the same. | | | | | | | | | | | | | As Governor, I’ve signed the Trust Nevada Women Act** into law to remove harmful restrictions on the reproductive rights of Nevadans, and proudly made investments in family planning services and reproductive health care. My Republican opponents like Dean Heller want to follow in Texas’s footsteps and reverse all of the progress we’ve made on reproductive freedom. But,folks , we simply can’t let that happen. Reproductive rights are on the line in this race -- and I’m going to need the help of this grassroots team to keep my opponents from rolling back the progress we’ve made. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thanks for all that you do, Steve Sisolak | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor** P.O. name: Nikki Fried
subject: Charlie’s record on marijuana
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Team,

Earlier today, Charlie Crist announced his proposal to reform marijuana sentencing laws in Florida and legalize adult-use marijuana.

Here’s the problem: when Charlie was Florida’s Republican Governor, he implemented many of those laws in the first place.

He ignored pressure from Republican legislators who wanted to reform Florida’s harsh sentencing laws, signed a new law making it a felony to grow more than 25 marijuana plants, and outlawed the sale of drug paraphernalia.

The result? Thousands of people went to jail for nonviolent crimes. The laws--like most drug laws--disproportionately harmed Black Floridians.

I’ve been consistent on this issue for my entire career. As Commissioner of Agriculture, we’ve legalized hemp and fought restrictions on Florida’s medical marijuana program. And when I’m Governor, we’re going to legalize adult-use marijuana.

Floridians are tired of Governors who follow the political winds instead of fighting for what’s right. Charlie had his chance to reform Florida’s sentencing laws. He didn’t, and it’s time for something new. If you agree, click here to chip in now and support our campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-oct-21?refcode=1014marijuana]

I’ve been consistent on this, and I’ll always be consistent in the fight for what’s right. Thanks for your continued support.

Nikki

P.S. If you’re still doubting that I’m the real deal on this, here’s a gif of me with my medical marijuana card:

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

clean_body: | | | I won’t sugar coat it, Peter. I have some bad news for you today. We’re falling behind on our fundraising, and I just had to pull several of our Stop Stacey ads. If we want to defeat Stacey’s far-left agenda, we simply can’t go on like this. We MUST raise the critical resources we need to answer her lies with the truth. But here’s the problem – unlike Stacey Abrams, we don’t have a vast network of leftwing mega-donors who can write us a big check at the drop of a hat. Peter, we can’t afford to keep our Stop Stacey ads down much longer. I hope I can count on you to act immediately. Thanks in advance for your help at this critical time! body:
Friends, Joe Biden is at it AGAIN. He continues to force authoritarian policies on Americans while infringing on the powers of the states, given to us by the Constitution.
* **First** , he started with his unconstitutional vaccine mandates on small businesses.
* **Then** , Biden empowered the IRS with the ability to monitor an individual's bank account after any transaction over $600.
* **Now** , he’s weaponizing the DOJ by attacking **parents and labeling them as domestic terrorists** for attending school board meetings about Critical Race Theory.

**_Yes, you read that right: parents = domestic terrorists._** As the next Attorney General of Arizona, I’ll stand up to Biden’s DOJ and hold them accountable for their gross overreach. You'll remember our FARM Act brings together groups like the League of Conservation Voters and the Almond Alliance to invest $2.5 billion to help farmers implement climate-friendly farming practices. I'm thrilled because our efforts are picking up steam back home and were just covered on one of our biggest TV stations. We know that grassroots support is vital to applying pressure on Congress to actually act, so this is a big deal! [**Check out FOX 40 's coverage of how our bill is helping farmers fight climate change!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/msbs1IHYqKKlBHl2t0yVPirU297VC91uO0lI69d8mdw=/VD4TsdUax0XnQI7lokk0lgtLK4CuRa0CTqg0V2j-AVM=?refcode=E11847-20211014-ClimateBill-SL-EnvironmentClimate-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/msbs1IHYqKKlBHl2t0yVPirU297VC91uO0lI69d8mdw=/VD4TsdUax0XnQI7lokk0lgtLK4CuRa0CTqg0V2j-AVM=?refcode=E11847-20211014-ClimateBill-graphic-EnvironmentClimate-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15) My community is proud to be the fruit and nut basket of the world, but severe droughts and extreme wildfires are an existential threat to our way of life. We have to involve agricultural communities like mine in the climate solutions before it's too late. I'm proud to be leading this important fight, and I'm very excited to see it gaining such momentum back home and in DC. [**You can click here to learn more about our landmark climate legislation.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/msbs1IHYqKKlBHl2t0yVPirU297VC91uO0lI69d8mdw=/VD4TsdUax0XnQI7lokk0lgtLK4CuRa0CTqg0V2j-AVM=?refcode=E11847-20211014-ClimateBill-SL-EnvironmentClimate-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15) Staying in the fight! \-- Josh [**P.S. name: Laura Loomer
subject: He’s wining and dining tonight . . .
body:
One privilege our incumbent politicians have is EASY access to money for their next campaign.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/Y77Q892JEEZJRLQyMeoREZng/brqifN0miCLsJYLz8RltrA)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/Y77Q892JEEZJRLQyMeoREZng/brqifN0miCLsJYLz8RltrA) One privilege our incumbent politicians have is EASY access to money for their next campaign.

They really don’t have to do much as they can use their influence to get wealthy donors in one room and have them stroke giant checks.

I don’t have that luxury and even after I’m in Washington, I HIGHLY doubt any titans of industry will be coming to gain favor with me – because they already know I can’t be bought.

That’s why it’s you and me against them – [**and your support is needed today**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/Y77Q892JEEZJRLQyMeoREZng/brqifN0miCLsJYLz8RltrA).

My opponent, Do-Nothing Republican Dan Webster, is meeting with well-heeled donors from 5:30 to 7:30 tonight at the Mission Inn Luxury Resort in Florida.

He’ll walk out with a jacket full of big checks to add to his campaign coffers.

[**Help me compete and win a seat in Washington with a donation of $28, $50 or whatever amount you can give.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/Y77Q892JEEZJRLQyMeoREZng/brqifN0miCLsJYLz8RltrA)

For every check Webster is handed tonight by big-industry donors, I have to have you and 99 other supporters donate at least $28 to my campaign.

[**Will you do that for me?**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/Y77Q892JEEZJRLQyMeoREZng/brqifN0miCLsJYLz8RltrA)

Isn’t it rich that Webster has missed 15% of his votes in Congress this year, yet he can take the time to wine and dine with rich donors?

This five-term Congressman didn’t bother to cast a vote against the bogus January 6th Commission – **and he didn’t even show up to defend President Trump during the second impeachment!**

But when he needs to raise money for his campaign, he’ll organize and show up with perfect attendance!

When I get to Washington, you’ll have to drag me away to miss a vote and those big donors will have to get in line – behind my constituents in need! [**Help me get there today by donating any amount you can.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/Y77Q892JEEZJRLQyMeoREZng/brqifN0miCLsJYLz8RltrA)

Thanks for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

| Peter, I’m not sure if you have seen the ATROCIOUS New York Times article on redesigning our American flag... but they are trying to change the course of American history! Our American flag is a beacon of freedom that should be protected not trampled on by the crazy Socialist Democrats. In response to the New York Times article, I decided to list the top five uses for the New York Times. If you haven’t seen it yet, you might want to grab your popcorn for this one. name: Keystone Progress
subject: You’re invited... to mobilize voters and have some fun!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

Let's get Pennsylvanians excited about voting! Join us at our two upcoming Vote for Justice in PA [https://www.facebook.com/events/300104825320275] events taking place in Penn Hills and Erie.

Co-hosted by Keystone Progress [https://www.keystoneprogress.org/] and 1Hood Power [https://www.facebook.com/1HoodPower] , we’re working to get voters out to participate in important local elections and critical county and statewide judicial elections. Pennsylvania's state judges played an essential role in securing the integrity of Pennsylvanians' votes in the 2020 presidential election, making it all the more necessary that we elect judges who are committed to ensuring that every Pennsylvanian's vote counts!

Help us as we work to preserve our democracy!

Come to our Penn Hills event on Saturday, October 16 from 2:00 - 4:00 pm at The Spot Bar & Grill, 11675 Frankstown Road, Penn Hills, PA 15235. It will feature local elected officials including PA State Rep. Summer Lee and PA State Rep. Emily Kinkead, as well as an array of progressive candidates for the Allegheny County Court of Common Pleas.
Come to our Erie event on Saturday, October 23 from 2:00 - 4:00 pm at Lavery Brewery, 128 West 12th Street, Erie, PA 16501. It will feature local elected officials including history-making Erie County Executive candidate Tyler Titus and Erie County Councilman Andre Horton.

Both will feature open mic performances and musical guests. Suggested donation levels are $10, $25, $50 and $100 -- it will help us mobilize voters for the upcoming November 2nd General Election.
Please sign-up to help us make a difference in the upcoming elections! You can RSVP on Facebook and view our flyer here

[https://www.facebook.com/events/300104825320275]
[https://www.facebook.com/1HoodPower/photos/gm.295398262457598/423678976009169/] .

Thank you for working with us to support justice, fair elections, and your right to vote!

Keystone Progress

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www.kpef.info. Not affiliated with any candidate or candidate's committees.

Keystone Progress Education Fund
PO Box 1206
Harrisburg, PA 17108
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.everyaction.com/unsubscribeUnique/b8865d3f-322d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208/b399af8d-442d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIzOTlhZjhkLTQ0MmQtZWMxMS05ODFmLWM4OTY2NTNiOTIwOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BvlZV5seQ_5t26-X97hhLK6N3m1k7f1klgu9sH_dLhU=&id=111098838 .

name: American Update
subject: Flawed and outdated?
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8815%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=xK7%2f%2bR3QZEdxvh57gchhhg&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15254%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kDF9c%2bvXeCKWY%2bEr6qcP6Q&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American,
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well.
Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** --not adequate for the challenges of our time.
How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges?
Well, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_.
Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution.
Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.”
That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves.
**So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**
_**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more.
The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15265%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rT3hM2WEAv4NbGRPe1pUsA&sysid=1) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long.
Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15266%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=crNvqJVZRlsIYsymBattlw&sysid=1)
Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Class of 2001
Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8815%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=xK7%2f%2bR3QZEdxvh57gchhhg&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8815%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=xK7%2f%2bR3QZEdxvh57gchhhg&sysid=1)

Dear Peter,
We try to have fun here at Team Morrisey, but you have to admit, President Biden is giving us some really good material to use.
**The memes about this guy’s incompetence just keep coming!**
Fortunately, we are busy cleaning up after this guy’s mess in the West Virginia Attorney General’s Office. Here are just a few things we are working on in our fight against federal and state overreach:
🛂****_**Suing To Stop The Biden Border Disorder**_**** 🛂 We have filed a lawsuit to block the flood of fentanyl and other illicit drugs coming across the border. Since Biden took office, illicit drugs are coming into the U.S. like never before. _Our lawsuit will stop this!_
**🔫** _**Stopping The Gun Grab**_**🔫** In recent weeks, we submitted legal comments against two of the Biden proposals to curtail your gun rights. We submitted comments against the Biden ghost gun proposal (which tries to illegally regulate gun parts previously not subject to regulation) and the Biden pistol brace proposal, which would make it much harder for the disabled and elderly citizens to acquire a gun which relies on a pistol brace (historically used to improve accuracy for the user).
💉 _**Opposing Vaccine Mandates**_ 💉 In the last month, my Office issued a lengthy opinion letter against vaccine mandates. We also made clear that West Virginia state government could not utilize them, and educated citizens about the necessity for maintaining -- at a minimum -- religious and medical exceptions to mandates. At the same time, we are ready to get into court to sue Biden over his mandates— as soon as he finalizes his rule, we will see him in court!
👶 _**Standing Up For The Sanctity Of Life**_ 👶 We are part of a broad multi-state coalition helping Mississippi in their efforts to overturn the tragic Roe framework. We will be helping our sister state out as they argue at the Supreme Court in December.
🔋 _**Fighting For America’s Energy Independence**_ 🔋 We have multiple cases pending to push back against efforts to dramatically curtail the use of fossil fuels and provide China with a strategic advantage on energy issues. If Biden’s energy policies hold, consumers will be left holding the bag in the form of _massive_ _hikes_ in their power bills. Our litigation would stop that!
Whether the issue involves federal overreach or attacking the root causes of the opioid epidemic in West Virginia, we are on the case. Stay tuned for more big news about our work — we are fortunate to have a terrific team. Count on us to make progress in our cases.
