clean_body: | | | | See what we've been up to. Dear Peter, We try to have fun here at Team Morrisey, but you have to admit, President Biden is giving us some really good material to use. The memes about this guy’s incompetence just keep coming! Fortunately, we are busy cleaning up after this guy’s mess in the West Virginia Attorney General’s Office. Here are just a few things we are working on in our fight against federal and state overreach: 🛂**Suing To Stop The Biden Border Disorder 🛂 We have filed a lawsuit to block the flood of fentanyl and other illicit drugs coming across the border. Since Biden took office, illicit drugs are coming into the U.S. like never before. Our lawsuit will stop this! 🔫 Stopping The Gun Grab🔫 In recent weeks, we submitted legal comments against two of the Biden proposals to curtail your gun rights. We submitted comments against the Biden ghost gun proposal (which tries to illegally regulate gun parts previously not subject to regulation) and the Biden pistol brace proposal, which would make it much harder for the disabled and elderly citizens to acquire a gun which relies on a pistol brace (historically used to improve accuracy for the user). 💉 Opposing Vaccine Mandates 💉 In the last month, my Office issued a lengthy opinion letter against vaccine mandates. We also made clear that West Virginia state government could not utilize them, and educated citizens about the necessity for maintaining -- at a minimum -- religious and medical exceptions to mandates. At the same time, we are ready to get into court to sue Biden over his mandates— as soon as he finalizes his rule, we will see him in court! 👶 Standing Up For The Sanctity Of Life 👶 We are part of a broad multi-state coalition helping Mississippi in their efforts to overturn the tragic Roe framework. We will be helping our sister state out as they argue at the Supreme Court in December. 🔋 Fighting For America’s Energy Independence 🔋 We have multiple cases pending to push back against efforts to dramatically curtail the use of fossil fuels and provide China with a strategic advantage on energy issues. If Biden’s energy policies hold, consumers will be left holding the bag in the form of massive hikes in their power bills. Our litigation would stop that! Whether the issue involves federal overreach or attacking the root causes of the opioid epidemic in West Virginia, we are on the case. Stay tuned for more big news about our work — we are fortunate to have a terrific team. Count on us to make progress in our cases. Enjoy some of the recent clips we are providing below. And thank you! We couldn’t continue our level of success without your help! Sincerely, Patrick Morrisey West Virginia Attorney General | Follow us on Social Media **|****|****|****|** Paid for by TEAM MORRISEY, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Morrisey 2020, Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915. Copyright (C) 2021 Team Morrisey. All rights reserved. Mailing Address** Team Morrisey P.O. Box 11903 Charleston, WV 25339-1903 == \-

name: Team Erica Smith
subject: Where your fundraising $$$ go
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
We’re taking a moment to break down the real costs of running a grassroots campaign »
#
Hey there,
A key part of our moral movement is getting out into the community and meeting folks where they are. It’s something that we’re passionate about, and are constantly looking for new ways to engage with folks across North Carolina.
Our community outreach and events are having a huge impact on the growth of our movement, but the costs are adding up.
**The truth is, it’s extremely expensive to keep organizing as a grassroots campaign.** Erica Smith doesn’t take a DIME of corporate money, fossil fuel donations, or super PAC contributions.
**This is a campaign for the people, by the people, and we depend on small-dollar donations to fuel our moral movement to send Erica to the U.S. Senate.**
[**_That’s why we’re asking: Can you donate $5 today to our campaign so we can have the resources to keep putting on great community events that reach every corner of North Carolina?_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/21651?t=1&akid=546%2E3698%2EJPyLPg)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/21657?refcode=em20211014-546&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=546%2E3698%2EJPyLPg)**
Here’s just SOME of what your small-dollar donations go towards:
🪑Tables and chairs for our in-person (COVID-safe) events
📱 Volunteer outreach to grow our grassroots team
🍕 Water, snacks, and small bites for supporters and volunteers at our events
📋 Canvassing supplies like clipboards, pens, stickers, and posters
💻 Zoom subscriptions for our virtual events and our team meetings
🚗 $1 dollar/ 1 door campaign — every dollar allows us to drive and organize in rural communities. No county is “too red” for our movement.
✔️ And more!
[**_Can you make a contribution of $5 today to help ensure that we have the resources we need to run a strong grassroots campaign to flip North Carolina’s open U.S. Senate seat blue in 2022?_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/21651?t=21&akid=546%2E3698%2EJPyLPg)
Together,
Team Erica Smith

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211014-546-footer&t=22&refcode2=546_3698_JPyLPg&akid=546%2E3698%2EJPyLPg)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=23&akid=546%2E3698%2EJPyLPg)

name: Parents Defending Education
subject: Teachers' unions are out of control
body:
Maybe you heard the news – recently, the U.S. Department of Justice said they will mobilize the FBI against parents [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8816%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=81U4cEeDtj1Acr27hgek5A&sysid=1)
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15286%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Z9WL7BEztvrIS4fgtgGRlw&sysid=1) Fellow American, Maybe you heard the news - recently, the U.S. Department of Justice said **they will mobilize the FBI against parents ... for standing up for their own children! ** On October 4, 2021, the DOJ announced a new initiative to address “harassment, intimidation and threats of violence” against school board members and employees - including but not limited to **the creation of a federal task force as well as dedicated lines of communication for threat reporting, assessment, and response by law enforcement under the auspices of the FBI.** [**Tell the DOJ this is unacceptable**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15287%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZzOZkRYauBWSW9AS0xZHRQ&sysid=1) My name is Nicole Neily, and I’m the President of Parents Defending Education. We’re a national grassroots organization working to reclaim our schools from activists promoting harmful agendas, and fighting against indoctrination in the classroom -- and _for_ the restoration of a healthy, non-political education for our kids. We are also standing with parents like you who are troubled by what’s happening in our schools today. You might be wondering how something so outrageous -- **the FBI being mobilized against parents for simply speaking up for their own children** \-- could happen in “the land of the free.” It all started recently, when the National School Board Association (NSBA) sent a letter to President Biden asking for help **silencing parents like you** who are demanding change at school board meetings. In their letter, NSBA cites a tiny number of minor incidents to insinuate that** parents who are criticizing and protesting the decisions of school boards are or may be engaging in “domestic terrorism and hate crimes."** While PDE naturally does not support _anyone_ who uses violence or threats against school board members, officials, or teachers, the NSBA choosing to invoke the PATRIOT Act (which was passed after 9/11 to uncover potential terrorist plots) takes it WAY too far. The association of legitimate protest with terrorism and violence reveals both NSBA’s contempt for parents and their unwillingness to understand and hear the sincere cries of parents on behalf of their children. In short, **_NSBA’s letter to President Biden was a thinly veiled threat_** , intended to intimidate into silence and submission the very constituents -- parents and taxpayers like you, -- that its members ostensibly represent. And the Department of Justice is wholly complicit in this charade. [**Tell the DOJ you OPPOSE FBI persecution of parents**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15288%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=prl4G9RygOIdbsXC%2flfEwA&sysid=1) I’m in awe that NSBA would choose to threaten parents for having the courage to hold them accountable -- as I’m sure you are. And it’s unthinkable that concerned parents should be equated with domestic terrorists. **We will not be bullied.** We refuse to have our free speech chilled by threats. America’s parents have a constitutional right to petition our elected officials -- and Parents Defending Education will continue to do so, with the support of parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens like you! The good news is that this proves the NSBA, the teachers’ unions, and radical school boards around the country are running scared. They’ve been bullying us for decades -- and now that parents are standing up to them, they’re terrified. **The mere fact that they’ve summoned the Biden administration to back up their crazy power trip clearly shows they feel the power slipping from their hands.** In cities and towns across America, we’re seeing a backlash against the school administrators and bureaucrats who disdain the parents whose children they are entrusted with educating. This behavior is arrogant and out of touch and these fiefdoms must be exposed and held accountable. And that’s exactly what Parents Defending Education is doing -- keeping the pressure on the NSBA, teachers’ unions, and school boards. But we need the support of parents, teachers, and concerned Americans like you to effectively fight back against these bullies and defend the rights of American parents and school children. [**Tell the DOJ you won’t be bullied**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15289%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lrLPCm9L06NdLHFddthAbA&sysid=1) So thank you for standing with us -- and standing _up_ for America’s parents! Nicole Neily President Parents Defending Education 4532 Lee Hwy #119
Arlington VA 22207
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8816%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=81U4cEeDtj1Acr27hgek5A&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8816%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=81U4cEeDtj1Acr27hgek5A&sysid=1)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Here's what President Trump said
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
You won't believe this |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=0503ad0b27&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | **_“He is tough as hell!” – President Trump_**
Dear ,

I am incredibly grateful that I was invited by President Trump to speak at his Des Moines, Iowa “Save America” rally. It was amazing to be able to speak to so many people about the good work that we are doing in Arizona to uncover the systematic fraud perpetrated by the Democrats in the 2020 election.

**I am more so honored that he publicly supported my campaign to run for Secretary for State, the results that I have fought for with my work around the country in Election Integrity, and his support for the next step of my fight: Auditing Pima County.**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=622691c8b2&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| At the event, President Trump spoke of me, saying:

_“He is tough as hell, he’s incredible, and he is running for a certain position [Arizona Secretary of State] that’s going to be I think a very easy victory.”_

And of course none of this would happen without your support on the ground and from home. We would have no shot of making the strides that we did in uncovering fraud in Maricopa if it wasn’t for you.

And for that I am grateful, and I know the President is as well.

**In fact, he just showed his further support by mentioning and encouraging our fight for the Pima County Audit in his most recent press release!**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=1025d975e5&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| This is huge. President Trump supports our patriotic movement to uncover fraud in Pima. **I have seen some of the data – and it already looks horrific.**

In case you weren’t able to hear my remarks at President Trump’s rally, here is a brief excerpt:

_That [Pima County] is the second most populous county in the state of Arizona, where we had a whistleblower who sent an email not just to the DOJ but to every single legislator saying, there’s 34,000 or 35,000 fictitious voters, and they’ve been inserted in system, and we’re going to never find them. Well, we believe we found them._

**Yes, you read me right. There was a whistleblower who revealed that there were 34,000 to 35,000 fictitious voters inserted into the system.**

This is just one of many reasons why our Nationwide Petition to Audit Pima County is gaining such momentum!

**We have the evidence of fraud. We have the President on our side. This grassroots movement has become a tidal wave of Patriotism. This is what we need to carry us to 2022 and beyond!**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=380cb6172a&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| With President Trump’s endorsement and support of the work I am doing in Arizona: first in Maricopa, next in Pima County, and then as Arizona Secretary of State, nothing can stop us.

**[All I need is your continued support. ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e4a4e0cda9&e=44b8c466b0) We are pushing as hard as we can to push the message of Election Integrity, but Big Tech is squashing and lying about the results of the Audit, Social Media is trying to silence us, and our opponents have mountains of cash. _[Can you help us continue to fight the good fight in Arizona with a donation today?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7b13d33ea6&e=44b8c466b0)_**

[President Trump and I could not do this without you](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=eea5e9a532&e=44b8c466b0). This is why I am so grateful for your support. I take that seriously and I will continue to fight for you as you have for me.
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=ad074b8c06&e=44b8c466b0)
God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=82a3f1f06b&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. I am trying to Audit Pima County. If you support my efforts, [please contribute whatever you can by the end of this month](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=73c34ddd65&e=44b8c466b0).

It was amazing to be able to speak to so many people about the good work that we are doing in Arizona to uncover the systematic fraud perpetrated by the Democrats in the 2020 election. I am more so honored that he publicly supported my campaign to run for Secretary for State, the results that I have fought for with my work around the country in Election Integrity, and his support for the next step of my fight: Auditing Pima County. | | At the event, President Trump spoke of me, saying: “He is tough as hell, he’s incredible, and he is running for a certain position [Arizona Secretary of State] that’s going to be I think a very easy victory.” And of course none of this would happen without your support on the ground and from home. We would have no shot of making the strides that we did in uncovering fraud in Maricopa if it wasn’t for you. And for that I am grateful, and I know the President is as well. In fact, he just showed his further support by mentioning and encouraging our fight for the Pima County Audit in his most recent press release! | | This is huge. President Trump supports our patriotic movement to uncover fraud in Pima. I have seen some of the data – and it already looks horrific. In case you weren’t able to hear my remarks at President Trump’s rally, here is a brief excerpt: That [Pima County] is the second most populous county in the state of Arizona, where we had a whistleblower who sent an email not just to the DOJ but to every single legislator saying, there’s 34,000 or 35,000 fictitious voters, and they’ve been inserted in system, and we’re going to never find them. Well, we believe we found them. Yes, you read me right. There was a whistleblower who revealed that there were 34,000 to 35,000 fictitious voters inserted into the system. This is just one of many reasons why our Nationwide Petition to Audit Pima County is gaining such momentum! We have the evidence of fraud. We have the President on our side. This grassroots movement has become a tidal wave of Patriotism. This is what we need to carry us to 2022 and beyond! | | With President Trump’s endorsement and support of the work I am doing in Arizona: first in Maricopa, next in Pima County, and then as Arizona Secretary of State, nothing can stop us. We are pushing as hard as we can to push the message of Election Integrity, but Big Tech is squashing and lying about the results of the Audit, Social Media is trying to silence us, and our opponents have mountains of cash. . This is why I am so grateful for your support. I take that seriously and I will continue to fight for you as you have for me. | God Bless You, | | Mark Finchem Arizona House of Representatives – District 11 Republican for Arizona Secretary of State Conservative Election Integrity Patriot P.S. I am trying to Audit Pima County. If you support my efforts, . PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE | | | Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: "Get vaccinated or starve"
body:
The Biden Administration just announced that all businesses with more than 100 employees will be FORCED to require COVID-19 [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c495%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=KljkqWM42aT0GTZ9UcrtZA&sysid=1)
Fellow American, **The Biden Administration just announced that all businesses with more than 100 employees will be FORCED to require COVID-19 vaccines for all employees.** In other words, Joe Biden is basically saying: _**“Get the**** ****vaccine or**** ****starve.”** _ **_I’ll be_**** _ _****_clear_**** _ _****_with you; The Center_**** _ _****_for_**** _ _****_American Liberty WILL sue the Biden Administration the second he enforces this outrageous, totalitarian mandate._** [**Will you support the Center for American**** ****Liberty**** ****to help us sue the Biden Administration for this completely unconstitutional vaccine order** ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66012%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=S%2bLTOOknkde8nhojO01zGw&sysid=1) This isn’t an empty threat. _**This is a PROMISE.** _ And the writing has been on the wall for months. First they locked you out of your houses of worship, schools, and closed small businesses... ...then they forced you to wear masks. Now Joe Biden and the rest of his authoritarian minions are going to stop you from making a living and _**feeding your family if you don’t get the COVID vaccine.** _ They don’t care about your right to religious freedom... They don’t care about your right to medical privacy... They don’t care about your right to determine how you should live your life... The only thing that matters to Joe Biden and the radical Left is that you obey. [**That’s why I’m urgently asking you to help us stop this totalitarian takeover of our lives by sending a tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty today.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66013%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VZHrDgXgZlFN4sY1B4GJhQ&sysid=1) If we don’t stand up HERE and NOW it will never end. But we can’t do this without you. My name is Harmeet Dhillon, and I founded the Center for American Liberty to push back against these kinds of threats to our civil liberties. And Biden’s UNCONSTITUTIONAL order mandating that employers require COVID-19 vaccination is perhaps his worst offense yet. Forget about the astounding hypocrisy. For years they’ve shouted, “my body, my choice.” But it’s clear that they only care about “your body” and “your choice” when it fits their political narrative. And if we don’t take immediate action against the Biden Administration’s new vaccine mandate - your right to make your own medical decisions... your right to individual freedom will disappear overnight. [**That’s why I’m asking you to help us prepare for one of the most important legal battles of our lives with a gift of $35 or more today.** ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66014%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YKnua42rFRSEugoo21xZXg&sysid=1) If we don’t fight to keep our freedoms today, they’ll be gone tomorrow. Thank you in advance for standing with us and for liberty. Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon [**DONATE**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66025%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UgI3TrK%2fUf6xImDi3g8kFQ&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66026%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=m629p4YyeGxxyI14qzTVHQ&sysid=1) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66027%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=V%2bf%2bBb3JYbnfSvM9goo9qw&sysid=1) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.

Hello friend, when a candidate for office asks you to lend them your support — you should be confident about what they stand for.
**[After over 36 years serving in the United States Navy, I'm home to unseat Chuck Grassley and become the next Senator from Iowa — and I'm writing today to ask you to become a founding donor to this campaign.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xnpPS9ElAtCH4oZLR7595Zq09gnDzcRbJCOrFmiHYHnjglxkrrsFzhU9svWvmQSA3ovZJYRW0mFQclM4t5QzznAsTuq7PiZPuwBoeG5mSWWHDr6Ryjw7gLVf-Rze6cUB4J91kfXQ5ka4R3-KQ4BUob2Kk2GuyPoPfPppVnHFYu4RJY9MXlqmGnxKEPkVowE-glwOCbAtL6z1BIMvfbKcWRqEbcHHEOYV53K8_bIVMIPi_PUXfP6xE3mNX2QMlBPQs9Qq5OI9AMoiRyeN4II6rYRayunpFvWI7g5_1Gt3Rnt-5Ig2mNeS7sRI1YUX8JRfkw3s-lJqSOBukgr_8CISF8/3g5/2avI2TqkQEmwiOS27Lwg3g/h1/l8K5L3Gb1bchSVztOzDqlX1E9CEDeniPkWEOpA3wKj4)**
So, here's some substance about where I stand on the issues:

* Every American should enjoy comprehensive healthcare. That includes dental, mental, and preventive care, and ultimately, Medicare available to all who need it.
* The threat posed by the climate crisis is enormous, but so are the benefits we can enjoy by addressing it. That’s especially true in Iowa thanks to renewed leadership in agriculture and bioenergy.
* It's appalling that large corporations and the very wealthy pay a lower tax rate than ordinary Iowans. It's time to stop giving working families a raw deal and start eliminating loopholes for the ultra-rich.
* Too many of our students right here in Iowa don't get the quality of education they deserve. We need to pay our teachers what they're worth, and we can take steps to improve education in rural areas by making sure they get their fair share of per-student spending.
* And finally, I believe that Americans deserve a movement of steel-jawed Democrats who win with the first punch and don't back down. We don't need to coddle Chuck Grassley and others who were aware of attempts to overthrow our democracy; we need to show them the barn door.

**[If all of this sounds right to you, friend, then there is something you can do about it: Chip into our campaign today. We're going to run this race the right way, focusing on our vision for the future of every Iowan and every American — and your gift today will help make sure voters hear our message.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xnpPS9ElAtCH4oZLR7595Zq09gnDzcRbJCOrFmiHYHnjglxkrrsFzhU9svWvmQSA3ovZJYRW0mFQclM4t5QzznQN-wJhG67qPHfx99Z6c1GiCJ05EUsqIJeyjvc8UACNxxbFtNjxrhBj-458S9l1-gkL_c_Zu3jTCielFLk3fqkrxNU7q_WL_EKhBnf3PWCkyNAIt48Gu413XA0ktjBPy056JGxyYs1ppDbetXT15kRUcJHDYSn5GtB1FEzmn_9IqogbSOKCgvjXEnyR5M9LjCDdMGp2leRwemyXZbDjJhP0jUkz5_W-H-UWG-qyY7swRcjQr_5Z1gORDjdgjfglYu/3g5/2avI2TqkQEmwiOS27Lwg3g/h2/DhUQtvOi6NFdZ4hrLQr9OMId8-zu3JsYLzLKq9ElUho)**

I've said this before, but I'll repeat it here. I think you deserve a Senator who is pragmatic enough to achieve what’s achievable, but bold enough to aim for what we haven't yet been able to achieve. It's my sincere hope I can be that Senator for you.

Thanks for your support, and thanks for doing what it takes to win this election.

V/r, Mike

Peter, we’ve been outraged as the Biden Administration practically invited hordes of illegals into our country, cancelled completion of President Donald Trump’s border wall, appointed do-nothing VP Kamala Harris as utterly ineffective “border czar,” and dispersed thousands upon thousands of migrants - untested and unvaccinated in the middle of a pandemic - throughout our country.

And the Biden illegal invasion is only getting worse - and it’s not just Mexicans or other Central Americans who are breaching the border - they’re coming from overseas, too.

In fact, a “caravan” of as many as 60,000 Haitians, and maybe more, is said to be about to make its move - and now Texas National Guard troops must deal with the invasion: overwhelming Border Patrol agents, bringing deadly weapons and drugs, sex and child trafficking, and willful disregard for our laws and sovereignty with them.

name: Blake Masters
subject: I'm the only candidate that can beat Mark Kelly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blake Masters for Senate**
body:
Kelly just released his 3rd quarter fundraising numbers, and they're big, but I'm not intimidated by them. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2fb727cb5ed74e91b98e6c3d99b9a139&_e=fSq9edVOd4Sdw2oHqkNpQvgzXUFSIQh4j1rHsHofAzs07iDD-KiC2D3HYMl9TbU-GCmqxczNnobPQ_99xuqDEtZnasxIHmLHVkR6BtYgdIRFrJ8p-ud4rhdAuv8fcP_qJ_rlVSmYAf_hhgG2QCHRoH-DDkB2bxvR2osJpHB2OLSsfWnPQhJr-Zh6V_p0Ho5FxZBwJ5epP4WGDHqEb97-4hOvD3M1r8R2HxRotFsgAYtc4K_jkcK8s_tyJhvjziFJdWQzfAk9L_6mRymxJU9DegCw9LfovLTotzzZ1RDyX3CxDPJfJmR2L44BE6g2nl4CKQ_Rtm6780JAI5mDaoW0oRgxd_aSom4o8vVXbIjHfN9JElo_5plKcuX7Wql1WiDzR2vpZsN_3851EHxpXtTWWcJ0mA7-MpDmnZbRFiK_JYjaB02H5y17dYHm6iCAtHe-83T6yFP8kXT-iFH4otcxmA%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

Mark Kelly just released his latest fundraising numbers, and he raised nearly $8 million last quarter. **I would be impressed by that number if I didn't already know it came from national Democrats and dark money allies.**

Meanwhile, our campaign, _backed by small donors, Arizonans, and grassroots activists,_**exceeded our goal for the third quarter and outraised every one of my Republican opponents.**

**I'm the only Republican that can beat Mark Kelly.** I raised over $1 million in the third quarter, that's more than double what any of my Republican opponents raised in their respective first quarters

**After seeing these fundraising results, I'm confident that I will be the one defeating Mark Kelly in 2022.**

[**To do that, our campaign is going to have to raise over $100 million. I need your support ASAP. Will you pitch in to help us win?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2fb727cb5ed74e91b98e6c3d99b9a139&_e=fSq9edVOd4Sdw2oHqkNpQvgzXUFSIQh4j1rHsHofAzs07iDD-KiC2D3HYMl9TbU-GCmqxczNnobPQ_99xuqDEtZnasxIHmLHVkR6BtYgdIRFrJ8p-ud4rhdAuv8fcP_qJ_rlVSmYAf_hhgG2QCHRoH-DDkB2bxvR2osJpHB2OLSsfWnPQhJr-Zh6V_p0Ho5FxZBwJ5epP4WGDHqEb97-4hOvD3M1r8R2HxRotFsgAYtc4K_jkcK8s_tyJhvjziFJVsv_nHLiJTwAuSlrX-LdE-q-Mvx6vcjKMNVB3CFzyMAvWjtoZLUnyR3P_w0QHHThTc8ioieV_XwxJIbJnm2NpK-fF_mUZbc6eUBhHvGj0KXrBKr4GzbqcU6DPdqayV94lKblNsjzhO5zPqrCVaSIt7iVKLr4LdJkqKYSGphuMZXRc0jcUU0bFmB3hSw3BVj3GnZb05EQ0NGGZuRF1KKcsQ%3D%3D)

[** ****TAKE BACK ARIZONA ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2fb727cb5ed74e91b98e6c3d99b9a139&_e=fSq9edVOd4Sdw2oHqkNpQvgzXUFSIQh4j1rHsHofAzs07iDD-KiC2D3HYMl9TbU-GCmqxczNnobPQ_99xuqDEtZnasxIHmLHVkR6BtYgdIRFrJ8p-ud4rhdAuv8fcP_qJ_rlVSmYAf_hhgG2QCHRoH-DDkB2bxvR2osJpHB2OLSsfWnPQhJr-Zh6V_p0Ho5FxZBwJ5epP4WGDHqEb97-4hOvD3M1r8R2HxRotFsgAYtc4K_jkcK8s_tyJhvjziFJF45S8uMNzoWBvdNH9aaHsqsk1Yenuqf-BQ3h93EoHDDw0SumtxeiYA-fbj1wpVZtsmOgyUSTq4G2No2oeYmt89EcvDf1g5u51BmMPLAxIBdwjbEf83ptNdkddmeMmqd5DfLD4KjP31Wnf9b1HcTrd7Bsm2OBcRWE3X2GOc_Lme-Kyil9KLltjtH5O6gFF4TjB_kvFrHQ2r8swDXqshNpvg%3D%3D)

Kelly is lining his war chest with liberal dollars because he knows he's in trouble come 2022. **Unlike in 2020, he has a record to defend, and he's shown that he cares more about the opinion of Chuck Schumer than his own constituents in Arizona.**

clean_body: Kelly just released his 3rd quarter fundraising numbers, and they're big, but I'm not intimidated by them. | Fellow Conservative, Mark Kelly just released his latest fundraising numbers, and he raised nearly $8 million last quarter. I would be impressed by that number if I didn't already know it came from national Democrats and dark money allies. Meanwhile, our campaign, backed by small donors, Arizonans, and grassroots activists,exceeded our goal for the third quarter and outraised every one of my Republican opponents. I'm the only Republican that can beat Mark Kelly. I raised over $1 million in the third quarter, that's more than double what any of my Republican opponents raised in their respective first quarters After seeing these fundraising results, I'm confident that I will be the one defeating Mark Kelly in 2022. Kelly is lining his war chest with liberal dollars because he knows he's in trouble come 2022. Unlike in 2020, he has a record to defend, and he's shown that he cares more about the opinion of Chuck Schumer than his own constituents in Arizona. We can't take back the Senate if we don't take back Arizona, Thank you, Blake Masters Republican for U.S. Senate, Arizona P.S. I'm running against one of the Democrat's top fundraisers. Since his inauguration, Biden has recklessly spent your tax dollars, and he wants to spend more! But it's hurting American families. Every month since he's been in office, consumer prices have risen. clean_body: | | | | We need STRONG Leadership Friend, What is going on in DC, let alone our own country? In just a few months, Joe Biden has already had multiple botches--the economy is in the gutter, the COVID shot mandates, over a million illegal immigrant encounters at the border, and the Afghanistan withdrawal disaster! How can we trust Biden’s Chief Enabling Officer (CEO), Liberal Lisa Murkowski? She had full faith in the Biden Administration and believed they had a viable plan in place in Afghanistan. She’s cozied up to Biden, but tried to derail President Trump at every turn! Now, she just filed for re-election! It’s time to end the Biden-Murkowski friendship! Just imagine what another 6 years of disastrous leadership for Alaska looks like under Murkowski. Now more than ever, we need a Senator who will bring our America First Conservatives values to the Senate. It’s time we take back our state and our country! Thanks, Team Kelly | | | | =

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: $13.40 vs. $2,900
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Our movement is only as powerful as the grassroots support behind it.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20211014-2587-header&t=1&akid=2587%2E2526796%2EamJ97x)
These are the two first numbers we see when we log into our ActBlue dashboard: how many contributions we’ve received so far this month and what our average gift size is.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211014-1?refcode=em20211014-2587-P_FND_MMF_GOL&t=2&refcode2=2587_2526796_amJ97x&akid=2587%2E2526796%2EamJ97x)
Traditionally, most campaigns pursue fundraising with one number in mind: $2,900. That’s the maximum one person can contribute to a primary campaign — so candidates spend a lot of their time calling and spending time with wealthy donors who can afford to write a large check.
**But our grassroots movement is built different.** Instead of relying on wealthy donors and corporate PACs to max out, our campaign is funded entirely by individuals in communities across the country giving $13.40 to emails like this one to help build our power and fight for real change for working people.
How does a $13.40 contribution compete with a $2,900 check? Well, to us, 200 people giving about $13.40 is a lot more powerful than one person giving $2,900. This is how we can take on wealthy special interests and make our government work for working families — but it only works if we’re able to hit all of our goals.
**In order to be on track for our October targets, we need to hit at least 10,000 grassroots contributions by our mid-month fundraising deadline at midnight tomorrow.**
[Can you be one of the 1,227 people we need to make a $13.40 contribution — or whatever you can afford — to get us to our 10,000 contributions goal before tomorrow night?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211014-1?refcode=em20211014-2587-P_FND_MMF_GOL&t=3&refcode2=2587_2526796_amJ97x&akid=2587%2E2526796%2EamJ97x)
**[Contribute $13.40](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211014-1?refcode=em20211014-2587-P_FND_MMF_GOL&t=22&refcode2=2587_2526796_amJ97x&akid=2587%2E2526796%2EamJ97x)**
Our movement is only as powerful as the grassroots support behind it. Let’s show that grassroots campaigns like ours aren’t slowing down, and the momentum behind us is not slowing down.
Thank you,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211014-1?refcode=em20211014-2587-P_FND_MMF_GOL&t=23&refcode2=2587_2526796_amJ97x&akid=2587%2E2526796%2EamJ97x)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20211014-2587-P_FND_MMF_GOL&t=24&akid=2587%2E2526796%2EamJ97x)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=2587%2E2526796%2EamJ97x) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=2587%2E2526796%2EamJ97x) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=2587%2E2526796%2EamJ97x)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=28&akid=2587%2E2526796%2EamJ97x)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=2587%2E2526796%2EamJ97x)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: Team Fetterman
subject: re: Donald Trump and Josh Hawley
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20211014-3016-header&t=1&akid=3016%2E434096%2EGQvi2J)
Hey, Peter — remember *this* guy? 👇 That's GOP Senator Josh Hawley, who helped incite the deadly insurrection at the U.S. Capitol on January 6.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32945?refcode=em20211014-3016&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3016%2E434096%2EGQvi2J)
We hate to be the bearers of bad news, but he and former president Donald Trump have _BOTH_ officially waded into our Senate race here in Pennsylvania.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32945?refcode=em20211014-3016&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3016%2E434096%2EGQvi2J)
Here at Team Fetterman HQ, we believe wholeheartedly that working families should choose Pennsylvania's next Senator — NOT the sedition-curious GOP like Donald Trump or Josh Hawley.
**If you agree that Trump + Hawley should get lost when it comes to choosing Pennsylvania's next Senator, Peter, then we've got a quick but important request for you today:** We have a rare + extremely valuable opportunity to elect a real champion for working people while flipping this Senate seat from red to blue. In order to build the kind of statewide organizing power that will elect John Fetterman in 2022, we honestly need to see a big surge of donations come in through emails like this one. Especially before tomorrow's midnight deadline.
[**_CNN has consistently ranked our race here in Pennsylvania as the #1 Most Likely to Flip in the entire country. With that in mind, will you please chip in $5 to help our team fight back against Trump, Hawley, and the PA GOP as we fight to elect John Fetterman to the U.S. Senate?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32945?refcode=em20211014-3016&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3016%2E434096%2EGQvi2J)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32945?refcode=em20211014-3016&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=3016%2E434096%2EGQvi2J)**
John is our single best shot at flipping this Pennsylvania Senate seat from red to blue. That's a fact.
But as great of a candidate as John Fetterman is, he simply can't go up against the PA GOP (and Donald Trump + Josh Hawley) without a giant grassroots movement to have his back.
**We must raise enough money early on to fend off the GOP attacks that are sure to come our way throughout the course of this race — or we risk squandering this valuable opportunity to add another voice for working people to the U.S. Senate.**
[**_Will you please chip in your first $5 right now if you're in John's corner in this fight to flip this seat blue in 2022? We really can't afford to fall short of our fundraising goals now that Republicans like Donald Trump and Josh Hawley have chosen a candidate in this race._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32945?refcode=em20211014-3016&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=3016%2E434096%2EGQvi2J)
Thanks for hearing us out,
— Team Fetterman HQ
P.S. Quick question: Would you rather have Pennsylvania's next U.S. Senator be hand-selected by Donald Trump + Josh Hawley? Or would you prefer someone who was chosen to represent us by the working people who built this country? 🤔 If your answer is the latter, [** _would you kick in $5 or more right now to help John Fetterman build the kind of campaign that can go the distance in this race and flip this seat blue in 2022?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32945?refcode=em20211014-3016&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=25&akid=3016%2E434096%2EGQvi2J)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211014-3016-footer&t=26&refcode2=3016_434096_GQvi2J&akid=3016%2E434096%2EGQvi2J)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=27&akid=3016%2E434096%2EGQvi2J)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=3016%2E434096%2EGQvi2J)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Paul Schimpf
subject: Join our 2021 Century Club
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P
body:
| [](http://www.schimpf4illinois.com/?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021_century_club_solicit&n=1)
---
Friend -- What is my 2021 Century Club and why should you join? Many of you are already members because you've donated over $100 to our campaign (THANK YOU!!!). If you ARE NOT already in that group, here's why you should join up. My Century Club receives frequent, exclusive emails from me (marked CENTURY ONLY in the subject line) that give you behind-the-scenes updates on our campaign and my thoughts about the political issues of the day. This past year, Century Club members found out first about our new campaign logo and additions to our campaign team. Our Century Club members will get the first look at the economy reforms that we are getting ready to unveil in the coming weeks. Century Club members also receive an invite to a dinner with Lori and myself that kicks off the holidays--you have to be a Century Member or their guest to attend this event. The 2021 Century Club dinners are shaping up to be fantastic events. On November 18th we will celebrate at Sunset Hills Country Club in Edwardsville (in the Metro East). On November 19th we will be at Park Ridge Country Club in Park Ridge (in Chicagoland). These dinners are a tremendous time. We have a trivia contest and you get to know Lori and me on a personal level. If you are already a member of my 2021 Century Club--thank you! You will be receiving a letter next week inviting you to RSVP for these events. If you haven't joined my 2021 Century Club--it's not too late. You can donate online [here](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/donate?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021_century_club_solicit&n=2). Thank you for reading this and considering joining our 2021 Century Club. I am the only Republican candidate who can defeat JB Pritzker--but I can't do it alone. I need your help and joining our Century Club is one way that you help us win! Semper Fidelis, Paul Paul Schimpf
[http://www.schimpf4illinois.com/](http://www.schimpf4illinois.com/?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021_century_club_solicit&n=3)
Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P.O. Box 16, Waterloo, IL, 62298\. A copy of our report, filed with the State Board of Elections, Springfield, IL, will be available for download or purchase from them. We do not pay for email addresses. We have your email address either because you signed up for our list at an event, you entered your email address online, or you gave your email address to Paul.
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/unsubscribe?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021_century_club_solicit&n=4).
You can also keep up with Paul Schimpf on [Twitter](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEGmWwYfQ_yWb41Zx1QyVyU&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021_century_club_solicit&n=5) or [Facebook](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6g5cWifaQHs4q1ylFw89qVcMpLCIQGbbcgOLvTMfF-ic&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021_century_club_solicit&n=6).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021_century_club_solicit&n=7), software for leaders.

name: Shawn Collins
subject: America needs new leadership
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAWN COLLINS FOR CALIFORNIA**
body:
As father of four who has lived the American Dream and fought for my country so others could achieve it, I am disturbed by our lack of leadership. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=55573812350a481fa56d81ff07945036&_e=LHK-pN4uo7if-cyTlCJpd6GLsTZKgN3FmN9tiwB1a0H_SzxJAFXUH6iE0MV_qZgONpgEHXVzu0FIt6vEmYGT06lGpvv2gL7wwL6dT32Pt23fxARw2EC7_BS3pKSyBrT9hURPmdyBn66kcK68XDZ6HqP6Q1yETA6QB4NvTSLXW8KtPhPPK6phqzgN2rP63I19w7BB4dOnrmq5gfkKGlTrxK84zZU5qaKV0grw-PnmNvAeuQY273Q7OopeZ_1Eukv7_LU2WspbJYRuP4_F4LKignmgI0KqCvDpcwnR0sP4R6h-gE33miglFn-fn7LJ8qeXnasbYDEe1DXtqYEtxF4dfx-Aytj3PdkEfjddfey_A7EKmjjQvU7eVkGGceE1z8_9r09jpZM0j12qoxmusGhlR6oDF4pjciHq1x-jBTo4e0rFzjyYgg4gNGfSTuMEKlXOo2mnb3Hvl5jHZh64NwePei0Wn1m2au-Z_b4zosyysso%3D)

---
Peter,

I want to re-introduce myself. I’m Shawn Collins – I’m a black conservative, a U.S. Navy combat veteran who served in Afghanistan, an active U.S. Navy reservist, a husband, and a father.

I’m running for Congress in California’s 45th District – a seat that was represented by Republicans for decades until Democrat Katie Porter flipped it in the 2016 “Blue Wave”.

This seat is one of the best chances we have to flip a seat back to Republican in 2022, [**and I’m going to need your help to do it.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=55573812350a481fa56d81ff07945036&_e=LHK-pN4uo7if-cyTlCJpd6GLsTZKgN3FmN9tiwB1a0H_SzxJAFXUH6iE0MV_qZgONpgEHXVzu0FIt6vEmYGT06lGpvv2gL7wwL6dT32Pt23fxARw2EC7_BS3pKSyBrT9hURPmdyBn66kcK68XDZ6HqP6Q1yETA6QB4NvTSLXW8KtPhPPK6phqzgN2rP63I19w7BB4dOnrmq5gfkKGlTrxK84zZU5qaKV0grw-PnmNvAeuQY273Q7OopeZ_1Eukv7_LU2WspbJYRuP4_F4LKignMSUW44skLb_J8FdnVjeMgCO70GWKOq8vhKpBD99npk7zihrnhfclWDXnuMGVbuLc294d4WeF1p3-WiRwJ_7MOzJgbc977UGZMpe2ugsD1m709ybkY_vdiIi_OR-pwzcMe7Db2F1wRyGWiB86ZTqSnYIfSSFDcSA0Fo-5DlIJzxm0vHZ5C_jYO6U7uzg93_UnmzzkGA3xALIcVOSMtXCXo%3D)

But let me tell you why I’m running. **We need new leadership in America.**

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=55573812350a481fa56d81ff07945036&_e=LHK-pN4uo7if-cyTlCJpd6GLsTZKgN3FmN9tiwB1a0H_SzxJAFXUH6iE0MV_qZgONpgEHXVzu0FIt6vEmYGT06lGpvv2gL7wwL6dT32Pt23fxARw2EC7_BS3pKSyBrT9hURPmdyBn66kcK68XDZ6HqP6Q1yETA6QB4NvTSLXW8KtPhPPK6phqzgN2rP63I19w7BB4dOnrmq5gfkKGlTrxK84zZU5qaKV0grw-PnmNvAeuQY273Q7OopeZ_1Eukv7_LU2WspbJYRuP4_F4LKigj-Huh7GFlIcS4QnC23bsjpgo9Edy2zQpg9E_5Vd0kuuwMdU6u7u73fuOorqw9X9WuDVk6ufds4THrlOVIy3L1Rn2wE2gER9IftNL5boAxeguW7FF5q1Fj-1dU6zgmKYMS7hdVD3dXWBSluwQdC6zmfc4aAxiV5oNBP0BsgZfjsbwcMKUGc7UwUiNAXhx-FCe3VShM5c_m2rpOtfkwokwG8%3D)
I grew up in a disadvantaged home in a poor suburb of Dallas. My parents divorced when I was three years old. I had every reason to be convinced that I could not change my circumstances.

But fortunately for me, the American Dream was alive and strong.

My parents both taught me about hard work, accountability, and resiliency. Those traits combined with my love of basketball lead me to attend Rice University, where I played Division 1 basketball.

After law school, when I was admitted to the bar, I took an oath to support the Constitution. _But eventually I realized that was not enough for me_ – **so I made the decision to fight for the Constitution I swore to defend and joined the U.S. Navy.**

Shortly after my wife Zeina – who is an immigrant – and I were married, I deployed on a combat mission to Afghanistan. While in Afghanistan, I helped negotiate with key leaders in the region **and even survived two assassination-attempt bombings.**

Now, as father of four who has lived the American Dream and fought for my country so others could achieve it as well, I am greatly disturbed by the lack of leadership in America.

I’m running for Congress to help give our country the leadership we so badly need in order to keep America a safe, secure and prosperous nation full of opportunity.

[**Will you support my campaign, help me flip CA-45, and restore a conservative majority to Congress by chipping in $10, $25, $50 or even more today?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=55573812350a481fa56d81ff07945036&_e=LHK-pN4uo7if-cyTlCJpd6GLsTZKgN3FmN9tiwB1a0H_SzxJAFXUH6iE0MV_qZgONpgEHXVzu0FIt6vEmYGT06lGpvv2gL7wwL6dT32Pt23fxARw2EC7_BS3pKSyBrT9hURPmdyBn66kcK68XDZ6HqP6Q1yETA6QB4NvTSLXW8KtPhPPK6phqzgN2rP63I19w7BB4dOnrmq5gfkKGlTrxK84zZU5qaKV0grw-PnmNvAeuQY273Q7OopeZ_1Eukv7_LU2WspbJYRuP4_F4LKigqGfNLvCe5ExUDA4ikxOL0mUpm6Rx0ckaTizJt75CyBM8j46zQexYTeCNZtsbzcdkGYeZEerrPP9INpT4EzXvCZen3lBwaQmvHkc21khPITA56S1mgTLETZt3wisDqH4N1KnDOua5WbBB78x7wMNGVv0qYockDqMZkRU51gWuob-DxNkzST179St2K44nsg0pMcD6MpeplhAy7uJwNB51p4%3D)

On Biden’s watch, we have had a disastrous and dishonorable withdrawal from Afghanistan that undid everything I fought for, and thousands died for, over the last twenty years.

Democrats are spending trillions of dollars we don’t have on pet projects we can’t afford which is driving up debt and inflation and hurting our economy.

Since Democrats took over, nothing has gotten better – in fact, **it’s getting worse.** No one – not Biden, not Katie Porter – is providing America with the leadership we need.

We must be **spending wisely** and _lowering_ (not raising) taxes, especially in this difficult economic climate.

We must be supporting our **military** AND our **law enforcement** as they work to protect us.

We must improve our **education** system, put more emphasis on STEM fields, and secure a brighter future for our children.

We must address the national security and humanitarian crisis at the border by securing it and streamlining the legal immigration process so more people like my wife can have the opportunity to come to our country legally and achieve the American Dream.

**We can do all these things and more, but only if we have new leadership in America.**

[**I’m running for Congress, and I need support from patriots like you to not only flip this target seat in CA-45, but ensure we have a new conservative majority in Congress. Will you stand with me by supporting my campaign with a contribution of $10, $25, $50 or even more today?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=55573812350a481fa56d81ff07945036&_e=LHK-pN4uo7if-cyTlCJpd6GLsTZKgN3FmN9tiwB1a0H_SzxJAFXUH6iE0MV_qZgONpgEHXVzu0FIt6vEmYGT06lGpvv2gL7wwL6dT32Pt23fxARw2EC7_BS3pKSyBrT9hURPmdyBn66kcK68XDZ6HqP6Q1yETA6QB4NvTSLXW8KtPhPPK6phqzgN2rP63I19w7BB4dOnrmq5gfkKGlTrxK84zZU5qaKV0grw-PnmNvAeuQY273Q7OopeZ_1Eukv7_LU2WspbJYRuP4_F4LKiggpUvItg-W9ftWA1UeYKUykl8X4I8BL_edTPyL9cb35db1S2IF8ZqmAZE3AyYHzHHed1yWMVpF-zw_KBNZV3EG_9rsHbsHWmyRUaLnzC9V-GeCFMdVWvyNZBfq_Rw6ZXnzto2VcG97y10MLpBTmwPF6eCEHL9XIHfjrcJGtLXC4KFCmWOuxeIm-COvI0wPP_ZWaEdrCj1nw2TdsmJaix5Uc%3D)

clean_body: As father of four who has lived the American Dream and fought for my country so others could achieve it, I am disturbed by our lack of leadership. | Peter, I want to re-introduce myself. I’m Shawn Collins – I’m a black conservative, a U.S. Navy combat veteran who served in Afghanistan, an active U.S. Navy reservist, a husband, and a father. I’m running for Congress in California’s 45th District – a seat that was represented by Republicans for decades until Democrat Katie Porter flipped it in the 2016 “Blue Wave”. This seat is one of the best chances we have to flip a seat back to Republican in 2022, But let me tell you why I’m running. We need new leadership in America. I grew up in a disadvantaged home in a poor suburb of Dallas. My parents divorced when I was three years old. I had every reason to be convinced that I could not change my circumstances. But fortunately for me, the American Dream was alive and strong. My parents both taught me about hard work, accountability, and resiliency. Those traits combined with my love of basketball lead me to attend Rice University, where I played Division 1 basketball. After law school, when I was admitted to the bar, I took an oath to support the Constitution. But eventually I realized that was not enough for me – so I made the decision to fight for the Constitution I swore to defend and joined the U.S. Navy. Shortly after my wife Zeina – who is an immigrant – and I were married, I deployed on a combat mission to Afghanistan. While in Afghanistan, I helped negotiate with key leaders in the region and even survived two assassination-attempt bombings. Now, as father of four who has lived the American Dream and fought for my country so others could achieve it as well, I am greatly disturbed by the lack of leadership in America. I’m running for Congress to help give our country the leadership we so badly need in order to keep America a safe, secure and prosperous nation full of opportunity. On Biden’s watch, we have had a disastrous and dishonorable withdrawal from Afghanistan that undid everything I fought for, and thousands died for, over the last twenty years. Democrats are spending trillions of dollars we don’t have on pet projects we can’t afford which is driving up debt and inflation and hurting our economy. Since Democrats took over, nothing has gotten better – in fact, it’s getting worse. No one – not Biden, not Katie Porter – is providing America with the leadership we need. We must be spending wisely and lowering (not raising) taxes, especially in this difficult economic climate. We must be supporting our military AND our law enforcement as they work to protect us. We must improve our education system, put more emphasis on STEM fields, and secure a brighter future for our children. We must address the national security and humanitarian crisis at the border by securing it and streamlining the legal immigration process so more people like my wife can have the opportunity to come to our country legally and achieve the American Dream. We can do all these things and more, but only if we have new leadership in America. Thank you for your support! For America, Shawn Collins U.S. Navy veteran Republican for Congress | | Shawn Collins is a conservative Navy veteran and active Navy Reservist. Having served in Afghanistan, Shawn has spent his life fighting for the Constitution he swore to uphold and defend. He will take that same fighting spirit to the halls of Congress. ---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- Shawn Collins is a former member of the US Navy. Donald J. Trump October 14th, 2021
Today, the highly respected Dr. Shiva Ayyadurai, MIT PhD, is having an event on the big findings from the Arizona Audit. He has invited the RINOs on the Maricopa County Board of Supervisors to participate. If they have nothing to hide, and if this was the “most secure election” in history, they would show up and answer the many questions raised by the audit, like how there were over 17,000 duplicate mail-in ballots and why they poured in after Election Day, how there were over 6,000 more ballots than there were envelopes, or why some were stamped “verified and approved,” even though they had no signature, which is against the law.

body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, we did the
math and we need three donations from
18326.
(We’ll explain more about why below.)

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11423?refcode=em20211014-1062&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=1062%2E346206%2EYVO0Zy ]Will you chip in $4 and be one of the three we need? »

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11423?refcode=em20211014-1062&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1062%2E346206%2EYVO0Zy ]Contribute $4

Peter,

Last week, our team learned that Rand Paul raked in millions of dollars in
corporate donations last quarter, out raising our campaign. While he was
ignoring Kentuckians and spreading dangerous lies, Rand was collecting
six-figure checks from corporations, lobbyists, and other dark money
sources.

It’s irrefutable evidence that there will be no expense spared in order to
try to keep Charles and our movement from the U.S. Senate.

So this month, we’re answering Rand’s dark money donations with a wave of
grassroots fundraising. Because we know that if regular folks come
together, Wall Street executives, Big Pharma, and Rand Paul won’t stand a
chance.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11423?refcode=em20211014-1062&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1062%2E346206%2EYVO0Zy ]We’re getting close to the mid-point of the month, and we’re racing to
raise $75,000 to fund our operating budget for the rest of the month,
right here in Kentucky. We did the math and we need three $4 donations
from 18326 today. Will you chip in?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11423?refcode=em20211014-1062&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=1062%2E346206%2EYVO0Zy ]Contribute $4

Kentuckians are hungry for change. From electing our first Democratic
governor in years to our historic campaign last year — the energy on the
ground is electric.

Our people-powered movement has supporters from all across the country and
within Kentucky, from the hood to the holler, who understand just that. We
know that the tides are finally turning.

We have a real chance to defeat Rand Paul this election, and send Charles
to the U.S. Senate to represent Kentucky. But if we want to do that, it’s
going to take all of us working together and chipping in what we can to
catch up to Rand’s war chest and truly compete.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11423?refcode=em20211014-1062&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=1062%2E346206%2EYVO0Zy ]If you have $4 you can spare for our campaign today — please chip in
and be one of the three people we need from
18326. Help us raise $75,000 this week so we can build
this grassroots movement and usher in bold progressive leadership to
Kentucky.

Thank you,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211014-1062-footer&t=1025&refcode2=1062_346206_YVO0Zy&akid=1062%2E346206%2EYVO0Zy

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1062%2E346206%2EYVO0Zy

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Our people-powered movement has supporters from all across the country and within Kentucky, from the hood to the holler, who understand just that. We know that the tides are finally turning. We have a real chance to defeat Rand Paul this election, and send Charles to the U.S. Senate to represent Kentucky. But if we want to do that, it’s going to take all of us working together and chipping in what we can to catch up to Rand’s war chest and truly compete. [ ]If you have $4 you can spare for our campaign today — please chip in and be one of the three people we need from 18326. Help us raise $75,000 this week so we can build this grassroots movement and usher in bold progressive leadership to Kentucky. Thank you, Team Booker Contribute to Charles Booker:

clean_body: He's the right man for the job. Friend, This is Rep. Nicole Malliotakis, Congresswoman for NY-11. I have some big news: Last year, I flipped one of the crucial blue-to-red seats in Congress, taking out one of Pelosi’s top politicians and giving my seat to the Republicans. This year, I need your help to get Tom Kean a victory in a similar seat so that we can restore the Republican majority and get Speaker Pelosi out of office. These blue-to-red seats are crucial to us winning the majority in 2022. Not only must we win 5 seats this cycle to beat Pelosi and remove her as Speaker, but we need a Republican majority in the House because we need to hold Biden and his administration accountable. Tom Kean is the right man for the job because he is smart, effective, and a commonsense leader who will stand up for New Jersey’s values and citizens. I need your help to get him elected. Here’s how you can help: If you are like me and want to see Nancy Pelosi gone as Speaker, you must step up today and help me get Tom Kean to Capitol Hill so that he and I can draft conservative legislation that restores our country. Sincerely, Rep. Nicole Malliotakis | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Kean for Congress Inc Copyright © 2021 Kean for Congress

Friends,

Riddle me this: _Why raise taxes if the Biden agenda "costs zero dollars?"_

I asked this question the other day and am still left with **NO ANSWERS.**

Biden claimed that his "Build Back Better Agenda costs zero dollars.” But I think we know that NOTHING is ever free -- especially when it comes to the tax agenda of the Radical Left.

_Washington politicians have shrugged off trillion-dollar deficits for far too long._

We absolutely MUST take back the Senate -- I refuse to be left unanswered and frustrated like this any longer.

**This is GOVERNMENT GONE WILD. In terms of spending, the Radical Left has transported us to a NEW DIMENSION.**

Liberals are doing everything they can to ruin the progress we made pre-COVID. Inflation is already here. And the consequences keep getting worse.

body:
[1]Powered By People

FIRST: Powered by People was founded by Beto in late 2019 to organize
volunteers to reach out to, register, and mobilize as many Texas voters as
possible.

THEN: We made history. Ahead of the 2020 election, Powered by People
organized over 20,000 volunteers, made over 76 million voter contact
attempts, and registered over 250,000 likely-Democratic voters — driving
historic turnout across Texas!

NOW: We want to make an even bigger impact before the 2022 midterms — and
we know we can do it if enough grassroots donors come together to invest
in our work right now, in these critical early months.

name: Lauren Lalonde, PramilaForCongress.com
subject: We can't afford to lose our momentum in fundraising
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter, can you believe it? Our first mid-month fundraising goal for this new FEC quarter is already coming up at midnight tomorrow.
To be frank, we can't wait until an end-of-year push to get us over the finish line on our ambitious fourth-quarter goal. **So I wanted to check in with you to share your supporter record and review our campaign fundraising for the year so far.** Here is what we have on file for you Peter:
**Supporter Record for Peter**
**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**2021 Donor?:** No—not yet!**
****2021 Total:** $0
**Suggested donation:** $3
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211014?refcode=em20211014-718&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&refcode2=718_420207_l61CBE&akid=718%2E420207%2El61CBE)**
_(FYI: If you donated recently, in the mail, or with a different email address, your record might not yet reflect your contribution. Thank you for your support!)_
There's so much at stake. Pramila is still fighting for — and standing her ground on — passing the transformative Build Back Better Act WITH the infrastructure package, not either/or. And she's working to ensure that all of the critical investments progressives have fought so hard for — child care, paid leave, universal pre-K, community college, affordable housing, Medicare expansion, climate action, and a roadmap to citizenship for Dreamers — stay in place for the final bill.
As we turn to 2022 and a critical midterm election cycle, we have big plans to expand our progressive coalition in Congress — plans that require us to make critical, early investments right now to see them through. **But that means we can't afford to lose our momentum in fundraising — and we need to meet every fundraising goal from here on out,****_even mid-month goals like the one coming up at midnight tomorrow._**
**Right now, we're $7,500 away from reaching our $25,000 mid-month fundraising goal with less than 48 hours to get there.[Can I count on you to make your first donation to this campaign of $3 or any amount to help us close the gap?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211014?refcode=em20211014-718&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&refcode2=718_420207_l61CBE&akid=718%2E420207%2El61CBE)**
**[Contribute $3 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211014?refcode=em20211014-718&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&refcode2=718_420207_l61CBE&akid=718%2E420207%2El61CBE)**
Thank you for your support,
Lauren Lalonde, Finance Director
Pramila for Congress

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20211014-718-footer&t=24&refcode2=718_420207_l61CBE&akid=718%2E420207%2El61CBE)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=25&akid=718%2E420207%2El61CBE)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=718%2E420207%2El61CBE)

And she's working to ensure that all of the critical investments progressives have fought so hard for — child care, paid leave, universal pre-K, community college, affordable housing, Medicare expansion, climate action, and a roadmap to citizenship for Dreamers — stay in place for the final bill. As we turn to 2022 and a critical midterm election cycle, we have big plans to expand our progressive coalition in Congress — plans that require us to make critical, early investments right now to see them through. But that means we can't afford to lose our momentum in fundraising — and we need to meet every fundraising goal from here on out,even mid-month goals like the one coming up at midnight tomorrow. Right now, we're $7,500 away from reaching our $25,000 mid-month fundraising goal with less than 48 hours to get there. Thank you for your support, Lauren Lalonde, Finance Director Pramila for Congress | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
